| | | **Today, President Joe Biden extended the moratorium on student loan payments by 90 days, until May 1st.
**
[**It’s NOT enough. We need to cancel student debt. Can you chip in to my campaign before the December 31st deadline?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtn6NzOqr_NZeqQZkVxfkp1FuycTwCKwnRCngjTXWMbX1AUlmMMCD3XfzDxXSS23VcsyHYtiGvllaDu-YSya1yENqIzFjm8nVyqaWEyFYPjAqf6248yhXKP9ils5yfV6rWxvKmcv7IJU19D0RlMOT8vMZySofh-hFbPzxj2s-5WeClBfUM6p_kEt4Z1lvKny1PctsawVCrQDmgQJBX-nJVMxOdbuXi1j-G1z3wQ7aoFY3O8ur25Q34pn_lt22-wZsBADCMZr_2Q_LBK_eBs3P5h6A0Elk3ohH_QqdlNpbCPt1gRa_xIB6V6NISFY7hObBAOdrti9hSl_HimqQNOC61_A/3i3/h0yI44BYRXSWrNIO7A_IEw/h0/gwEh4W01qF3WIUr7-Getw2DEIGUdLY3PABq5MqrF-LU)
President Biden has extended the pause on student loan payments from February 1st to May 1st.

**It’s NOT enough.** 92% of student loan debt is owned by the federal government — which means President Biden can cancel it with an executive order and provide real financial relief to 43 million Americans.
Canceling student loan debt would allow students and families to buy homes, start families, build wealth and put money back into their local economies. It would boost our national GDP by $108 billion per year.
So why haven’t we canceled it yet? Because lobbyists are paying Republicans and corporate Democrats not to. It’s that simple.
**I’m running for Congress to cancel student debt, and actually fight for our families. I need your help to win an open Democratic seat that could determine control of the House.**
****[**My final fundraising deadline of the year is December 31st. clean_body: | | | Today, President Joe Biden extended the moratorium on student loan payments by 90 days, until May 1st. President Biden has extended the pause on student loan payments from February 1st to May 1st. It’s NOT enough. 92% of student loan debt is owned by the federal government — which means President Biden can cancel it with an executive order and provide real financial relief to 43 million Americans. Canceling student loan debt would allow students and families to buy homes, start families, build wealth and put money back into their local economies. It would boost our national GDP by $108 billion per year. So why haven’t we canceled it yet? Because lobbyists are paying Republicans and corporate Democrats not to. It’s that simple. I’m running for Congress to cancel student debt, and actually fight for our families. I need your help to win an open Democratic seat that could determine control of the House. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately. | | ---|--- | | Many of us were raised with the expectation that to be successful, to get a great job, to start a family and one day retire— we needed to attend college. A lifetime of crippling debt shouldn’t be the punishment for wanting a higher education and not having the means to do so. We don’t have to sit back and watch student debt hold back working families and hinder new generations from building wealth.** Thanks for standing up. – Melanie is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. If you’d rather contribute by check, feel free to make the check out to the following address: Friends of Melanie Darrigo P.O. Box 312 Port Washington, NY 11050 Paid for by Friends of Melanie Darrigo | | Sent via . subject: Dinner with Me & President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Van Taylor Campaign
body:
We'd love to have you join us! Tap or click >>> |
---
| | Peter,

This is House Republican Conference Chairwoman Elise Stefanik. I'm glad to reach you!

I'm writing today because you’ve proven yourself as a TOP America First Patriot. This is a very special and exclusive opportunity.

**We've launched a contest to join me and President Trump for a private dinner at his Mar-a-Lago Club on January 11th!**

That’s right – one lucky winner will get to sit down at the table with President Trump.

_Dinner, a photo with President Trump, roundtrip travel to Palm Beach, and lodging will all be 100% covered!_
**[ORDER 1 RAFFLE TICKET - $50>>>](https://vantaylor.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=04792877e7849664175862700&id=c1f93e046d&e=9920087750)
[ORDER 3 RAFFLE TICKETS - $150 >>>](https://vantaylor.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=04792877e7849664175862700&id=8dee7b9b7c&e=9920087750)
[ORDER 10 RAFFLE TICKETS - $500 >>>](https://vantaylor.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=04792877e7849664175862700&id=39b8eb5982&e=9920087750)**
Our nation is on a path to complete and total disaster under Joe Biden and the Democrats – I’m proud to be leading the charge to END this Far-Left insanity in Washington.

**My good friend President Trump and I are fighting to SAVE AMERICA in 2022!**

On January 11th, we’re going to discuss the America First movement, our plans to take back the House and fire Nancy Pelosi, and much more. It’s going to be an amazing evening.

[Enter now to win a seat at the table.](https://vantaylor.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=04792877e7849664175862700&id=a6217e482a&e=9920087750) We’d love to have you join us.

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Re: Joe Manchin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Alexandria is leading the fight to get Democrats to be bold.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211222-2701-header&t=1&akid=2701%2E2526796%2E1hzUjg)
Alexandria warned it could happen. On Sunday, it did.
**Joe Manchin made his opposition to Build Back Better official.** The central piece of the Democratic agenda — from addressing climate change, to economic justice, and expanding health care access — doesn’t have the votes.
But, we cannot give into despair. Not when so much is on the line for so many working families. **Democrats need to take the kid gloves off and start using our power to govern.**
The president and congressional leadership can call votes, take executive action, and use a myriad of tools to get things done. There is an enormous amount that the White House can do on climate, student debt, immigration, cannabis, health care, and more. But we don’t have much time left before the midterm elections.
**Alexandria is leading the fight to get Democrats to be bold.** And she’s able to do that, because your grassroots support keeps her in Congress fighting for all of us.
[Will you donate $3 today to show Alexandria we have her back as she pushes the Democrats to make real tangible change for working families? Every dollar we raise helps us build this movement.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211220?refcode=em20211222-2701-P_FND_EGR_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2701_2526796_1hzUjg&akid=2701%2E2526796%2E1hzUjg)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211220?refcode=em20211222-2701-P_FND_EGR_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2701_2526796_1hzUjg&akid=2701%2E2526796%2E1hzUjg)**
When Alexandria uses her bully pulpit in Congress or in the media to push for stronger Democratic leadership, people listen. They listen because they know that it’s not just one person speaking. _It’s a movement speaking._
Thank you for being in the fight with us.
\- Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211220?refcode=em20211222-2701-P_FND_EGR_LEG&t=22&refcode2=2701_2526796_1hzUjg&akid=2701%2E2526796%2E1hzUjg)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20211222-2701-P_FND_EGR_LEG&t=23&akid=2701%2E2526796%2E1hzUjg)**

clean_body: Alexandria is leading the fight to get Democrats to be bold. Alexandria warned it could happen. On Sunday, it did. Joe Manchin made his opposition to Build Back Better official. The central piece of the Democratic agenda — from addressing climate change, to economic justice, and expanding health care access — doesn’t have the votes. But, we cannot give into despair. Not when so much is on the line for so many working families. Democrats need to take the kid gloves off and start using our power to govern. The president and congressional leadership can call votes, take executive action, and use a myriad of tools to get things done. There is an enormous amount that the White House can do on climate, student debt, immigration, cannabis, health care, and more. But we don’t have much time left before the midterm elections. Alexandria is leading the fight to get Democrats to be bold. And she’s able to do that, because your grassroots support keeps her in Congress fighting for all of us. When Alexandria uses her bully pulpit in Congress or in the media to push for stronger Democratic leadership, people listen. They listen because they know that it’s not just one person speaking. It’s a movement speaking. Thank you for being in the fight with us. \- Team AOC | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com

**Matt Jacobs’ Statement on Redistricting Commission’s Proposed Congressional Lines for CA-26** **Thousand Oaks, CA** – “I’m excited to welcome my friends in Simi Valley, Agoura Hills, and Calabasas into the newly redrawn 26th Congressional District. As a Thousand Oaks native, I have many fond memories of these cities, and the relationships and events they hold, that have shaped my life. With redistricting concluding, I know that the residents of Simi Valley, Agoura Hills, and Calabasas have much in common with the rest of our district. We all care deeply about our neighbors and country. We want the safest possible neighborhoods, the strongest possible private-sector economy, and exemplary schools. We deserve to be represented in Congress by a commonsense leader who puts our issues first – not an absentee career politician who votes 100% of the time with their party’s leadership. "The prospect of representing Simi Valley is especially humbling because it is home to the Ronald Reagan Presidential Library. We are running a campaign that President Reagan, the original happy warrior, would be proud of – **a campaign driven by our belief that America’s best days lie ahead**. As a former federal prosecutor, I spent my career prosecuting America’s worst enemies. Now I'm running for Congress to defend the American Dream – to ensure that America remains, as President Reagan famously said, that “shining city upon a hill.” I welcome the residents of the new 26th Congressional District to join our team, and I look forward to earning your confidence – and your vote – in the months ahead." # | | | [](https://go.dscc.org/go/5999?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FM-20211222-PattyMurray-Roe-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20211222-PattyMurray-Roe-Pros-sl1&akid=2404%2E9716520%2EVsac7H)
Team,

**[In a moment I’m going to ask if you can split a donation between my campaign and the DSCC to help Democrats defend the Senate,](https://go.dscc.org/go/5999?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FM-20211222-PattyMurray-Roe-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20211222-PattyMurray-Roe-Pros-sl1&akid=2404%2E9716520%2EVsac7H)** but first I want to step back for a moment and explain exactly what is at stake.

Right now, we are facing the most egregious attack on abortion rights in decades, even though a majority of Americans support upholding _Roe v. Wade_ and protecting access to safe and legal abortion. Our fundamental rights are in danger, and Mitch McConnell is to blame.

As Senate majority leader, Mitch McConnell made stacking the Supreme Court with far-right, anti-choice justices a top priority, and he’s already made it clear that if he gains control of the Senate in 2022, he will once again turn his attention to politicizing our judicial system.

**One of the best ways we can protect _Roe v. Wade_ is to confirm judges and justices who will affirm our most important constitutional rights. And to do that, we must defend and expand our majority in the Senate.**

**[That’s why I’m counting on this grassroots community. We’ve set an emergency goal to raise $25,000 before midnight, and we're not going to hit it without your help. Please, will you split a $5 donation between my campaign and the DSCC right now?](https://go.dscc.org/go/5999?amount=5&t=6&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FM-20211222-PattyMurray-Roe-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20211222-PattyMurray-Roe-Pros-sl1&akid=2404%2E9716520%2EVsac7H)**

Republicans are only one seat away from retaking the majority, and if they do, Mitch McConnell will stop at nothing to halt President Biden’s agenda and continue to chip away at reproductive rights.

I’m working hard in the Senate every day to get the support we need to protect the right to abortion at the federal level. But if we hand the Senate back over to Mitch McConnell in 2022, all of our work to build support for this cause is moot.

We need to do everything we can to protect the right to abortion — that means passing critical legislation AND confirming judges and justices who will uphold _Roe v. Wade_ and 50 years of precedent to protect reproductive health care. To do both, we need to keep the Senate blue.

**We have a lot of work ahead to overcome GOP attacks on our most fundamental rights and defend the Senate, so we need to make big investments _now_ — and that means we need you.****

[Our emergency deadline is tonight, but we’re still $6,913 short of our goal. Please, will you split a donation between my campaign and the DSCC immediately to defend our razor-thin Senate majority?](https://go.dscc.org/go/5999?amount=5&t=7&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FM-20211222-PattyMurray-Roe-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20211222-PattyMurray-Roe-Pros-sl1&akid=2404%2E9716520%2EVsac7H)**

Because Quaye is running against Mike Garcia, a veteran who joined the insurrection caucus and voted against certifying the 2020 election. He then voted against the January 6 committee in an attempt to help conceal Trump and his cronies’ plotting. Garcia took an oath to defend the Constitution, then tore it to shreds.Now, it’s on us to= Ever since Trump publicly attacked me for telling the truth before Congress, I have been committed to undoing the damage Trump and his cronies have inflicted on our democracy. That’s why I’m working to elect Quaye Quartey. I hope you’ll take a minute to read Quaye’s note below and then = if you can. All my best, Lt. Colonel (ret.) Alexander Vindman \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Quartey, Quaye Date: Thu, Dec 16, 2021 at 1:31 PM Subject: This district went for Biden by 10 points. To: Lt. Colonel (ret.) Alexander Vindman = Alexander, My name is Quaye Quartey. For twenty years I served on active duty as an intelligence officer in the Navy, helping take on so-called “strongmen” who abused their power and hunt down war criminals and terrorists to defend our global security and democratic values. But if we’re truly being honest, America has never truly lived up to those values here at home. And today, the cruelty of a small minority threatens everything we hold dear. Right-wing extremists are passing unjust laws that attack our right to vote. Blocking the will of the people on immigration, gun safety and climate change. All backed up by violence that takes innocent lives -- like at the January 6th insurrection at our Capitol. During his campaign, Republican Congressman Mike Garcia used his service in the Navy to win votes and then went to Washington and voted to overturn the 2020 election results in an attempt to illegally keep Donald Trump in power. He and I both took an oath to protect and defend our country. Mike Garcia betrayed his. That’s why I’m running against him for Congress and I’m asking for your help: Contribute today. With your help, I will defeat this traitor and flip this district blue. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = The good news is, this district is primed to swing blue. name: Mo Brooks
subject: Fellow Americans...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE MO BROOKS FOR SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | To keep receiving updates from my campaign, please add us to your address book.
---
[](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=O2VuetiQea1aep2z7TECUy6SeOo3fSqjV85jUBNqUYg&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trump_endorsement_email&n=1)
---

| Dear Fellow American, I am the Alabama MAGA candidate for the U.S. Senate **endorsed by President Donald Trump**. I am running to protect working American families and the essential freedoms that are the bedrock of our country. [](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7RlxQVoDhm5dicBZtQGy2o_ASGoDxQ2f1Chz-OaQSpjulQ&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trump_endorsement_email&n=2) [](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7RlxQVoDhm5dicBZtQGy2o_ASGoDxQ2f1Chz-OaQSpjulQ&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trump_endorsement_email&n=3) The cheap-labor lobby -- the "establishment" -- is spending millions to defeat me in the Republican primary. They know from my actions as a U.S. Congressman that I value the security and well-being of American families more than globally optimized return on capital. **Over the last 50 years the global population doubled leaving 3.4 billion people living on less than $5.50 per DAY. The UN estimates the world will add between 3 to 4 billion more by the turn of the century. Our big business and political elite have allowed these surging poor billions to compete for American resources.** MOST Americans have not prospered as we imported historically unprecedented numbers of people to compete for housing, government services, and jobs. MOST Americans have not prospered as our systematically unbounded trade deficit forced them to compete with global cheap-labor. In contrast, these policies have enabled the elite 1% to double their share of national income at the expense of working families. **How we deal with this driving reality will determine the political and economic future of our country.** Two competing political solutions to this reality are evolving in America; Socialism and America First conservatism. You know from history that socialist wealth redistribution always results in poverty and, most importantly, loss of liberty. Our growing **America First** political movement asserts our primary moral responsibility is to our fellow citizens and the principles of individual liberty. In his inspiring inaugural address President Donald Trump made this promise: **_"From this day forward, a new vision will govern our land._** **_From this moment on, it’s going to be America First._** **_Every decision on trade, on taxes, on immigration, on foreign affairs, will be made to benefit American workers and American families._** **_We must protect our borders from the ravages of other countries making our products, stealing our companies, and destroying our jobs. Protection will lead to great prosperity and strength._** **_I will fight for you with every breath in my body – and I will never, ever let you down._** **_America will start winning again, winning like never before._** **_We will bring back our jobs. We will bring back our borders. We will bring back our wealth. And we will bring back our dreams."_** I have lived this promise with President Trump. I was the first to stand up and fight the election misconduct that turned President Trump from office. Along with President Trump, I will continue to fight for this vision. [**With your contribution we can open the eyes of our fellow citizens and build an America First coalition that can first defeat the short-sighted globalist cheap-labor lobby of the GOP and then the lying socialists.**](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7RlxQVoDhm5dicBZtQGy2o_ASGoDxQ2f1Chz-OaQSpjulQ&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trump_endorsement_email&n=4) [****](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7RlxQVoDhm5dicBZtQGy2o_ASGoDxQ2f1Chz-OaQSpjulQ&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trump_endorsement_email&n=5) God bless you and the America we love, Mo Brooks
---

---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trump_endorsement_email&n=6).
---

Fellow Conservative,

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=663db694fa394fb78a4c92ac89b67296&_e=MJl78geHtDdkeQ8yotZZMxa3LMtYmbUtKqRBOjtjTUhiS0xkjo3h6x50dfIawv_AlRur4m0hp2rt1Xym23dMbOjwAJ5p71NPM4eaCAZxsnsttRdpc8DZeyRcksgyU_7qvvlGUB0vQFcfbRzITXGSur04XBOJ_ukZKt1Lc_AARQRIsFN91_zlnjADldFEg_6RoDeykDbQWvuqpCsi1UfiOXLM_4c2ka4PGfnDsRqfH-Jwf6UN6kEs25E6LpE5OeV0U0p3ScdzeUoo3USOVFZU9o31xKNR3SnAXO56TP-1usbnjLnL6oMCJufyZXrRz104KRxYaJKAwaONq6-jgICWRq2W1sE-sqLRjheQBjgOH5zHkLxy-XK52hYyJ1h5Ftx1AEfX0PTEMaSMc8RnFffSm1BzjRlKKPH8ys2iDgCdOsN2cP3z9lRpwqieb57WrGXCwpHvE3Rmshlk1HvlAWSGqw%3D%3D)
Senator Mark Kelly and I agree on something; we need to close the gaps in the border wall in Yuma.

**But on February 5th, May 20th, and August 4th, Mark Kelly voted against finishing the wall. He's changed his tone now that he knows my campaign is a threat to him.**

[**Ending illegal immigration should be a top priority for anyone who represents Arizona. Yet again and again, Mark Kelly has defunded the wall construction.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=663db694fa394fb78a4c92ac89b67296&_e=MJl78geHtDdkeQ8yotZZMxa3LMtYmbUtKqRBOjtjTUhiS0xkjo3h6x50dfIawv_AlRur4m0hp2rt1Xym23dMbOjwAJ5p71NPM4eaCAZxsnsttRdpc8DZeyRcksgyU_7qvvlGUB0vQFcfbRzITXGSur04XBOJ_ukZKt1Lc_AARQRIsFN91_zlnjADldFEg_6RoDeykDbQWvuqpCsi1UfiOXLM_4c2ka4PGfnDsRqfH-Jwf6UN6kEs25E6LpE5OeV0GZlxP45YwALuh8xvzpICj-54Uoq-UpyV2XGDefG9926SCK5sfR3d4zwVp29WJ1OpNmHbbWgRPdTb502L7t2_wZeNNI0kpWd4TkrjP885eQzq1-ZRfaNOBJHWmQIEr9MmeMWT10EtpZfq7rdszEZXL0dMdP3Ub4sB74FqF2Pteuj2tWP81DD_dkEq8m_XCtrRMACjcYLruWuaL_HCmoC7sQ%3D%3D)

Senator Mark Kelly has become the politician candidate Mark Kelly said he wouldn't, a liberal hack who says one thing in Arizona but does the opposite when Democrat party leaders in Washington tell him to.

If Republicans want to close the border once and for all, we need to take back the Senate. The easiest way to do that is to take back Arizona from Mark Kelly.

Arizona is the one Senate seat that will flip the Senate back to Republican control. We must win, and we need the support of every grassroots conservative to make that happen.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: More MLK. Less CRT!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Speak out against CRT! |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=be9daf612f&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

The Dems and their Socialist teachers union buddies have been pushing social guilt and segregation, under the banner of "Critical Race Theory".

_I love America! And one of the things I love about America is how we can come together to confront big problems._

CRT pushes us away from each other. That was not the vision of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. And I let 'em know about it!

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a Christian and a combat vet [running to reclaim Florida's 9th district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=776185beff&e=afa21b7626), a swing district in the Orlando area. This is a targeted district by the NRCC and we can take this district!**

I'm a substitute teacher, and I see a lot of what's happening in the schools.

And they need to answer for subjecting our kids to CRT!
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=0a14f9978d&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Last week I sent the opening salvo downrange.... I admire and respect our Polk County school administrators and teachers. But, Critical Race Theory must be erased from Polk County schools, it’s the law of the land! We must teach our children to join together. We are not oppressors and victims, we are Americans!

The Constitution of the United States clearly sets forth that we are endowed by our Creator with certain inalienable rights which among these are life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

This is the standard in which we should aspire. Integration, not separation.

Lest we forget, the ultimate goal set forth by Dr. Martin Luther King Junior, who remarked in his timeless “I HAVE A DREAM” speech from the steps of the Lincoln Memorial....

_"I have a dream that my four little children will one day live in a nation where they will not be judged by the color of their skin but by the content of their character."_

Unfortunately, Dr. King’s vision is not the philosophy at the bedrock of our school districts diversity program! All you have to do is go over to the district website and read for yourself!
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=5654a8c1fd&e=afa21b7626)

| **I am a substitute teacher. I see the good but I also see what needs to be rooted out!**

My Socialist opponent, Darren Soto, disagrees. Biden disagrees. They want Americans divided by race. I want us united by being Americans!

[I got more votes here in 2020 than any Republican ever had, because I stood up for our country. I fought for America First just like I did in the military! Will you stand alongside me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=49f95b4f86&e=afa21b7626)

Help me stand for Americans against Biden, and those who would destroy and divide our country! [Help me stop all of Biden's agenda!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=bcaa04da35&e=afa21b7626)

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=dd2c1fdd5b&e=afa21b7626)

name: Deirdre Gilbert
subject: Happy Holidays
body:
# MERRY CHRISTMAS AND HAPPY HOLIDAYS

## If you are going through a difficult time right now, let me encourage you. Are you discouraged by the things that are going on within our state right now? Well, let me give you a bit of encouragement during this season. God promised you that he will never leave you or forsake you. Remember, with God there are no hopeless situations, just people who have grown hopeless about them. The crisis that we are experiencing during this time may be a blessing in disguise; an opportunity to experience God's grace and to find out how strong HIS power really is. As I have aged, I've learned that loving myself, loving my family and friends is really all is needed. At the end of the day, we all want nothing but PEACE and SERENITY.
I know and feel your pain. I've lost loved ones. I've struggled with the issues plaguing this state, and I understand the hopelessness. While we go through this season TOGETHER, let me assure you that I am working on your behalf and that I will forever put the least of us FIRST. The real reason for the season is to love your family and enjoy them as you move along this earth. HAPPY HOLIDAYS! [WANT TO DONATE?](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bpdtjt-iduiyhurdd-r/) | 9119 Highway 6, Suite 230, Missouri City, TX 77459 www.gilbert4gov.com [Preferences](https://gilbertforgovernor.updatemyprofile.com/y-bpdtjt-E305D3C8-iduiyhurdd-y) | [Unsubscribe](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail20.com/t/y-u-bpdtjt-iduiyhurdd-j/)
---

subject: Does No Really Mean No?
body:
Here's how this monstrosity of a bill plays out... No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-trhjkytk-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trhjkytk-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trhjkytk-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Does No Really Mean No?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trhjkytk-kujkulhluu-j/)
Joe Biden and Congressional Democrats are really ticked off at Senator Joe Manchin. So is their plan to spend $5 trillion more of your hard-earned tax dollars in Biden's Bad Bill really dead? You can read about it here in this week's blog. (And Merry Christmas!) [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trhjkytk-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trhjkytk-kujkulhluu-i/)

There's a short video clip in this week's blog that I saw for the first time Saturday. YOU'VE GOT TO SEE IT! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trhjkytk-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trhjkytk-kujkulhluu-k/)

Joe Biden's weakness, projected across the globe, is making the world a more dangerous place. Bad actors, like Russia and China, are doing what bad actors do - acting badly. You can read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trhjkytk-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trhjkytk-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Democrats - Weak on Crime](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-trhjkytk-kujkulhluu-n/)
There are a lot of reasons Democrats are likely to get shellacked in the upcoming midterm elections. None is more important than how weak-on-crime they are. You can read about it in this week's blog. name: American Update
subject: Don’t miss this
body:
I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8242%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=JnUaLFOnB47ue0uNjWdK8w&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10370%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QHSXxTwEUeZBNUmDCOi2wg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10370%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QHSXxTwEUeZBNUmDCOi2wg&sysid=1) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10371%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=48t9iCv2uI4vBnJnfOrvfg&sysid=1) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

name: National Republican Polling
subject: More Holes Than Swiss Cheese
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
_Sponsored message_
I think Biden took the Southern Border plan from General Custer

| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2znrucdm8hrcn8osipore84h5mnvlf71q92g8glqo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9imepj0c1h2bs)
---

Folks,

Our Southern Border looks like Swiss cheese. That thing now has more holes than a hobo’s socks.

Meanwhile, we’ve got a president who is so unwilling to do anything about it, he almost seems to be proud of his inaction. I haven’t seen leadership this poor since General Custer.

I think I’ve figured out President Biden’s plan of attack to solve the Border Crisis: **MAKE KAMALA IGNORE IT.**

Dear Latinos for America First Family; As we come to the end of 2021, we look back at all that has happened to our country in the last twelve months and say we remain a blessed nation because of all of YOU. From our family to yours we would like to wish you all a blessed Merry Christmas and Happy New Year! As you spend much precious time with your loved ones this Holiday Season during your down time read the following update on our civil rights case sitting at the Supreme Court of the United States right now and know that we are still fighting for our country! https://uafreport.com/kari/justice-thomas-supreme-court-make-huge-move-on-election-integrity/

There’s a homeless man smoking outside the sliding doors. His hair is gross and the scabs on his face are **pussy and yellow.**

You see he’s about to ask for something, so you start walking faster

**_But so does he._**

Suddenly he’s in your face making demands.

You can tell he’s drunk.

And when you don’t give him what he wants... **he decides he’s going to _take it._**

You have two choices for what happens next:

Aside from a gun, it’s the most effective defense tool I’ve found.

Best of all...

The company who makes them is currently **handing out a small number for 50% OFF today.**

They’re doing this in response to the surge in violent crime in America right now... and due to the fact experts believe it will only increase as we get closer to the holidays.

They don’t have too many left though.

**_(next 88 people are guaranteed to get one 50% OFF last I checked)_**

And these normally sell for 60 bucks, so I know they’ll be gone fast.

[Get yours here 50% OFF, while they’re still available.](https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/click/138/56327/e2aa38addb7e38a63983ca1aa9248720edfbf9ce/b199316e5c700cd4d7466855cc5fb0b3f8aa7ef7)

name: ICYMI News
subject: Future generations are counting on your response
body:
Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdnqbfo5k4o8vv7gpe42ihlegfj7ikh1vth3cur8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9hm4or6c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s [**RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zreln2vb02uf8hi170kmj9fvu8166e5g85vkd1bg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9hm4or6c3h2bs) My name is Bill Gray, and I’m the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It’s my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. **I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.** It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation—a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. _The New York Times’_ recent “1619 Project” is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” **“Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.”** Outrageous! _The New York Times’_ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery—not freedom—is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the “1619 Project” into a feature film. **Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans—and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas.** Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our** _most urgent priority._** Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. **We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective.** Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism—our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work—especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the **RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. **As _The New York Times’_ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. ** _Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible._ And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs—which I will outline fo**r you shortly—it has been determined that to fully implement this[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4ke27kpfpjad1hdtudgcpfjvu5dv38q9vht4jdg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9hm4or6c3h2bs)** for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding—even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again—Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! **In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission.** Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty—as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can—gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people—including our nation’s youth—with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjbnobs1212suo5d7d1rj6sejvsijivnsta88b10_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9hm4or6c3h2bs)** And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: **BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans** I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong—such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. **Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people.** You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! **BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools** In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles—AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake—Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus—they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses _free of charge_ , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous—over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” This free course is called **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called _Imprimis_ , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. _Imprimis_ is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the _Wall Street Journal_ or the “fake news” _New York Times_. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set _Imprimis_ apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an _Imprimis_ subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) **BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools** In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. **Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year.** Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. **The response has been astounding.** We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education—education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zngtllodi9ksftmvnotbra1bahm5qq9tgg08m7m8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9hm4or6c3h2bs)**
With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans—views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU—your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. **So please complete the[Battle Plan Survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zu3a39ir1lc3qvoaebcpaefm77klbljd4likpaa0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9hm4or6c3h2bs) today.**
When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S**. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqae5va7vk20vkq9si0kjb2mpt9pm5cubpf6p3r0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9hm4or6c3h2bs)** to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. clean_body: Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle | Sponsored message | ---|---|--- This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s My name is Bill Gray, and I’m the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It’s my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt. It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation—a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. The New York Times’ recent “1619 Project” is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” “Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.” Outrageous! The New York Times’ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery—not freedom—is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the “1619 Project” into a feature film. Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans—and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas. Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our most urgent priority. Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective. Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism—our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work—especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. As The New York Times’ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible. And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs—which I will outline for you shortly—it has been determined that to fully implement this for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding—even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again—Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission. Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty—as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can—gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people—including our nation’s youth—with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong—such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people. You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles—AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake—Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus—they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses free of charge , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous—over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. clean_body: Hello, At midnight tonight, I’m facing my most critical deadline yet of the campaign. If we’re going to defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate, we need to hit our fundraising goal before midnight tonight – but right now, we’re still falling short. I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important: = The early polling shows this race will be close. Only 27% of Iowa voters said they want to reelect Chuck Grassley in the latest poll from the highly-respected Des Moines Register. And Grassley’s approval ratings are the lowest they’ve ever been! But Mitch McConnell, corporate PACs, and special interests like Big Pharma, Wall Street, and the NRA are already raising millions for Chuck Grassley’s campaign. Grassley has a $3 million war chest, and that’s not even counting the Super PAC money that’s going to flood the Iowa airwaves! I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so if I’m going to be able to fight back and win, I need your help now. Our most critical deadline yet is in less than 16 hours, but we’re still falling short of our goal. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Together, I know we can win this race. Thank you for whatever you’re able to afford today, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) name: Lt. Gen. Michael Flynn, U.S. Army (ret)
subject: He has my full endorsement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORNICELLI FOR CONGRESS**
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59092454:6wkce1ENE:m:1:3298722022:2630A83DEDB29E74E89CAE7088BE12F1:r "Lt. Gen. Michael Flynn") Peter: The job of defending the United States of America - from enemies both foreign and domestic - requires vigilance and bravery. It is not a 9-5 job. It requires sacrifice and dedication to the ideals that this country was founded on; it requires heroes. I am writing today about a hero that I worked with during my time defending this great nation, Captain Robert M. Cornicelli. Captain Cornicelli served under my command, and he served with distinction. **Captain Cornicelli is a true patriot running for Congress in New York, and he has my full endorsement.** **[I am asking every patriot reading this email to endorse him by donating at least $25, $50, or $100 to his campaign.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59092455:6wkce1ENE:m:1:3298722022:2630A83DEDB29E74E89CAE7088BE12F1:r "I am
asking every patriot reading this email to endorse him by donating at least $25, $50, or $100 to his campaign.")** When Captain Cornicelli returned home after his service, he found it overrun with gangs like MS-13 and awash with drugs and homelessness after decades of Democrat control. He got involved and started a non-profit organization to get these men and women - many of them veterans - off the streets. **He is a man of action in a nation that desperately needs them right now.** Long Island saw an electoral red wave in THREE off-year elections just a few weeks ago. Voters there - and across the nation - are seeing the truth about Joe Biden, and they are ready to make a change. Captain Cornicelli is the kind of leader I was proud to have serving alongside me in defense of this great nation, and I can assure you that his leadership in Congress will make every American proud. **[With your support, we can put a fighter like Captain Robert M. Cornicelli into Congress to continue his work of defending this nation, its citizens, and caring for our many veterans.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59092454:6wkce1ENE:m:1:3298722022:2630A83DEDB29E74E89CAE7088BE12F1:r "With
your support, we can put a fighter like Captain Robert M. Cornicelli into Congress to continue his work of defending this nation, its citizens, and
caring for our many veterans.")** Please, do all you can to help this dedicated patriot and my friend, Captain Robert Cornicelli, win his race for Congress. Welcome to the fight, [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59092454:6wkce1ENE:m:1:3298722022:2630A83DEDB29E74E89CAE7088BE12F1:r "Lt. Gen.
Michael Flynn, U.S. Army \(ret\)")
Lt. Gen. Michael Flynn, U.S. Army (ret)
Former National Security Advisor | | [SUPPORT ROBERT CORNICELLI](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59092454:6wkce1ENE:m:1:3298722022:2630A83DEDB29E74E89CAE7088BE12F1:r "SUPPORT ROBERT CORNICELLI")

name: Sarah
subject: Will you pledge to join President Donald J. Trump’s brand new social media site, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Hey there --
My name is Sarah. I'm reaching out on behalf of Republican HQ with one quick research question.
According to our records you are one of our most reliable Conservative supporters so I have to ask, will you pledge to join President Donald J. Trump's brand new social media site? Almost every single Conservative we asked said they would join in a heartbeat... _But I just checked our re cords -- why haven't you responded? Would you join Trump's site?_
**Please choose one of the following options in the next 25 minutes:**
__
**[Yes. I Stand With Trump ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59088946:6yoGS1EpN:m:1:3253819041:B149C2D7C50797835409F91A2C0B4F62:r)**
**[No. I Don 't Support Trump ->](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59088946:6yoGS1EpN:m:1:3253819041:B149C2D7C50797835409F91A2C0B4F62:r)**
President Trump promised some incredible things for his new site:
\-- NO blacklists
\-- NO shadow-banning
\-- NO Conservative censorship
**This site is built BY freedom-loving Patriots FOR freedom-loving Patriots.**
But taking on the Silicon Valley Liberals is a MONUMENTAL task. President Trump needs to know who really has his back, and who no longer supports him...
[**So would you join? I would really appreciate it if you answered right away.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59088946:6yoGS1EpN:m:1:3253819041:B149C2D7C50797835409F91A2C0B4F62:r)
Thanks in advance for your response.
\-- Sarah

name: Marcus Flowers
subject: I’m running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene -- will you join me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39962832/322208638/-1739877693?refcode=20211223_SA_MF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjZlMDg5Yi1mZjYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C5xn7HDHgtiWhAvheMuYAAxhVtUpCmOG95w93QT6uA4=) Friend, My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse. As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it. **Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race.** [**I’m asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton's Serve America PAC so we can stop the alt-right and Marjorie Taylor Greene:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39962833/322208639/-68044773?refcode=20211223_SA_MF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjZlMDg5Yi1mZjYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C5xn7HDHgtiWhAvheMuYAAxhVtUpCmOG95w93QT6uA4=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39962834/322208640/-1739877693?refcode=20211223_SA_MF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjZlMDg5Yi1mZjYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C5xn7HDHgtiWhAvheMuYAAxhVtUpCmOG95w93QT6uA4=)
Now, let’s not kid ourselves: the battle to unseat Greene and other Trump-Republicans like Glenn Youngkin will be difficult. She is the new darling of the Radical Right media machine -- and she’s backed by millions in special-interest money. But one thing I’ve learned throughout my career in service is that when the mission is this important, you have to stay focused. [**If you believe that Greene is unfit to serve -- chip in now to help me and Seth Moulton's Serve America PAC stop the radical right. A donation of $25, $50, or $100 will go such a long way in ensuring that we can defeat hatred in our communities.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39962835/322208641/-68044773?refcode=20211223_SA_MF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjZlMDg5Yi1mZjYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C5xn7HDHgtiWhAvheMuYAAxhVtUpCmOG95w93QT6uA4=) Together we can accomplish great things, Marcus Flowers [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39962836/322208642/-1739877693?refcode=20211223_SA_MF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjZlMDg5Yi1mZjYzLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C5xn7HDHgtiWhAvheMuYAAxhVtUpCmOG95w93QT6uA4=)

clean_body: | | | = Friend, My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse. As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it. Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race. = = Now, let’s not kid ourselves: the battle to unseat Greene and other Trump-Republicans like Glenn Youngkin will be difficult. She is the new darling of the Radical Right media machine -- and she’s backed by millions in special-interest money. But one thing I’ve learned throughout my career in service is that when the mission is this important, you have to stay focused. = Together we can accomplish great things, Marcus Flowers = | | | | ---|---|---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Serve America PAC Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States
