name: Great America Update
subject: Future generations are counting on your response
body:
Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6692%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=Wywc0MyKZ1FfnQtCICuDbg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68178%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1xEnoDPA1HkLb5zegqNY2w&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s [**RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68179%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1acW8ECZWejCs30uyV6jzA&sysid=1) My name is Bill Gray, and I’m the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It’s my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. **I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.** It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation--a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. _The New York Times’_ recent “1619 Project” is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” **“Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.”** Outrageous! _The New York Times’_ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery--not freedom--is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the “1619 Project” into a feature film. **Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans --and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas.** Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our** _most urgent priority._** Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. **We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective.** Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism--our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work--especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the **RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. **As _The New York Times’_ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. ** _Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible._ And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs--which I will outline fo**r you shortly --it has been determined that to fully implement this [RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68170%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PI%2fG1dYgIbv3Dklq9ao0eA&sysid=1)** for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding--even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again--Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! **In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission.** Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty--as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can--gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people--including our nation’s youth--with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68171%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Lhl7VANoGYRb9hBN8ci9ag&sysid=1)** And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: **BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans** I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong--such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. **Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people.** You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! **BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools** In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles--AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake--Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus--they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses _free of charge_ , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous--over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” This free course is called **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called _Imprimis_ , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. _Imprimis_ is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the _Wall Street Journal_ or the “fake news” _New York Times_. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set _Imprimis_ apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an _Imprimis_ subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) **BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools** In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. **Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year.** Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. **The response has been astounding.** We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education--education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68171%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Lhl7VANoGYRb9hBN8ci9ag&sysid=1)**
With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans--views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU--your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. **So please complete the[Battle Plan Survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68172%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=s8YmBYjCWPAEVn71WZ%2bYZw&sysid=1) today.** When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S**. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68173%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=u3P9kBjYCdqEgK8vAq%2bnWQ&sysid=1)** to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty.
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6692%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=Wywc0MyKZ1FfnQtCICuDbg&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6692%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=Wywc0MyKZ1FfnQtCICuDbg&sysid=1)

If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” “Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.” Outrageous! The New York Times’ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery--not freedom--is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the “1619 Project” into a feature film. Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans --and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas. Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our most urgent priority. Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective. Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism--our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work--especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. As The New York Times’ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible. And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs--which I will outline for you shortly --it has been determined that to fully implement this for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding--even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again--Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission. Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty--as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can--gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people--including our nation’s youth--with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong--such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people. You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles--AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake--Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus--they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses free of charge , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous--over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters The New York Times’ “1619 Project.” This free course is called “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called Imprimis , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. Imprimis is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the Wall Street Journal or the “fake news” New York Times. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set Imprimis apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an Imprimis subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year. Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. The response has been astounding. We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education--education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans--views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU--your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. So please complete the today. When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards, Bill Gray Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty. 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314

Peter,

Over the weekend, Senator Joe Manchin announced he wouldn't support President Biden's Build Back Better Agenda. Mitch McConnell and the Republican party have been obstructing progress at every turn, and Senator Manchin's decision means this critical legislation is on hold again. I’m here to say that when I am Governor, Rhode Island will still Build Back Better.

The Build Back Better bill is the investment in the American people that we need to rebuild our state and country. As Governor, I will move this agenda forward regardless of what Manchin and McConnell do.

**The plans our campaign has released for Rhode Island, which I remain committed to delivering include:**
* Universal Pre-K
* Expanding access to childcare
* Combating climate change
* Reducing prescription drug costs
* Investing in clean energy
* Lowering the cost of college
* Increasing affordable housing

Rhode Islanders can’t wait for the obstructionists in Washington to get on board. I'm ready to get to work as Governor to make the investments we need to build a stronger Rhode Island where everyone has a chance to get ahead. Are you with me?

body:
Laura needs your support right now. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39963868/322213546/823540626?refcode=ea.582e4446-0164-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.582e4446-0164-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODJlNDQ0Ni0wMTY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DE1n0nuiSI5GE7XHqpZZu_xAO3GGCXJLI7Qk6LCJUks=&emci=ae701740-0164-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=582e4446-0164-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=1049176)
Peter, I’ll get right to it. **[I need you to split a donation between our team and Kansas Governor Laura Kelly’s campaign right now — she’s up for re-election in 2022 and facing a critical end-of-year fundraising deadline, and her campaign could really use your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39963869/322213547/845091671?amount=30&refcode=ea.582e4446-0164-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.582e4446-0164-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODJlNDQ0Ni0wMTY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DE1n0nuiSI5GE7XHqpZZu_xAO3GGCXJLI7Qk6LCJUks=)** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39963870/322213548/845091671?amount=30&refcode=ea.582e4446-0164-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.582e4446-0164-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODJlNDQ0Ni0wMTY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DE1n0nuiSI5GE7XHqpZZu_xAO3GGCXJLI7Qk6LCJUks=)****[Click here to split a donation to Team Cooper and Team Kelly>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39963871/322213549/845091671?amount=30&refcode=ea.582e4446-0164-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.582e4446-0164-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ODJlNDQ0Ni0wMTY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DE1n0nuiSI5GE7XHqpZZu_xAO3GGCXJLI7Qk6LCJUks=)** Laura has served Kansans well over the last three years, helping to fund public schools and rebuild infrastructure and fighting to expand health care access. She is a champion for children, families, working folks, and small businesses. She’s the leader Kansans need. And across the country, Democratic governors are serving as the last backstops against GOP attacks on our democracy itself. We’re standing up to fight for our constituents’ rights at the ballot box and ensure their voices are heard in elections to come. But here’s the thing: Hers is one of the most challenging races Democratic governors will face in 2022. As we saw in Virginia, Republican momentum is surging. **We have to help Laura and Kansas Democrats meet this moment and secure a victory, Peter.** **[Laura has my support all the way, and I hope she can count on yours, too. clean_body: Laura needs your support right now. | Peter, I’ll get right to it. = = Laura has served Kansans well over the last three years, helping to fund public schools and rebuild infrastructure and fighting to expand health care access. She is a champion for children, families, working folks, and small businesses. She’s the leader Kansans need. And across the country, Democratic governors are serving as the last backstops against GOP attacks on our democracy itself. We’re standing up to fight for our constituents’ rights at the ballot box and ensure their voices are heard in elections to come. But here’s the thing: Hers is one of the most challenging races Democratic governors will face in 2022. As we saw in Virginia, Republican momentum is surging. We have to help Laura and Kansas Democrats meet this moment and secure a victory, Peter. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = I appreciate it, Roy = = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. name: Wes Moore
subject: Happy Holidays from the Moore family!
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39963799/322213199/-1552190924?refcode=fl_email_na_20211223happyholidays_wm_60da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTQwZWEyNC0wMTY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vtbVSwy8btlZzj7Sij3FdF2nYLZz6JKLEsoM3b4alvE=)
---
Friend, If you’re like me, you’re probably getting excited to spend some time enjoying the holidays with family or friends. I know I’ve been busy wrapping gifts for my kids and planning visits with Mama Win and other relatives in between my campaign responsibilities. Before we take time to travel, relax, celebrate, cook, exchange gifts, volunteer, or whatever you may be planning in the days ahead, I wanted to reach out personally to say **thank you.** This year hasn’t been easy, but together, we’ve built the foundation for a movement to make Maryland a state where every single person and family can thrive. Since we launched this campaign back in June, I’ve been deeply humbled and honored by the support you’ve shown me, whether by turning out to one of our events, pitching in a grassroots donation, signing up to volunteer, or simply spreading the word about our campaign to friends, family, and neighbors in your community. When we return from the holidays, Aruna and I are ready to get back to work in January and do what it takes to make this a winning campaign that creates historical, transformational change for the people of Maryland. But for now, I’d like to wish you a very healthy and happy holiday, from my family to yours. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39963800/322213200/-1552190924?refcode=fl_email_na_20211223happyholidays_wm_60da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTQwZWEyNC0wMTY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vtbVSwy8btlZzj7Sij3FdF2nYLZz6JKLEsoM3b4alvE=)

Wes

body:
We must take this opportunity...
| | |
---
**Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) recently announced he's running for reelection and was endorsed by Donald Trump at a rally here in Iowa. I fully intend to defeat him and flip Iowa blue, Peter – but I need you with me. Here's the latest:**
**First** , the momentum is on _our_ side. Nearly two-thirds of Iowa voters _don't_ want to reelect Sen. Grassley, which means we have a unique opportunity and advantage that we must harness to flip this Senate seat blue.
**But** defeating Sen. Grassley – in what the Des Moines Register is calling a "marquee matchup" – will come down to resources, and the campaign arm of the Senate Republicans has already hauled in $76 million this year. They are well equipped to protect vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley and attack competitive challengers like me.
**So right now,** ahead of our last FEC reporting deadline of the year, we still need to raise $15,000 before midnight to keep pace with our fundraising. This is a grassroots campaign, and hitting these goals and building up resources is how we will flip Iowa blue.

clean_body: We must take this opportunity... | | | Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) recently announced he's running for reelection and was endorsed by Donald Trump at a rally here in Iowa. I fully intend to defeat him and flip Iowa blue, Peter – but I need you with me. Here's the latest: First , the momentum is on our side. Nearly two-thirds of Iowa voters don't want to reelect Sen. Grassley, which means we have a unique opportunity and advantage that we must harness to flip this Senate seat blue. But defeating Sen. Grassley – in what the Des Moines Register is calling a "marquee matchup" – will come down to resources, and the campaign arm of the Senate Republicans has already hauled in $76 million this year. They are well equipped to protect vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley and attack competitive challengers like me. So right now, ahead of our last FEC reporting deadline of the year, we still need to raise $15,000 before midnight to keep pace with our fundraising. This is a grassroots campaign, and hitting these goals and building up resources is how we will flip Iowa blue. = | | = I fully intend to win this race, and if we defeat Sen. Grassley and flip Iowa blue, then Democrats are virtually guaranteed to hold the Senate majority. So please, can I count on you to help me hit this end-of-year grassroots fundraising goal? = Thanks for all you do. – Abby | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click #!. To unsubscribe from this email list, please click . Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa PO Box 1843 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States |

name: Eddie Geller
subject: Bringing down the temperature (and I don't just mean that it's much too warm for December!)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EDDIE GELLER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39965038/322219013/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211223polarizeRS_EG_nonope_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTIwMmNmNC0wMjY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8sso3OyfoYAkwRISWUzUA6J-E-PHMuO8RoZ3Fn0pFm0=)
---
Hey, friends. We’re getting closer and closer to 2022, and I’m taking stock. And the more I think about it, the more it seems like one of the biggest problems facing us is political polarization.
From the very beginning, this campaign has sought to address that crisis by doing things differently, because we really are all stranded together on this earth with rising fascism and a climate crisis rapidly engulfing us. But the more polarized we become, the harder it gets to solve these problems.
[**Will you chip in a buck or two to help us find a way to talk to one another again so that we can actually get things done for Floridians?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39965041/322219016/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211223polarizeRS_EG_nonope_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTIwMmNmNC0wMjY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8sso3OyfoYAkwRISWUzUA6J-E-PHMuO8RoZ3Fn0pFm0=)
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39965044/322219046/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211223polarizeRS_EG_nonope_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTIwMmNmNC0wMjY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8sso3OyfoYAkwRISWUzUA6J-E-PHMuO8RoZ3Fn0pFm0=)
---
As you’ve probably noticed, this campaign may sound a little different. I may not use every catchphrase you wanna hear, and I may come up with a few of my own! That’s by design, so that we can reach people who’ve never felt included in politics, provide a little levity, and bring people together for a common cause in the process.**Because this campaign is not about me—it is truly about us.**
When I say “us” I don’t just mean progressive Democrats. I don’t just mean Democrats. The reality is that, in order to enact progress we need to be challenged, regularly and without vitriol or nastiness. I mean folks who want a better life and who—whether they realize it or not—will choose love and solidarity over division and hatred.**I’m in this thing because I really do believe that most people will choose love and solidarity.** Otherwise, what would be the point?
But let’s be absolutely clear about one thing: **That doesn’t mean we’re not going to hold bad actors and supporters of an armed insurrection accountable.** It just means, at the end of the day, we have to run a campaign that’s in tune with what people actually need from Washington: affordable healthcare, climate action, protecting people from COVID-19, saving our democracy, and a whole lot more.
[**So, can you give $5, $10, or $50, if you’re ready and able, to help send me to Congress and _actually get stuff done?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39965047/322219049/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211223polarizeRS_EG_nonope_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTIwMmNmNC0wMjY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8sso3OyfoYAkwRISWUzUA6J-E-PHMuO8RoZ3Fn0pFm0=)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | | = Hey, friends. We’re getting closer and closer to 2022, and I’m taking stock. And the more I think about it, the more it seems like one of the biggest problems facing us is political polarization. From the very beginning, this campaign has sought to address that crisis by doing things differently, because we really are all stranded together on this earth with rising fascism and a climate crisis rapidly engulfing us. But the more polarized we become, the harder it gets to solve these problems. = = As you’ve probably noticed, this campaign may sound a little different. I may not use every catchphrase you wanna hear, and I may come up with a few of my own! That’s by design, so that we can reach people who’ve never felt included in politics, provide a little levity, and bring people together for a common cause in the process.Because this campaign is not about me—it is truly about us. When I say “us” I don’t just mean progressive Democrats. I don’t just mean Democrats. The reality is that, in order to enact progress we need to be challenged, regularly and without vitriol or nastiness. I mean folks who want a better life and who—whether they realize it or not—will choose love and solidarity over division and hatred.I’m in this thing because I really do believe that most people will choose love and solidarity. Otherwise, what would be the point? But let’s be absolutely clear about one thing: That doesn’t mean we’re not going to hold bad actors and supporters of an armed insurrection accountable. It just means, at the end of the day, we have to run a campaign that’s in tune with what people actually need from Washington: affordable healthcare, climate action, protecting people from COVID-19, saving our democracy, and a whole lot more. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = — Eddie P.S. is also an issue we should be concerned about but that’s another email. | Eddie Geller is an activist, millennial, and former comedian running to bring real representation to the people of Florida's 15th District, and flip a longtime Republican seat in the process. As your Congressman, he’ll fight for the issues that matter most to Floridians: good paying jobs, affordable health care, fighting the climate crisis, and defending our democracy. = | = | PAID FOR BY EDDIE GELLER FOR CONGRESS Eddie Geller for Congress P.O. Mark Holland is running for US Senate because Kansas and America deserve a strong, courageous leader who leads with faith, speaks the truth, and is willing to stand up to extremists across the political spectrum. | I want to wish you all a very happy holiday season, and blessings and peace into the New Year.

This year was full of challenges for folks all over the country. As we gather with our loved ones during this time, I cannot help but reflect on how hopeful this year has also been.

Just over two months ago, I announced my bid for the Senate in Kansas. My dream is to bring my experience as mayor and common-sense policy making to the Senate, and to improve upon people’s lives in a tangible way – through innovation, economic development and supporting healthy communities.

I could not be more grateful to the incredible staff and volunteers that make my campaign possible. And of course, to all of you, who are invested in a new vision for Kansas. Thank you for believing in the power of people.

Happy holidays to you and yours,

Rev. Mark Holland

**Meet Mark:** Reverend Mark Holland is a fourth generation Kansan and a third generation United Methodist Pastor. He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. Mark is the co-founder and executive director of Mainstream UMC, a global advocacy organization dedicated to greater inclusion in the church. He has served the Church in Kansas for over 25 years, most recently as the Senior Pastor of Trinity Community Church in Kansas City, Kansas for 19 years.

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: setbacks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Hi there, Sooner or later, each and every one of us will deal with setbacks of one kind or another. Some may be small; some may upend your entire life. In the decade since I survived being shot while meeting with my constituents in Tucson, Arizona, I’ve learned two big things about setbacks. The first is that it isn’t the setback that defines us; it’s how we respond. The second is that progress is rarely – if ever – linear. That second lesson is what I want to talk to you about. I’m writing to ask for your support to help reelect my friend Senator Maggie Hassan in New Hampshire. Over the years, Maggie has proven herself to be a fighter for commonsense gun safety legislation that will save lives in New Hampshire and nationwide. But our progress on this issue and so many others is on the line in 2022. It can be tough to weather attack ads and tough polling. It can be tough to face partisan politics and hold on to the will to find common ground and get things done. But here’s the thing I admire about Maggie: no matter the setbacks, she’s laser-focused on fighting for hard-working Americans, and she’s a committed public servant in the fight to save lives from gun violence. Maggie’s reelection is going to be tough, and the polls do indeed show a close race. **[With 2022 projected to be challenging for Democrats, I’m asking you to please recommit to moving forward through our setbacks by rushing $5 or more to Maggie’s reelection. She is facing a big public deadline at the end of the month, and your urgent support is needed before she closes the books on 2021.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39965698/322221039/-913685435?refcode=e20211223_giffords&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjRmMGM4Ni0wMzY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EWBvMsolkhmUq3ZPhPl7GvtgBV5U2ffiUPwpzP8fghQ=)** I happen to know that supporters like you are the lifeblood of Maggie’s campaign, and I know I speak for her when I tell you that she is so grateful for your support. My very best,
Gabby

subject: Peace and joy 🎁⭐️
body:
Sending you our love, friends.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39966989/322227103/-1288899752?refcode=211223_CLTV_holidaycard_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmQ3NWJiMi0wNzY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sZrJs0GhI4xR60Fnv-B--VXy71ZuQllDdRTWBkRyxUE=)

| I’ve been blown away by the support from so many of you. I love this time of year, team. It’s all about spending time with loved ones, spreading holiday cheer, and reflecting on the year past while looking forward to the future. (Not to mention filled with lots of delicious food and drink. This year, I’m pretty excited for some chocolate chip cookies.) But food aside, this time of year always makes me think about what I’m grateful for, and this year, it’s my family, my health, and this community. I’m serious, I’ve been blown away by the support from so many of you. People from across the state (and even some outside of PA) have stepped up to be a part of this effort, and I can’t put into words how much all of you mean to me. **So from the bottom of my heart: Thank you for everything.** From my family to yours, happy holidays, and here’s to a wonderful 2021. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39967467/322231140/1205227003?refcode=em_20211223-ty-JD-happyholidays-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTQyY2Y2NC0wOTY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ddt2Pv7zWRdaIJczaOVlyPJO1rH62gHYvqs18S-Inls=) Cheers, Jerry

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elaine for Congress
body:
---
| | Happy Holidays, folks! I hope you’re in the holiday spirit and getting ready to celebrate with family and friends. I won’t take up too much of your time -- I just wanted to reach out and say thank you for all of your support. I’m running in a tough battleground race, but all of your help makes it look easy. I hope you have a great holiday weekend -- sending love from my family to yours. Best,
Elaine

name: Hattie Miller
subject: This will be tough. That's why I'm counting on your support today.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#

Good morning folks, Our final end-of-year fundraising deadline before the primary is almost here. So today, we’re launching an ambitious goal for this team. One that’ll be tough to hit, but if we can do it, then we’ll send a message that Dan Patrick and the Republican establishment cannot miss. **We want to bring in 5,000 individual donations before the end of the year. Can you help us get us started?** [**Please make a donation toward our official end-of-year deadline goal. Folks, I cannot overstate how important small-dollar donations are for our campaign because Mike has promised that he will not take a single penny from corporate PACs — _not now, not ever._
Our opponent has spent years building a war chest full of corporate PAC money. He’s taken money from every corporate interest under the sun.
But here’s our plan to fight back against his special interest money:**_You._**
That’s why we’ve set this goal. It’s not just about how much we raise, but also how many people are chipping in — stepping up to say they’re with us in the fight to take back our beloved Texas.
[**Will you step up today? Please contribute any amount you’re comfortable with toward our end-of-year deadline. This is our most important goal to date, and Mike is counting on all of us to help reach it.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39967858/322232603/1189302780?refcode=AU_MC_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20211223_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjU2MzkxNS0wYTY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NysxUzexz0RBNaLl-U_OyrPNIvDEhvTLGs2yrUsrIlI=)

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Reminder: I stand with you and your Constitutional rights...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Diehl for Massachusetts
body:
Please support my campaign against policies that are taking away your freedoms!
| | | |
---
---
---
|
---
|
---
Dear Friend,
With all of the announcements of new mandates being made this week at the local, state and national levels, it is very frustrating to see people's rights being taken away step by step.
I want you to know where I stand. I stand with you and your rights.
Forced vaccinations by hospitals have led to hundreds of nurses and medical professionals being laid off and creating staff shortages, which in turn are causing delays in surgeries and care. While the Governor is trying to stem the demand in our emergency rooms with National Guard members, I believe that healthcare providers and networks should rescind their mandates and let their valuable front-line workers make their own healthcare decisions, and allow for continual testing for those who feel a vaccine is not appropriate for them based on their medical history.
Meanwhile, I strongly oppose Boston Mayor Michelle Wu's decision to implement expanded mandates for vaccination and proof of vaccination in the City of Boston. These mandates are clear violations of the civil rights of anyone who lives in, works in, or travels to the city, and will make it even more difficult for Boston's economy to recover from the pandemic. What's more, it's unfair to ask members of law enforcement and small business owners to enforce these mandates against members of the public. I am proud to stand alongside first responders who believe these mandates are unfair and inappropriate and who don't want to be in the position of enforcing them.
I look at all mandates critically and through the same lens of whether they are consistent with the Constitution; many are not. While I openly acknowledge and share concern over rising case counts in Massachusetts, infringing on citizens' right to life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness is never an acceptable solution.
When I become Governor, one of my first official acts will be to take an oath to support the state and federal Constitutions. That means I will honor and defend the rights and freedom our founding documents guaranteed to the people. There is no greater responsibility for a public servant. I'll uphold that solemn oath each and every day, and with everything I do, as I work to make Massachusetts a better place to live.
You can count on it.
---
---
|
---
---
I'm running for Governor because I'm on your side. I'm advocating for policies to help people live a better life here in Massachusetts.
In short, I'm fighting for what's right for our state. But, I can't do it alone. I need your help.
Will you please help me as I work to get the message out and stand up against mandates that take away your rights? If you are able to, please consider making a donation today:

Thanks, as always, for your support!

name: Dick Durbin
subject: The fight for Build Back Better isn’t over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Add your name to support relief for working families
#
Peter,
I know you’ve seen a lot of news this week about Build Back Better and I want to update you on where I stand: this fight isn’t over.
I’m not giving up on relief for working families, a pathway to citizenship for immigrants, and much-needed action to combat the climate crisis.
**[Build Back Better is essential legislation that will support working families and build a stronger, fairer economy. Add your name right now and tell Congress to get it done.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39969079/322239306/443844269?ms=dd_em_211223_1&refcode=dd_em_211223_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWNhMmQyNC0wZTY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=di-tky7T-LnymGKUvdyeIfD0zg8nhALhemRRNkJEBDo=&emci=1728c123-0364-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=01ca2d24-0e64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=2727974)**
I was in the Senate when Congress passed the Affordable Care Act and I know how many months of negotiations it took to get it over the goal line. I was also there when it seemed certain Mitch McConnell and his allies would repeal the ACA – but the ACA remains the law of the land to this day.
Build Back Better contains important relief for Americans who are struggling, including giving diabetic patients access to affordable insulin, making prescription drugs more affordable, and giving families access to affordable, quality child care.
These things are worth fighting for and we won’t give up.
**[Add your name to call on my Senate colleagues to pass Build Back Better now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39969080/322239307/443844269?ms=dd_em_211223_1&refcode=dd_em_211223_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWNhMmQyNC0wZTY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=di-tky7T-LnymGKUvdyeIfD0zg8nhALhemRRNkJEBDo=&emci=1728c123-0364-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=01ca2d24-0e64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=2727974)**
Thank you,
Dick Durbin

**[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39969081/322239308/443844269?ms=dd_em_211223_1&refcode=dd_em_211223_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWNhMmQyNC0wZTY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=di-tky7T-LnymGKUvdyeIfD0zg8nhALhemRRNkJEBDo=&emci=1728c123-0364-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=01ca2d24-0e64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=2727974)**

name: david@tishjames.com
subject: URGENT: We only have a handful of hours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | |
---
**Letitia is counting on you, Peter.**

We only have a handful of hours left before our critical fundraising deadline at midnight. The money we raise tonight will allow us to throw even more resources behind Letitia’s reelection bid for attorney general,******but we’re still $449 short of our goal to raise $10,000****.**

name: Sen. Raphael Warnock
subject: I'm asking you, here and now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
I’m going to try and be as civil as I can about this.
#
My team just let me know that we're falling incredibly short of our critical midnight fundraising goal. If you have a second, I'd like to tell you why it's so essential to our campaign – and our progressive future – that we reach this goal and raise what we need now.
The truth is that the odds are against us. With the Senate split 50-50, the GOP needs to flip just one seat to retake control for Mitch McConnell, and experts report that I'm the most vulnerable Senate Democrat in the entire country. Republicans are coming after me as their top target for defeat – and they've already started launching attack ads to try and crush our people-powered movement.
I won't let them – but I need your help. I'm not taking a cent of corporate PAC money – and unlike GOP megadonors, I don't have millions to sink into my campaign. I've got this grassroots team – and right now, the only way I can fight back against these attacks and defend my seat is with your urgent support. That means hitting critical fundraising goals like this one.
**So I'll be direct: I'm asking you to make a contribution to my campaign and Jacky Rosen – here and now – toward our midnight fundraising goal before it's too late. This will be one of the most competitive Senate races of the cycle, and we simply can't afford to fall behind before we even get started.**
**[Please, I need folks like you by my side: Will you give $5 or more right now – as much as you can spare before our crucial midnight deadline – to my campaign and Jacky Rosen to keep Georgia blue and defend our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39969765/322243913/-902763010?refcode=jr_em_nd_211223_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjFiYjhjMC0xMTY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_lHIhjGOEslJ3fw38u9NxSibQqmHeGYIPp_RugXppI8=)**
This team has helped us beat the odds before, and I know we can do it again. Thanks so much for fighting alongside me.
Sen. Raphael Warnock

**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39969770/322243923/-902763010?refcode=jr_em_nd_211223_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjFiYjhjMC0xMTY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_lHIhjGOEslJ3fw38u9NxSibQqmHeGYIPp_RugXppI8=)**

Fellow Conservative, did you see what my former Trump Impeachment Manager opponent said about our race?

Demings is a do-nothing Democrat with a laughable record. If we let up and the Democrats win in Florida, they will KEEP control of the Senate and continue to force their dangerous agenda through Congress.

name: Donna Imam
subject: BREAKING: Biden extends pause on student loan repayment
body:
We must push for full student loan forgiveness and tuition-free community college. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39970250/322246012/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmVkYmY2My0xMjY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ahNv83P6OlIVMbSqz9mCmcU-L7QdUPW00S2TZN_2sQ0=)
Huge news, friend.

**President Biden just extended the pause on student loan repayment through May 1st, 2022.**

This is meaningful relief for borrowers across the country, but it's not enough. As Democrats prepare to renegotiate Build Back Better, they must include tuition-free community college.

In recent polling, about two-thirds of Americans support this. As someone who used to run a non-profit focused on education and career retraining, I know firsthand the benefit a technical education can provide everyone from a recent high school graduate to someone seeking a career change.

Our country needs leaders with expertise in science and technology to advance our country into the future. That's a big reason why I'm running for Congress in Texas' new 37th Congressional District, and this is a fight we cannot give up on trying to achieve:

**[Will you add your name to my petition calling for student loan forgiveness and tuition-free community college? Democrats must pass major legislative priorities that are popular with the American people if we're going to keep our majorities intact.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39970251/322246013/-2023876938?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmVkYmY2My0xMjY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ahNv83P6OlIVMbSqz9mCmcU-L7QdUPW00S2TZN_2sQ0=&emci=2aedbf63-1264-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=32edbf63-1264-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=7168977)**

Canceling student loans is not enough. We must reduce the cost of education for the next generation. Investing in our schools and kids is the very best investment we can make as a country for our next generation.

**[It’s time to permanently forgive student loans and make community college tuition-free. Add your name to my petition today>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39970253/322246015/-2023876938?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmVkYmY2My0xMjY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ahNv83P6OlIVMbSqz9mCmcU-L7QdUPW00S2TZN_2sQ0=&emci=2aedbf63-1264-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=32edbf63-1264-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=7168977)**

Donna

name: Val Demings
subject: this is my story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I'm in this race for U.S. Senate to expand my unlikely story
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39970593/322247197/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1986-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGNmMTA3Ny0xMjY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m-EMnBzzELERQcdcJ_g8BZgptY_uis_a539nJojr1ZI=) Friend, I'm in this race for U.S. Senate to expand my unlikely story of opportunity to more Americans. You see, I grew up the daughter of a maid and a janitor – hard-working parents who taught me to "never tire of doing good." So I took their message to heart: It wasn't easy, but I became the first in my family to graduate college, embarking on what would become a long career of public service. After serving as a social worker, I joined the police department where I served for 27 years and made history when I became Orlando's first Black female chief of Police in 2007. Today, I proudly represent Florida's 10th Congressional District as only the third Democrat to hold that position. I took an oath to always fight for what is right – and that's exactly what I did when I held Donald Trump accountable for violating his _own_ oath of office. So I will make you the same promise I made to my family: I will continue working to do good at every chance I get. **With your help, I will defeat Marco Rubio. With your help, I will ensure the Senate reflects the diversity that makes our country strong – and ensure that every voice can be heard.** **[We've set a goal to raise $20,000 today to power my campaign, and I can't reach it without you, friend. Can you make a $5 donation today to help this little Black girl from the South make history again and win better, stronger leadership for the people of Florida?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39970594/322247198/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1986-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGNmMTA3Ny0xMjY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m-EMnBzzELERQcdcJ_g8BZgptY_uis_a539nJojr1ZI=)** Thanks so much for supporting this historic campaign, it's an honor to share this journey with you.

Val Demings

Today, I proudly represent Florida's 10th Congressional District as only the third Democrat to hold that position. I took an oath to always fight for what is right – and that's exactly what I did when I held Donald Trump accountable for violating his own oath of office. So I will make you the same promise I made to my family: I will continue working to do good at every chance I get. With your help, I will defeat Marco Rubio. With your help, I will ensure the Senate reflects the diversity that makes our country strong – and ensure that every voice can be heard. = Thanks so much for supporting this historic campaign, it's an honor to share this journey with you. Val Demings | | = | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? = If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic.

name: Sheriff Joe Lombardo
subject: Before Christmas…
body:
I wanted to send one last message before we all spend some time with family this Christmas.
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hzvuDh3H8W_sH5Ij2jSyJNHZ_FIIEJMgpgxZUpN0A_MocLLk6Z2GyfXU6ks3EXpmTObkuwwpEfVknnB1vFiFB4sEGaM65rIIPvmSIQFIs9uDXGHlFvRXb4kXSd2hKYtscbluwCICWtGInT-2RupjNAids9N9zyF_zunTJfLBa_trnncS0lVeV73JeYgkFVFPN3gBJG3w9Js=&c=We_R5jrmeH85EBfSjanQxTACzKARp5ajT4Q2PRjUHKkWLrU5oeabMg==&ch=GbD3mEPFCceMJ_pQcQ5uWcJkYkyuHS995a07oCSm58xYRkM2ajI-AQ==)

| Peter,
I wanted to send one last message before we all spend some time with family this Christmas.
We've proven a lot already since we launched our grassroots campaign here in Nevada - that we're a frontrunner in this race, that folks are ready to keep our state safe, and that we're tired of Steve Sisolak's lack of leadership, horrible communication, and "my way or the highway" approach.
Your support has helped us send this message - but in one of the most competitive races in the entire country, we'll need to keep it up in the months ahead.
[Can I personally count on you to help reinforce our mission before we take some time off for Christmas?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hzvuDh3H8W_sH5Ij2jSyJNHZ_FIIEJMgpgxZUpN0A_MocLLk6Z2GyfXU6ks3EXpmTObkuwwpEfVknnB1vFiFB4sEGaM65rIIPvmSIQFIs9uDXGHlFvRXb4kXSd2hKYtscbluwCICWtGInT-2RupjNAids9N9zyF_zunTJfLBa_trnncS0lVeV73JeYgkFVFPN3gBJG3w9Js=&c=We_R5jrmeH85EBfSjanQxTACzKARp5ajT4Q2PRjUHKkWLrU5oeabMg==&ch=GbD3mEPFCceMJ_pQcQ5uWcJkYkyuHS995a07oCSm58xYRkM2ajI-AQ==)
---
| | | [JOIN ME: LET'S KEEP NV SAFE!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hzvuDh3H8W_sH5Ij2jSyJNHZ_FIIEJMgpgxZUpN0A_MocLLk6Z2GyfXU6ks3EXpmTObkuwwpEfVknnB1vFiFB4sEGaM65rIIPvmSIQFIs9uDXGHlFvRXb4kXSd2hKYtscbluwCICWtGInT-2RupjNAids9N9zyF_zunTJfLBa_trnncS0lVeV73JeYgkFVFPN3gBJG3w9Js=&c=We_R5jrmeH85EBfSjanQxTACzKARp5ajT4Q2PRjUHKkWLrU5oeabMg==&ch=GbD3mEPFCceMJ_pQcQ5uWcJkYkyuHS995a07oCSm58xYRkM2ajI-AQ==)
---
| Take it from someone who's been on the force for over 30 years - it takes a team to succeed in major operations.
So with a task ahead of us that's as big as keeping all of Nevada safe from the upside-down policies of Steve Sisolak and the chaos of One-Party Democrat rule, [I hope you'll make sure our team is as strong as ever heading into the holiday and a big election year.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hzvuDh3H8W_sH5Ij2jSyJNHZ_FIIEJMgpgxZUpN0A_MocLLk6Z2GyfXU6ks3EXpmTObkuwwpEfVknnB1vFiFB4sEGaM65rIIPvmSIQFIs9uDXGHlFvRXb4kXSd2hKYtscbluwCICWtGInT-2RupjNAids9N9zyF_zunTJfLBa_trnncS0lVeV73JeYgkFVFPN3gBJG3w9Js=&c=We_R5jrmeH85EBfSjanQxTACzKARp5ajT4Q2PRjUHKkWLrU5oeabMg==&ch=GbD3mEPFCceMJ_pQcQ5uWcJkYkyuHS995a07oCSm58xYRkM2ajI-AQ==)
Thank you in advance for your support, and Merry Christmas!
---
| | | [RUSH IN BEFORE CHRISTMAS!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hzvuDh3H8W_sH5Ij2jSyJNHZ_FIIEJMgpgxZUpN0A_MocLLk6Z2GyfXU6ks3EXpmTObkuwwpEfVknnB1vFiFB4sEGaM65rIIPvmSIQFIs9uDXGHlFvRXb4kXSd2hKYtscbluwCICWtGInT-2RupjNAids9N9zyF_zunTJfLBa_trnncS0lVeV73JeYgkFVFPN3gBJG3w9Js=&c=We_R5jrmeH85EBfSjanQxTACzKARp5ajT4Q2PRjUHKkWLrU5oeabMg==&ch=GbD3mEPFCceMJ_pQcQ5uWcJkYkyuHS995a07oCSm58xYRkM2ajI-AQ==)

name: Josh Harder
subject: more news to share...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/WIvxKXVqHkOC5guqiXdK-DWVueo3mAWY4gHw1rgpN_s=/wZ34cDWzS153ohZcvmggNKQflzMZhhAWcjCS2B-WOKE=?refcode=E13141-20211222-Redistricting-header-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) | Peter, Wanted to share an important update on our race. Redistricting maps are now 100% final, and to be honest, the results are mixed for our race. The commission decided to split CA-10 into 3 parts, so Pam and I had to make a tough decision about where to run. Happy to share I've decided to run in the newly formed CA-13 which spans from San Joaquin County all the way down to Fresno. It remains a heavily agricultural district with a large Latino population - the exact kind of district Democrats must win to hold the majority. I'm excited because it allows me to keep representing my hometown of Turlock, but I'm very disappointed we are losing most of Modesto, our largest city. **This seat remains a top competitive Frontline seat. It 's a district Governor Newsom only won by 4 points and about 2/3 of the voters are brand new for me.** We have ALOT of work to do. We need to turbo charge our latino organizing program, get up on TV early to introduce myself, and start logging a lot of hours in the car (the district is about 3x the size of my current one!). [**If we 're going to win this toss-up seat and do our part to keep the House blue, then I'm going to need your support. Can you please rush in a donation today to help us reach thousands of new voters who are going to need an introduction?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/WIvxKXVqHkOC5guqiXdK-DWVueo3mAWY4gHw1rgpN_s=/wZ34cDWzS153ohZcvmggNKQflzMZhhAWcjCS2B-WOKE=?refcode=E13141-20211222-Redistricting-SL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$10](https://act.myngp.com/el/WIvxKXVqHkOC5guqiXdK-DWVueo3mAWY4gHw1rgpN_s=/wZ34cDWzS153ohZcvmggNKQflzMZhhAWcjCS2B-WOKE=?express_lane=true&refcode=E13141-20211222-Redistricting-EL-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10)**

clean_body: | | Peter, Wanted to share an important update on our race. Redistricting maps are now 100% final, and to be honest, the results are mixed for our race. The commission decided to split CA-10 into 3 parts, so Pam and I had to make a tough decision about where to run. Happy to share I've decided to run in the newly formed CA-13 which spans from San Joaquin County all the way down to Fresno. It remains a heavily agricultural district with a large Latino population - the exact kind of district Democrats must win to hold the majority. I'm excited because it allows me to keep representing my hometown of Turlock, but I'm very disappointed we are losing most of Modesto, our largest city. This seat remains a top competitive Frontline seat. It 's a district Governor Newsom only won by 4 points and about 2/3 of the voters are brand new for me. We have ALOT of work to do. We need to turbo charge our latino organizing program, get up on TV early to introduce myself, and start logging a lot of hours in the car (the district is about 3x the size of my current one!). If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thanks for all your support getting us here, now let's get to work! - Josh = =

| Dear Peter,

We're wishing you and your loved ones a Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays!

I couldn't be more grateful for my loving family, an exceptional campaign team that works tirelessly so I can continue to serve, and a coalition of supporters across Virginia and the country.

I'm so proud of the results we've delivered for our community this year - from expanding rural broadband to passing the infrastructure package - and I can't wait to see what kind of progress next year will hold.

Have a wonderful, safe holiday!

\- Abigail, Adam, Claire, Charlotte, and Catherine

Through 2021’s ups and downs, your dedication and perseverance has helped make progress in states across the country. The Fair Fight team could not be more proud of the work that you’ve done. Whether you spent your time in 2021 knocking on doors on behalf of pro-democracy candidates, calling lawmakers to stop anti-voter legislation, contributing to organizations fighting for access to the ballot, or more, you proved that your voice and activism can yield positive results. **Take a look back at what you’ve helped accomplish this year alone!
