clean_body: With your work, you've helped protect the freedom to vote for millions of Americans Fair Fight | | | Dear Friend, Over the past few weeks, we've highlighted a few of the ways volunteers, donors, and supporters like YOU have made a difference for our democracy with your work. Through 2021’s ups and downs, your dedication and perseverance has helped make progress in states across the country. The Fair Fight team could not be more proud of the work that you’ve done. Whether you spent your time in 2021 knocking on doors on behalf of pro-democracy candidates, calling lawmakers to stop anti-voter legislation, contributing to organizations fighting for access to the ballot, or more, you proved that your voice and activism can yield positive results. Take a look back at what you’ve helped accomplish this year alone! With your work... We have helped stop, change, or stall dozens of anti-voter bills introduced across the country this year. , , We have told the stories of veterans harmed by anti-voter efforts. Georgians sent Jon Ossoff and Raphael Warnock to the Senate—and that’s already paying off back home. , , Pro-democracy judges have been appointed to our Courts. , , You’ve helped fund a pro democracy movement! , , Voting, volunteering, and calling your lawmakers, several states passed bills that will protect and expand our freedom to vote. , , And here are some of the reasons you gave for joining the movement to protect voting rights: , , ! With your work , you've helped protect the freedom to vote for millions of Americans. So take some time to slow down and reflect on our victories this holiday season. Now is the time for some well-deserved rest; the fight continues in 2022. Thank you and happy holidays. — Team Fair Fight | ---|---|--- | 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-311 Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2021 Fair Fight PAC - All rights reserved. Contributions to Fair Fight PAC are not tax-deductible. | | Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www.fairfight.com. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: We put the pressure on Joe Manchin on Tuesday and CNN took notice:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
We refused to be silent in the face of Joe Manchin’s betrayal of working families, and our campaign is gaining momentum because of it
#

Folks, I wanted to show you this.
We put the pressure on Joe Manchin on Tuesday and CNN took notice:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39971528/322251907/-360183459?refcode2=8e090c25-1764-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&refcode=em211223-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTA5MGMyNS0xNzY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_knHB0CLsZhwsL7Wyxm71Ld3FswJTBuJICVidY2yOEE=)
This is the power of working people standing together.
We refused to be silent in the face of Joe Manchin’s betrayal of working families, and our campaign is gaining momentum because of it.
With our FEC deadline coming up on 12/31, it’s important for us to keep this momentum going, so I have to ask:
[Could you make a $3 contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate today? Your support goes directly towards building our winning coalition of working folks all across Pennsylvania.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39971529/322251908/-360183459?refcode2=8e090c25-1764-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&refcode=em211223-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTA5MGMyNS0xNzY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_knHB0CLsZhwsL7Wyxm71Ld3FswJTBuJICVidY2yOEE=)
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39971530/322251909/-360183459?refcode2=8e090c25-1764-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&refcode=em211223-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTA5MGMyNS0xNzY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_knHB0CLsZhwsL7Wyxm71Ld3FswJTBuJICVidY2yOEE=)**
Thanks,
Malcolm
—Begin Forwarded Message—
Folks,
It’s absurd to me that, in our country, a guy with a houseboat and a Maserati can obstruct progress and relief for millions of working families.
We are one vote away from capping insulin prices, providing universal pre-K, and taking real action against climate change — but the multi-millionaire senator from West Virginia is trying to blow it all up.
Joe Manchin’s betrayal of working families makes one thing clear: We need more working people in the United States Senate.
Look, if I have the honor of becoming Pennsylvania’s next Senator, I’ll be the 50th vote Democrats need to pass President Biden’s Build Back Better agenda.
**But I need your help to get there. That’s why I’m respectfully asking you to make a $3 contribution to my campaign today. So what do you say?**
[If you’re able to do so, can you pitch in $3 to take our fight for working families to the U.S. Senate? No matter the amount, every donation adds up to help us win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39971531/322251910/-360183459?refcode2=8e090c25-1764-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&refcode=em211223-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTA5MGMyNS0xNzY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_knHB0CLsZhwsL7Wyxm71Ld3FswJTBuJICVidY2yOEE=)
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39971532/322251911/-360183459?refcode2=8e090c25-1764-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&refcode=em211223-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTA5MGMyNS0xNzY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_knHB0CLsZhwsL7Wyxm71Ld3FswJTBuJICVidY2yOEE=)**
Thanks for staying with us in this fight.
Malcolm

name: Derek Marshall
subject: Eight more days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
I’ll cut to the chase: I know it’s the end of the year and the holiday season, which means lots of things are vying for your attention. I know politics may seem less important and election season may seem far off, but**I’m hoping you’ll spare me a few minutes of your time to explain why it’s so important that we keep our fundraising numbers strong. **
In the New Year, we will be hiring new staff, launching our political and communications programs, and preparing for field operations. Our campaign will kick into high gear once we hit election year, and that costs valuable resources. **Every single dollar that we’ve raised this year has come from grassroots, individual donors like yourself.** People like you keep the wheels turning on this campaign.
**[That’s why I’m asking you directly to make a donation to my campaign today. Every single dollar counts, so anything you can give is helpful. Can I count on you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39971837/322254160/-223825832?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTI1N2EyMi0xYTY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mQ0RBsw1bD-CI_u5BTpVptf19KHQuZ2u5Vq-3AFh7Yk=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39971838/322254164/-223825832?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTI1N2EyMi0xYTY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mQ0RBsw1bD-CI_u5BTpVptf19KHQuZ2u5Vq-3AFh7Yk=)
**We’re only EIGHT DAYS away from our final filing date of the entire year.** Everyone will be looking at our end of quarter fundraising numbers as a way to gauge our legitimacy as a campaign. And I’m confident we’ll hit our fundraising target and match our numbers from our last quarter. If we can do that, we can show that we have what it takes to win this race. But in order to do it, I need your help.
I’m counting on your support today to make a difference for our campaign tomorrow. **[Will you consider making a contribution to our campaign so we can flip this district blue and gain one more progressive, Democratic seat in the House?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39971841/322254166/-223825832?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTI1N2EyMi0xYTY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mQ0RBsw1bD-CI_u5BTpVptf19KHQuZ2u5Vq-3AFh7Yk=)**

In solidarity,

**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-08

name: American Defense News
subject: Future generations are counting on your response
body:
Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf52i38svg6tiq3hmpfhbvusof78oh5pv6b70200_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqmcdr6m1p7at9imgp71db261p31dple8rm5ctiesqratbksurr4tr3m9g6fcdnmv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66ljj6ob7mth6cdb0mdh6fc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5g64o72c5h62oh5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za44knourve70je6i62ulsj28b3r0sta7oajdkk8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9ge4ob2c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s [**RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6c0l2dev1b2fugs9jc3s1eh1t1k6jflm7ubb040_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9ge4ob2c5h2bs) My name is Bill Gray, and I’m the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It’s my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. **I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.** It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation--a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. _The New York Times’_ recent “1619 Project” is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” **“Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.”** Outrageous! _The New York Times’_ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery--not freedom--is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the “1619 Project” into a feature film. **Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans --and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas.** Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our** _most urgent priority._** Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. **We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective.** Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism--our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work--especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the **RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. **As _The New York Times’_ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. ** _Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible._ And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs--which I will outline fo**r you shortly --it has been determined that to fully implement this [RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z84jo4t4u2ukqouh2ol8tk14ju5s9emcp1373kgg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9ge4ob2c5h2bs)** for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding--even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again--Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! **In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission.** Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty--as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can--gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people--including our nation’s youth--with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zd4rva6ue982uno8qincgssbthlsnkn37rtqls6o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9ge4ob2c5h2bs)** And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: **BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans** I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong--such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. **Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people.** You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! **BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools** In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles--AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake--Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus--they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses _free of charge_ , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous--over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” This free course is called **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called _Imprimis_ , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. _Imprimis_ is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the _Wall Street Journal_ or the “fake news” _New York Times_. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set _Imprimis_ apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an _Imprimis_ subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) **BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools** In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. **Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year.** Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. **The response has been astounding.** We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education--education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqgplrvj7vn2si8uj8072qsl0okj07vq6kp9ake8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9ge4ob2c5h2bs)**
With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans--views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU--your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. **So please complete the[Battle Plan Survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbgt7m9gqmrlhd29vfgrj6lcjk1tlpmv428pp0t0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9ge4ob2c5h2bs) today.** When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S**. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zl937hl328vb93ljl4ajea74bkumtntsido80f2g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9ge4ob2c5h2bs)** to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty.
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

I hope you are reading this message somewhere warm and surrounded by loved ones. I’m headed offline for the next few days to recharge and spend some time with my family. But I couldn’t log off without checking in with my supporters once more. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39972687/322257068/-1768393238?refcode=em_eng_2021.12.23_b1_lm_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmFlM2I0Mi0xYjY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IWkqasJURsEdhUUDXpLZlHh2Fkxpa-uaWnPPDeMxuT8=)

name: Valerie Foushee
subject: Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays to you and your family!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/1z9JhZViMB_-7h85lTDA98JXo5ohXbSgOvgiVLGFWGs=/30oF6NXv3L1qzaQfQ0MUiZgHGm0m6pPZRkpHIadLIis=)
---
Peter,

Merry Christmas to everyone celebrating! As we soon gather to celebrate this special holiday season, my family and I wanted to reach out to **wish you and your loved ones a healthy, happy Christmas and New Year.**

I hope you have a chance to return to the traditions that you may have missed in 2020. The holiday season brings so many people together, and that's especially meaningful after being apart last year.

I'll be spending Christmas Day with family, and I'm especially excited to spend the day with my grandson, Stanley III. I'm looking forward to a celebratory time of opening presents by the tree, cooking and eating a feast, and making wonderful memories. I hope you get to experience the same joy with your families.

**So from my family to yours, we wish you a safe and extraordinarily happy holiday season!**

Warmly,
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/1z9JhZViMB_-7h85lTDA98JXo5ohXbSgOvgiVLGFWGs=/30oF6NXv3L1qzaQfQ0MUiZgHGm0m6pPZRkpHIadLIis=)

name: Aramis Ayala
subject: I’m personally asking, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Aramis Ayala for Congress
body:
I truly believe that a better, brighter future is waiting for us all. I’m fighting every day to achieve it.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39972962/322258401/619242359?refcode=abd_em_fr_2021.12.21_bX_logo_x__f1_s1_c1__header&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2021.12.23_b1_intro_x_f1_s1__ac2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDcxZjUzYy0xYzY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eeCNiswS41B2OKZmSPpqtsBLyEqkHOISXD6a80RcWSI=)
---
Peter,

In this email, I’m going to get personal and explain exactly why I’m running for Congress. **[I hope you’ll give me a minute to read this email, and if it moves you, I hope you’ll chip in $5 to my campaign>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39972963/322258402/619242359?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2021.12.23_b1_intro_X_F1_S1__ac2&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2021.12.23_b1_intro_x_f1_s1__ac2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDcxZjUzYy0xYzY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eeCNiswS41B2OKZmSPpqtsBLyEqkHOISXD6a80RcWSI=)**

As an experienced reformer, I’m running for Congress to give power back to everyday people and take on the status quo that has shut them out for far too long.

I am fighting to reform our justice system, end the death penalty once and for all, make housing more affordable, and protect our environment. We will never be able to make life better for the people of the Black, Brown, and poor communities until we are able to fix these systemic issues.

But Peter, first I need your help. Our public end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is just over a week away, and I need your help to hit our goal. All of our numbers will be made public, and the strength of our campaign will be judged by the amount we raise.

**[Can I count on you to join me on this journey by chipping in $5 to my campaign before the deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39972964/322258403/619242359?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2021.12.23_b1_intro_X_F1_S1__ac2&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2021.12.23_b1_intro_x_f1_s1__ac2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDcxZjUzYy0xYzY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eeCNiswS41B2OKZmSPpqtsBLyEqkHOISXD6a80RcWSI=)** | [GIVE $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39972965/322258404/619242359?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2021.12.23_b1_intro_X_F1_S1__ac2&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2021.12.23_b1_intro_x_f1_s1__ac2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDcxZjUzYy0xYzY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eeCNiswS41B2OKZmSPpqtsBLyEqkHOISXD6a80RcWSI=)

Peter, I decided to run for Congress because I realized the consequences of inaction were just too high. I knew I needed to fight for my community and ensure that we were getting the help we needed.

And I truly believe that a better, brighter future is waiting for us all. I’m fighting every day to achieve it.

body:
| | | Team, **I know many of us are busy with last minute preparation for the holidays but I wanted to check in - real quick I promise!**
1. **How are you?** The holidays can be tough for so many folks – especially after the past couple of years. This campaign is about more than winning an election, it’s about building a community. Let us know by replying to this email if there’s anything we can do to help you this holiday season. There are limitations on what we can do since we’re not in office yet, but we can point you in the right direction if you’re not sure where to turn.

2. If you’re doing alright and you’re able to help us build our movement: We’re still facing an upcoming fundraising deadline at the end of the year. **[_If you have a few dollars to spare, please consider donating to help power our campaign in 2022._](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w_NOmPsolGX67ikLwxsr_DlR0ytYpDhngbJc3o7y4JhKdsxt0C4IQyQIDE1Yywx_zMMDa7Yi-tiKm_tzP4qrF1NKZMy_kZYLkBATyNFIA8L1wuhlflB_GL0j8cNjIDdXGGMhzqZ9a1pk_fMj5RoG7QHUayTjbnKV2uWNOi8KVOfyazj6j_8O4Lxog1iZZrgdNVwGMo8XYEgCTCZBtt7_ZPUlRyGcYDnCYKzHeWK1EuZHX4k7ti6bvL-XcUQIEV7ovZRBxfutt9k6tkTrJ9O6NR/3i3/MICXolaXSICiU62lRGI9mw/h0/S5F7tJA8RFR7pxLIVGNBlyBvDcf0DG426UTo46Ct_HM)**

You’re invited, Derek! body:
**ICYMI: Wesley Joins Newsmax with President Trump's Former CBP Chief, Mark Morgan, to Discuss Biden's Disastrous Border Crisis**

**Houston, TX** - On Wednesday, Wesley Hunt, Army combat veteran and Houston native, running to represent Texas' 38th Congressional District, joined Newsmax with Mark Morgan, President Trump's former CBP Commissioner, to discuss the crisis Joe Biden and Kamala Harris have created on our southern border. Wesley also detailed the millions of tons of illicit drugs that have been smuggled into our country, and the need to secure our border and finish the wall President Trump courageously started. Watch Wesley's interview [here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=da0e02ac233e4b39a55148d59d76c5ba&_e=GDbv8lWg4zAkbEIisaVIq6Ak4XCOuEJl5DHw4uenH1Nd93zRO2p_CnGFwVR5dmx-_eVrJOb7gU61vkE8VCx27zHM7V9nZ2p8WHlW3Cf6aW1ih-12THLkU4wDqAkO4jSxyvH-tIcZ0dizASKl03WJpp60oCCIxmO7iZaoy-A1GLdlUxxy_XBwZsBk10aX8H11_UlCEoeS8hHDuNR9VFYo5ma0iy0AeoTm1GsVE2e4KGF4qtddSeAhOY07W7dJJDfVwMoJY_2YCclzmO_8MklWjP3WmNh6yF08X66WMplNgDTaLoV3ifuGdeS_LZsQX1L4)!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
This week's Party Line is coming a little earlier this week | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-471014?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Merry Christmas Hoosiers!_** We're sending the Party Line a little earlier this week. With Christmas just hours away, we hope you will have the opportunity to turn off devices, disconnect from work, decompress for a few days and reflect on the true meaning of Christmas, the birth of Jesus Christ.

There will be plenty of time in the months ahead for the political work we've long engaged in and we know 2022 will be a very important election. But, for these next few days, we're going to enjoy Christmas with our family, faith, friends, and neighbors. All of us at the Indiana Republican Party wish you and yours a very Merry Christmas!

Thank you,
Kyle
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Building One Indiana For All_**
**Governor Holcomb** was joined by Senate Pro Temp Rodric Bray, INDOT Director Joe McGuiness and other local leaders for t[he ribbon cutting of I-69's northbound lanes through Martinsville](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=020d05c027&e=1acd9bb3d6). The ribbon cutting opened for traffic lanes that had been closed for expansion for nearly a year. _**“This new section of interstate better connects Martinsville, Morgan County and communities to the southwest with the rest of the state, the region and the country, makes travel safer and more efficient, and will catalyze economic growth and job creation across the Hoosier state,” Governor Holcomb.**_ **The governor** participated in the promotion ceremony of Indiana National Guard Adjutant General Dale Lyles late last week at the statehouse. General Lyles was promoted to major general. _**"General Lyles is the right man at the right time for the right job," Governor Holcomb. **_

**Governor Holcomb** also delivered the keynote address at the [26th Annual Governor's Luncheon for Scouting](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2b6ad05af1&e=1acd9bb3d6) for Crossroads of America Council and the Boy Scouts of America. The theme of his address was Training Camp for Life. _**Photos: (Top) The governor at the ribbon cutting of the new lanes of I-69 in Martinsville. (Middle) Governor Holcomb at the promotion ceremony for Indiana National Guard Adjutant General Dale Lyles. (Bottom) Governor Holcomb with Indiana scouts at the 26th Annual Governor's Luncheon on Scouting.**_
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Merry Christmas from the Holcombs_**
_**"For unto you is born this day in the City of David a Savior, which is Christ the Lord," Luke 2:11.**_
Best wishes for a Merry Christmas from our family to yours,

Sincerely,

Janet, Eric, Henry, and Topper the photo-shy cat!
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Hupfer Sits with Howey_** Earlier this week, Chairman Kyle Hupfer say with longtime Indiana political reporter and columnist Brian Howey. The covered several topics including the importance of winning back the US House and Senate next November. You can read Howey's column [by clicking here.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a645b6ad40&e=1acd9bb3d6)

**_Photo: Chairman Hupfer speaks at the senate district 46 caucus last month in New Albany_**
---
|
---
| **_ICYMI: Automatic Refund for Hoosier Taxpayers_** In case you missed it, last week it was announced that Hoosier taxpayers will receive a refund on their 2021 taxes. Thanks to conservative fiscal management and a Hoosier economy that has proven its resilience, an estimated $545 million will be returned to Hoosiers.

_**“Despite a pandemic, Indiana exceeded all expectations and closed the state fiscal year with an unprecedented amount in reserves. We have an obligation to put this money back in the hands of taxpayers instead of leaving it in the hands of government,” Governor Holcomb.**_

The Governor is working with leaders of the general assembly on legislation that will streamline the refund process and make an additional 910,000 taxpayers eligible for the credit. The typical taxpayer liability is approximately $1000. This payment represents a 12-13% one-time tax cut.

**Once again, Republican leadership is paying dividends for Hoosiers!**
---
|
---
| **_Oakman Returning to Holcomb Administration_** Eric Holcomb for Indiana and Indiana Republican Party Director of Strategic Communications Jake Oakman is returning to Governor Eric Holcomb's administration to be Executive Director of the White River State Park Development Commission. Jake's last day with us will be December 31. _**“Jake has long been devoted to making Indiana a better place to work, live, play, study and stay,” said Gov. Holcomb. “He will take his passion and commitment to making Indiana a global destination and build upon the current successes of one of our states Crown Jewels, the White Rive State Park," said Holcomb.**_ Jake has extensive experience in Indiana’s tourism and sports industries. Before his first stint in the Holcomb Administration, Jake was Director of Communications for Visit Indiana. Jake’s first job in Indianapolis was at White River State Park, working as a ticket sales executive for the Indianapolis Indians at Victory Field. We will certainly miss Jake but are glad he's not going far. Congratulations Jake!
---
|
---
| _**Thomas Joins Indiana GOP as Press Secretary**_ Luke Thomas has joined the Indiana Republican Party team as our new press secretary. Luke will be the main contact for media moving forward. He started last week. Luke's email is [lthomas@indiana.gop](mailto:lthomas@indiana.gop).

Join us in welcoming Luke to the team!
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Indiana Republican State Convention**_ The 2022 Indiana Republican State Convention will take place **on Saturday, June 18, 2022 in Indianapolis. **

More information, including details on hotel accommodations, can be found [at this link.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fc622035dd&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Congress of Counties 2022**_ **[Registration is open for Congress of Counties 2022! ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bbfc8694f5&e=1acd9bb3d6)**

clean_body: This week's Party Line is coming a little earlier this week | | | | | | | | Merry Christmas Hoosiers! We're sending the Party Line a little earlier this week. With Christmas just hours away, we hope you will have the opportunity to turn off devices, disconnect from work, decompress for a few days and reflect on the true meaning of Christmas, the birth of Jesus Christ. There will be plenty of time in the months ahead for the political work we've long engaged in and we know 2022 will be a very important election. But, for these next few days, we're going to enjoy Christmas with our family, faith, friends, and neighbors. All of us at the Indiana Republican Party wish you and yours a very Merry Christmas! Thank you, Kyle | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | | | Building One Indiana For All Governor Holcomb was joined by Senate Pro Temp Rodric Bray, INDOT Director Joe McGuiness and other local leaders for t. The ribbon cutting opened for traffic lanes that had been closed for expansion for nearly a year. “This new section of interstate better connects Martinsville, Morgan County and communities to the southwest with the rest of the state, the region and the country, makes travel safer and more efficient, and will catalyze economic growth and job creation across the Hoosier state,” Governor Holcomb. The governor participated in the promotion ceremony of Indiana National Guard Adjutant General Dale Lyles late last week at the statehouse. General Lyles was promoted to major general. "General Lyles is the right man at the right time for the right job," Governor Holcomb. Governor Holcomb also delivered the keynote address at the for Crossroads of America Council and the Boy Scouts of America. The theme of his address was Training Camp for Life. Photos: (Top) The governor at the ribbon cutting of the new lanes of I-69 in Martinsville. (Middle) Governor Holcomb at the promotion ceremony for Indiana National Guard Adjutant General Dale Lyles. (Bottom) Governor Holcomb with Indiana scouts at the 26th Annual Governor's Luncheon on Scouting. | | | | Merry Christmas from the Holcombs "For unto you is born this day in the City of David a Savior, which is Christ the Lord," Luke 2:11. Best wishes for a Merry Christmas from our family to yours, Sincerely, Janet, Eric, Henry, and Topper the photo-shy cat! | | | Hupfer Sits with Howey Earlier this week, Chairman Kyle Hupfer say with longtime Indiana political reporter and columnist Brian Howey. The covered several topics including the importance of winning back the US House and Senate next November. You can read Howey's column Photo: Chairman Hupfer speaks at the senate district 46 caucus last month in New Albany | | ICYMI: Automatic Refund for Hoosier Taxpayers In case you missed it, last week it was announced that Hoosier taxpayers will receive a refund on their 2021 taxes. Thanks to conservative fiscal management and a Hoosier economy that has proven its resilience, an estimated $545 million will be returned to Hoosiers. “Despite a pandemic, Indiana exceeded all expectations and closed the state fiscal year with an unprecedented amount in reserves. We have an obligation to put this money back in the hands of taxpayers instead of leaving it in the hands of government,” Governor Holcomb. The Governor is working with leaders of the general assembly on legislation that will streamline the refund process and make an additional 910,000 taxpayers eligible for the credit. The typical taxpayer liability is approximately $1000. This payment represents a 12-13% one-time tax cut. Once again, Republican leadership is paying dividends for Hoosiers! | | Oakman Returning to Holcomb Administration Eric Holcomb for Indiana and Indiana Republican Party Director of Strategic Communications Jake Oakman is returning to Governor Eric Holcomb's administration to be Executive Director of the White River State Park Development Commission. Jake's last day with us will be December 31. “Jake has long been devoted to making Indiana a better place to work, live, play, study and stay,” said Gov. Holcomb. “He will take his passion and commitment to making Indiana a global destination and build upon the current successes of one of our states Crown Jewels, the White Rive State Park," said Holcomb. Jake has extensive experience in Indiana’s tourism and sports industries. Before his first stint in the Holcomb Administration, Jake was Director of Communications for Visit Indiana. Jake’s first job in Indianapolis was at White River State Park, working as a ticket sales executive for the Indianapolis Indians at Victory Field. We will certainly miss Jake but are glad he's not going far. Congratulations Jake! | | Thomas Joins Indiana GOP as Press Secretary Luke Thomas has joined the Indiana Republican Party team as our new press secretary. Luke will be the main contact for media moving forward. He started last week. Luke's email is mailto:lthomas@indiana.gop. Join us in welcoming Luke to the team! | | | Indiana Republican State Convention The 2022 Indiana Republican State Convention will take place on Saturday, June 18, 2022 in Indianapolis. More information, including details on hotel accommodations, can be found | | | Congress of Counties 2022 This two-day training event for Republican Party leaders, candidates and grassroots activists is scheduled for February 25-26 at the historic . Bidenflation has NOT impacted registration for Congress of Counties! You'll want to experience Congress of Counties next year to kick-off 2022’s election season, meet Indiana’s top Republican elected officials, and learn more about critical election topics. The training provided at Congress of Counties is the training you’ll need to WIN elections throughout Indiana in 2022 and beyond, keeping Indiana on the right track. THE FULL SCHEDULE FOR CONGRESS OF COUNTIES WILL BE RELEASED IN THE COMING WEEKS! -- | | Upcoming Republican Events Rush County Lincoln Day Dinner Hendricks County Lincoln Day Dinner Congress of Counties GOP State Convention | | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch Treasurer Kelly Mitchell Auditor Tera Klutz Secretary of State Holli Sullivan Attorney General Todd Rokita Senator Todd Young Senator Mike Braun Congresswoman Jackie Walorski Congressman Jim Banks Congressman Jim Baird Congresswoman Victoria Spartz Congressman Greg Pence Congressman Larry Bucshon Congressman Trey Hollingsworth | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc., All rights reserved.

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Future generations are counting on your response
body:
Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcact9s70es8mqgp2qe7a0gvuakca9otl5o73aao_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9ge2oj6clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s [**RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zu7n614h6vaeeoqiga2nklmp18k12dd6m1jki1u0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9ge2oj6clh2bs) My name is Bill Gray, and I’m the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It’s my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. **I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.** It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation—a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. _The New York Times’_ recent “1619 Project” is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” **“Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.”** Outrageous! _The New York Times’_ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery—not freedom—is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the “1619 Project” into a feature film. **Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans—and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas.** Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our** _most urgent priority._** Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. **We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective.** Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism—our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work—especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the **RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. **As _The New York Times’_ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. ** _Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible._ And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs—which I will outline fo**r you shortly—it has been determined that to fully implement this[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbbdma80aiproq6dl2j4nu6af55tjqs8e2ftg8o0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9ge2oj6clh2bs)** for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding—even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again—Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! **In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission.** Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty—as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can—gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people—including our nation’s youth—with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrj98lb6b6ihvs8kouqd9p8hmbinommtp54lep3o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9ge2oj6clh2bs)** And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: **BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans** I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong—such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. **Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people.** You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! **BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools** In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles—AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake—Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus—they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses _free of charge_ , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous—over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” This free course is called **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called _Imprimis_ , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. _Imprimis_ is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the _Wall Street Journal_ or the “fake news” _New York Times_. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set _Imprimis_ apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an _Imprimis_ subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) **BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools** In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. **Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year.** Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. **The response has been astounding.** We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education—education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zp939p4pm6sufgcamrav25supvar1usfis6q8on0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9ge2oj6clh2bs)**
With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans—views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU—your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. **So please complete the[Battle Plan Survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7c0aonlubuc2t2muvn09g2o779f4edbbincg1eg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9ge2oj6clh2bs) today.**
When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S**. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zk72jcmihgdearih4bfv74h63vdc6iujc2g11q2o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9ge2oj6clh2bs)** to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty.

clean_body: Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s My name is Bill Gray, and I’m the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It’s my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt. It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation—a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. The New York Times’ recent “1619 Project” is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” “Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.” Outrageous! The New York Times’ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery—not freedom—is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the “1619 Project” into a feature film. Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans—and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas. Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our most urgent priority. Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective. Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism—our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work—especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. As The New York Times’ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible. And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs—which I will outline for you shortly—it has been determined that to fully implement this for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding—even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again—Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission. Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty—as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can—gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people—including our nation’s youth—with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong—such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people. You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles—AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake—Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus—they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses free of charge , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous—over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters The New York Times’ “1619 Project.” This free course is called “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called Imprimis , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. Imprimis is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the Wall Street Journal or the “fake news” New York Times. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set Imprimis apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an Imprimis subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year. Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. name: Ally For Utah
subject: Latest polling numbers, UFRW speech, crypto panel, and Op Ed
body:
#AllyForUtah Update | The latest news from the Ally Isom For U.S. Senate Campaign
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Dn9FYk5uF5pC3ny8V3oTxjaQKKfJEVZ0OeJ99Cv5G6QEbAhgzQQP0oDpiAECh47Sm_AqtQl2sPuKQjTJniGbmKyeqs6J21aMps7ftp5tsHAynaUiVXSf7SaGFuHLlrfRzPiowATAoNbVczdIpke4Ew==&c=E88BH52sRfC6QhmRL_jY_RfLqfe-3Wyke0uWTpRjZtNw4tfynt2zAQ==&ch=Nv8yI7GukQtWi79X4UY7L7m95-MgoyYsGXKaAluxRGmhvorqF7o99A==)
---
| | Happy holidays, friend!
Ally hit the road this week, speaking on a cryptocurrency panel, visiting Southern Utah, and speaking at a Utah Federation of Republican Women event. She wrote an Op Ed for the Deseret News. And finally, new polling data shows that, with increased name recognition, Ally is one of the top Utah candidates most likely to win! Here is the latest from the [#AllyForUtah](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Dn9FYk5uF5pC3ny8V3oTxjaQKKfJEVZ0OeJ99Cv5G6QEbAhgzQQP0oDpiAECh47Sm_AqtQl2sPuKQjTJniGbmKyeqs6J21aMps7ftp5tsHAynaUiVXSf7SaGFuHLlrfRzPiowATAoNbVczdIpke4Ew==&c=E88BH52sRfC6QhmRL_jY_RfLqfe-3Wyke0uWTpRjZtNw4tfynt2zAQ==&ch=Nv8yI7GukQtWi79X4UY7L7m95-MgoyYsGXKaAluxRGmhvorqF7o99A==) campaign.
---
|
---
|
---
| Cryptocurrency panel As a business and tech leader, Ally moderated a panel discussion called, "Cryptocurrency 101: Learning the Essentials of Cryptocurrency" last week, where she offered her unique perspective on how crypto is reshaping finance. With her experience in the business and tech sectors, Ally is the candidate who understands how to govern in this fast changing digital economy. Ally was invited to moderate the panel by tech leader, Scott Paul, in conjunction with the launch of crypto startup, Giddy. Kirk Ouimet, a tech entrepreneur, was also involved in the discussion. [View Cryptocurrency 101 here>>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Dn9FYk5uF5pC3ny8V3oTxjaQKKfJEVZ0OeJ99Cv5G6QEbAhgzQQP0mOMgzFbB8gTtvi0HyMIW89LQSTBksK05UK6t1WDyj9PD87MUU6YIFufLYdZGO7kub4IyMMcIjcNTYJJvKYIf0F9FEhtn-rmee3cLXnPCPrLJwZFtvrnohn2tJ_B5tuEXGbE1F5nIrpd&c=E88BH52sRfC6QhmRL_jY_RfLqfe-3Wyke0uWTpRjZtNw4tfynt2zAQ==&ch=Nv8yI7GukQtWi79X4UY7L7m95-MgoyYsGXKaAluxRGmhvorqF7o99A==)
---
|
---
| Deseret News op-ed by Ally
Ally wrote about the need for connection in an Op Ed for the Deseret News that went live on Monday. She referenced data from a recent [Harvard poll](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Dn9FYk5uF5pC3ny8V3oTxjaQKKfJEVZ0OeJ99Cv5G6QEbAhgzQQP0mOMgzFbB8gTwNTlBtfY5xXw6IO-etbReabPVOHAWD_7OaVIBmfWIb7msCTvK1sXAh5nWWcfQqNdTHRBjywMAnyl0j4JMs9qtd2Hlvyygh0v3EnSIriBqiy3kZ3x22RqIIPEKR1ZoBj-fGExfyoSdxJnAiLiU11kfFwvcKZ4--1KzXfvufUmdI9QqZtqaM1kBCgGHU7FeO8wzvlU9V0b1wUjtlZf2GcttEA7liRBo5c2&c=E88BH52sRfC6QhmRL_jY_RfLqfe-3Wyke0uWTpRjZtNw4tfynt2zAQ==&ch=Nv8yI7GukQtWi79X4UY7L7m95-MgoyYsGXKaAluxRGmhvorqF7o99A==) that found that 18-29 year olds feel like our democracy is failing. Ally said the way to build trust and break down barriers isn't with more government programs, but by having meaningful connections, especially with our elected leaders. "I want each young person and every voter to know I am a different kind of leader and am committed to remain connected, to ensure proximity between electors and the elected," Ally wrote. [Read the full Deseret News article here>>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Dn9FYk5uF5pC3ny8V3oTxjaQKKfJEVZ0OeJ99Cv5G6QEbAhgzQQP0mOMgzFbB8gTjYwoX-b9mZY9aj3uLCLqNg0nWV-IwaWaeLy6ZUZ5bi_cCms3fTCzcmOFepqL7YYs0QYlAA3Z78QQirPWe3tEB5gzsZhWk-bVegdk7_sR-FgttyQUdCrVsRVvW_oK9hXM-gJJJjjnKtsSPtTi4hoLFAoevpXekaS2Dq2uPhjTpo3p0t_Y_DVgnttNnKPXTsOUlg2IFA87gqgLpWS8NXC0Md7HTAiY9Io_haUjDbMZAI3OJopfrY30tYbTkwG1nvtj&c=E88BH52sRfC6QhmRL_jY_RfLqfe-3Wyke0uWTpRjZtNw4tfynt2zAQ==&ch=Nv8yI7GukQtWi79X4UY7L7m95-MgoyYsGXKaAluxRGmhvorqF7o99A==)
---
|
---
| UFRW luncheon Ally provided an overview of her U.S. Senate candidacy at the Utah Federation of Republican Women Legislative Preview held at the Utah State Capitol last week. She shared her deep roots with the Republican Party, why she is running, and the five principles that define her leadership style. They are people, principle, policy, process and politics. "If I keep things in that order, we get to good outcomes," Ally said. Ally also unveiled her new policy initiative. The Right Things. A Compact with Utah. A vision for America. [Read more about Ally's Compact with Utah here>>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Dn9FYk5uF5pC3ny8V3oTxjaQKKfJEVZ0OeJ99Cv5G6QEbAhgzQQP0tM2u4x3pMg-HJMtVSuOF4jNgCXZ7Xo1rHNrayK5OwzG-ORG8sBjvEVkJlxJTFN9FRzuB6jltR2t7nmY3Bk1kzTHcNFcCf_E8PsPdI0z-ScowfWchwNWRoZSCuSdvmzq688sk_etakW1W5Gwez7J1duk8SKqRvcOxhnpmVwl1h9J&c=E88BH52sRfC6QhmRL_jY_RfLqfe-3Wyke0uWTpRjZtNw4tfynt2zAQ==&ch=Nv8yI7GukQtWi79X4UY7L7m95-MgoyYsGXKaAluxRGmhvorqF7o99A==)
---
|
---
| New polling data released
OH Predictive Insights recently released new polling data about Utah's congressional races. The results show that with increased name ID Ally is one of the top Utah candidates most likely to win! clean_body: #AllyForUtah Update | The latest news from the Ally Isom For U.S. Senate Campaign | | | | | | | == | | Happy holidays, friend! Ally hit the road this week, speaking on a cryptocurrency panel, visiting Southern Utah, and speaking at a Utah Federation of Republican Women event. She wrote an Op Ed for the Deseret News. And finally, new polling data shows that, with increased name recognition, Ally is one of the top Utah candidates most likely to win! Here is the latest from the == campaign. | | | Cryptocurrency panel As a business and tech leader, Ally moderated a panel discussion called, "Cryptocurrency 101: Learning the Essentials of Cryptocurrency" last week, where she offered her unique perspective on how crypto is reshaping finance. With her experience in the business and tech sectors, Ally is the candidate who understands how to govern in this fast changing digital economy. Ally was invited to moderate the panel by tech leader, Scott Paul, in conjunction with the launch of crypto startup, Giddy. Kirk Ouimet, a tech entrepreneur, was also involved in the discussion. == | | Deseret News op-ed by Ally Ally wrote about the need for connection in an Op Ed for the Deseret News that went live on Monday. She referenced data from a recent == that found that 18-29 year olds feel like our democracy is failing. Ally said the way to build trust and break down barriers isn't with more government programs, but by having meaningful connections, especially with our elected leaders. "I want each young person and every voter to know I am a different kind of leader and am committed to remain connected, to ensure proximity between electors and the elected," Ally wrote. == | | UFRW luncheon Ally provided an overview of her U.S. Senate candidacy at the Utah Federation of Republican Women Legislative Preview held at the Utah State Capitol last week. She shared her deep roots with the Republican Party, why she is running, and the five principles that define her leadership style. They are people, principle, policy, process and politics. "If I keep things in that order, we get to good outcomes," Ally said. Ally also unveiled her new policy initiative. The Right Things. A Compact with Utah. A vision for America. == | | New polling data released OH Predictive Insights recently released new polling data about Utah's congressional races. subject: Fight the insurrectionists & no emails until Valentine’s!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

Seems like this week's chapter of the investigation into the Jan. 6 insurrection has become a Pennsylvania story.

PA Congressman Scott "Insurrection" Perry refused to meet with the House Committee investigating the attacks on the Capitol.

He insulted his constituents when he said that they understand that the investigation itself is fraudulent and unfounded. He claims to speak for Pennsylvania, but Pennsylvanians should make it clear that HE DOES NOT. He tried to overturn the legitimate results of an election and either assisted or was complicit in an attempt to overthrow the government!

This is what we’re up against.

We need your support today so that we can continue to fight against those who wish to tear down our democracy. We need to work together to build up a progressive PA that supports equity for ALL who live here, not just the lucky few.

Please, set up a recurring donation to Keystone Progress TODAY, and we promise not to send you any more fundraising emails until Valentine’s Day.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progressive-monthly?refcode=122321 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progressive-monthly?refcode=122321]

Thank you for making sure that we have the resources and support to protect Pennsylvania from people like Scott Perry.

Patrick Clark
Keystone Progress

**Peter – The path to protecting our Senate majority runs through Iowa. Here's a critical update out of the Hawkeye State:**
**With our Senate control razor-thin, every single seat matters immensely – and right now, Sen. Grassley (R-IA) is more vulnerable than ever.** He's facing his LOWEST job approval ratings in nearly four decades, and recent data shows that 64% of likely Iowa voters do NOT want to reelect him!
Democrat Abby Finkenauer – the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue – is running to take advantage of this unprecedented momentum among Democrats in Iowa to defeat Sen. Grassley. **If Abby wins, we'll be all but GUARANTEED to maintain Senate control!**
