clean_body: | | | Peter – The path to protecting our Senate majority runs through Iowa. Here's a critical update out of the Hawkeye State: With our Senate control razor-thin, every single seat matters immensely – and right now, Sen. Grassley (R-IA) is more vulnerable than ever. He's facing his LOWEST job approval ratings in nearly four decades, and recent data shows that 64% of likely Iowa voters do NOT want to reelect him! Democrat Abby Finkenauer – the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue – is running to take advantage of this unprecedented momentum among Democrats in Iowa to defeat Sen. Grassley. If Abby wins, we'll be all but GUARANTEED to maintain Senate control! = That’s why this news is so awful: The Republican Senate campaign arm already has nearly $30 MILLION in the bank to defend vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley and DEFEAT challengers like Abby– that's almost TWICE the amount Senate Democrats have. This grassroots movement needs to keep pace with GOP megadonors, but right now, Abby is falling $23,550 short of her next big fundraising goal! Abby has to hit this goal before the FEC public reporting deadline on New Year's Eve, or she won't have the resources to take on Sen. Grassley and the GOP in 2022. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Trump News HQ
subject: Future generations are counting on your response
body:
Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z80ijdtijn2h76v0ojvifkfb5n13s7nlhsrps3f0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9ge6o32c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s [**RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9hcet7qn3aokcupm5hnfl48o3sp2ekn2bu11ee8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9ge6o32c1h2bs) My name is Bill Gray, and I’m the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It’s my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. **I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.** It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation—a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. _The New York Times’_ recent “1619 Project” is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” **“Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.”** Outrageous! _The New York Times’_ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery—not freedom—is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the “1619 Project” into a feature film. **Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans—and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas.** Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our** _most urgent priority._** Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. **We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective.** Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism—our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work—especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the **RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. **As _The New York Times’_ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. ** _Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible._ And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs—which I will outline fo**r you shortly—it has been determined that to fully implement this[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3qcfuusvphvuf77r5kugnm90815h8icjuf5c838_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9ge6o32c1h2bs)** for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding—even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again—Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! **In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission.** Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty—as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can—gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people—including our nation’s youth—with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z03n11nceoki05b6707b46cov5l5s38cs0vtmnco_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9ge6o32c1h2bs)** And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: **BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans** I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong—such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. **Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people.** You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! **BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools** In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles—AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake—Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus—they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses _free of charge_ , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous—over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” This free course is called **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called _Imprimis_ , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. _Imprimis_ is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the _Wall Street Journal_ or the “fake news” _New York Times_. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set _Imprimis_ apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an _Imprimis_ subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) **BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools** In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. **Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year.** Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. **The response has been astounding.** We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education—education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z20alt455fssnk270st954lhjdiqpk4so8m0c5o0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9ge6o32c1h2bs)**
With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans—views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU—your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. **So please complete the[Battle Plan Survey](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcs2vb26i7f74f8rmsm812msefd16jm9q2kgtr70_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9ge6o32c1h2bs) today.**
When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S**. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvsmmhh62ed4j74iqov4m8i7ed2slcm4kb3rknj8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9ge6o32c1h2bs)** to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty.
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, [please use this preferences page](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/prefs/9z2z0srddb6l87bdhbkic4o03l08r5jrubrtce8ife0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpjd8h45prgt8hg16kblgec04a45hsqcp7in6fjg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9ge6o32c1h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Amina and Mireya King
subject: From our family to yours, Happy Holidays
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
Our dad has been extremely grateful for your support this holiday season.

| Dear Peter,

Our family wishes you a joyful, safe, and restful holiday season.

Our dad has been extremely grateful for your support this holiday season, especially during this challenging year we’ve all had. We’re so moved to see people like you who believe in our dad’s vision for Maryland coming together despite these hardships, and we are excited to see the campaign grow as we head into the new year.

Thank you for your valuable contribution to this team, and we can’t wait to see what next year has in store!

From our family to yours: we wish you Happy Holidays and a prosperous new year.

We’re so moved to see people like you who believe in our dad’s vision for Maryland coming together despite these hardships, and we are excited to see the campaign grow as we head into the new year. Thank you for your valuable contribution to this team, and we can’t wait to see what next year has in store! Peter - here's some polling that came out earlier this year:

**GEORGIA SENATE RACE
Warnock 48% - Walker 46%**
**On one hand, this is amazing news!** We're virtually tied with the Democrat incumbent even though I've never run for political office before. It's incredible that this race would be so close out of the starting gate!

**On the other hand, this is also alarming news** because national Democrats see how tight the race is and are desperately re-doubling their efforts to attack our campaign and prevent us from pulling ahead.

**[We need your help, Peter, so we can pick up the momentum, win this race, and help Republicans win back the Senate majority.](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=741ec145d5f845db81a3922c9e0eff88&_e=3RyXh78qViVsNn5VUFqjqNFsM2QA1u1AVALfZiZK20_TYrNk5qY3ZJ6bnAxzmM1MqoGQnTE7Tpq5X6Xmc_uzURMDKlCoL_cHzQIU7jPUNoD7U_8xPPH3rwYieAOhjmW5PGrdPdawmFWzzZfdFIb5Er4QMns9FmQTuR0SdkCnzcsjbJHDX5OEpGWjzWjrsHUd1OYOiU63D7jyNGxfbirGKhU6nGwyawWt-r7Geqn0JuZKcBHo3PVUsCfXK4wecgayYXf35nyCkPY9e6RsjyW10qpI3hg27quhu67St360ErmEKwv8HUYtaVXJfGM9hKVuTXinu9zLqtmd3nbNJF2pRknvdMW4ox6gvxNLjtEdBpwq8pXn30RGMhpgHbTAb6WPfKQEQGOrDMgv2iSz5Veh2qVmmfY9HpHU8aiVjXHo51_NPvkYJ8TJCtOtYGPE57kuKUAw87KNUPgqvVg1F65kEA%3D%3D)**

clean_body: I need your help if we want any chance at winning this race and helping Republicans WIN BACK the Senate majority in 2022. I need your help if we want any chance at winning this race and helping Republicans WIN BACK the Senate majority in 2022. | Peter - here's some polling that came out earlier this year: GEORGIA SENATE RACE Warnock 48% - Walker 46% On one hand, this is amazing news! We're virtually tied with the Democrat incumbent even though I've never run for political office before. It's incredible that this race would be so close out of the starting gate! On the other hand, this is also alarming news because national Democrats see how tight the race is and are desperately re-doubling their efforts to attack our campaign and prevent us from pulling ahead. The 4th quarter is the first full fundraising quarter we've had since entering this race, so we need to show strength on our year-end fundraising report. Our finance team has told me we need 338 more donors to give to our campaign BEFORE MIDNIGHT to give us the boost we need on our critical Federal Election Commission report. Republicans MUST WIN BACK the Senate majority this election. Everything is on the line: our military, our economy, the security of our streets and border, and the very fabric of our nation. I got off the sidelines and jumped into this senate race because we cannot afford to fall short. This race is neck and neck, but we can gain critical momentum Please stand with me. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican for U.S. Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

clean_body: | | | | We hope to see you there. | Friend, Kelly’s favorite part of campaigning is traveling to meet and greet Americans that are ready for a change from the same old D.C.-elite politicians. That is why Kelly is excited to hold a once-in-a-lifetime, America First event with President Trump at his legendary Mar-a-Lago club, and she wants YOU to be her special guest. Not only will your flight and hotel be paid for, but you will receive a LEGENDARY photo with President Trump and even dine alongside many notable personalities. MEMBER ID:2022127-45 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT ENTRY STATUS: INCOMPLETE**** We hope to see your name on the entries list. We only want the BEST supporters, that is why we are counting on you, friend. Thank you, Team Tshibaka | | | | =

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39974819/322268060/464806879?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzM5YmI2Ny0yNzY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-W4hpx8bnH1qvPNwmYJP10adq1aqBwcB9AtgHo7cN_0=&emci=e5d79605-3063-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=ec39bb67-2764-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25515813) | Hey team, Ahead of the Christmas holiday, I wanted to take a minute to extend my deepest, heartfelt thank you to every grassroots donor, supporter, and friend who has chipped in to help build our campaign over the course of this past year. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39974820/322268061/1807662573?refcode=E13114-20211222-OpenerTY-graphic-Holiday-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzM5YmI2Ny0yNzY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-W4hpx8bnH1qvPNwmYJP10adq1aqBwcB9AtgHo7cN_0=)** People often ask me why I want to compete against deep-pocketed Republicans who are funded by special interests and corporate millionaires and billionaires, and my response is simple: **A couple of big checks and wealthy individuals should not have the power to silence the voices of everyday people here in Wisconsin. ** Grassroots supporters like you are the beating heart of this movement, and you deserve a leader who will listen, care, and fight for your interests every single day — regardless of how big your donations are. And that’s exactly why I'm running for Senate. I’m going to take a break from emailing you for a few days so that you can spend well-deserved time with your friends and loved ones without being bothered. Wishing you a holiday filled with peace, love, and laughs. In gratitude,
Dr. Gillian Battino

Grassroots supporters like you are the beating heart of this movement, and you deserve a leader who will listen, care, and fight for your interests every single day — regardless of how big your donations are. name: Charlie Crist
subject: a few thoughts before the holidays
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
Florida inspires me. |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39974885/322268238/-1233715458?refcode=20211223_f_1_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDgxMWZiMy0yNzY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Bccz5iW6Y9GGXZD0gsC6hehxsNBjjQxb1ZMCoMFbAg=)
---

Florida inspires me, friend. I want to do the best I can every single day to make the place we call home better for _everyone_. As we approach the holidays and get ready to spend time with our families, I wanted to share some thoughts about the future of our state.

Unfortunately, right now, I honestly believe that Governor DeSantis is leading Florida in the wrong direction. He has the wrong priorities, and has put his own career ahead of the wellbeing and lives of our families.

I’m running for governor to get us back on track and make sure Florida is a place where ALL Floridians can succeed. It’s time to restore common sense, opportunity, and decency to our state.

Here’s the truth: I can’t defeat Gov. DeSantis on my own. No one can. Instead, it’ll take a huge, statewide movement to toss DeSantis out of office. That’s why I’m writing this email.

**[Please, if you can, pitch in to my campaign today and help me build a Florida that truly works for all Floridians!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39974886/322268239/-1233715458?refcode=20211223_f_1_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDgxMWZiMy0yNzY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Bccz5iW6Y9GGXZD0gsC6hehxsNBjjQxb1ZMCoMFbAg=)**

Thank you, and happy holidays,

Charlie

body:
This month the Los Angeles Stonewall Democratic Club, the leading organization for progressive LGBTQ+ activists, held the first forum of the 2022 mayoral election. And it was clear that Karen was THE candidate to support.

She outlined her vision to make Los Angeles a place where everyone can be housed, fed, and kept safe. How we can be a city that tackles climate change, confronts injustice, and protects the rights of every single one of its citizens.

But Karen Bass doesn't just have the vision. At the forum, she proved she has the decades of experience needed as a community organizer and history-making elected official to make our vision for L.A. a reality.

**Don't just take our word for it. After the event, the Stonewall Dems unequivocally endorsed Karen.**

clean_body: This month the Los Angeles Stonewall Democratic Club, the leading organization for progressive LGBTQ+ activists, held the first forum of the 2022 mayoral election. And it was clear that Karen was THE candidate to support. She outlined her vision to make Los Angeles a place where everyone can be housed, fed, and kept safe. How we can be a city that tackles climate change, confronts injustice, and protects the rights of every single one of its citizens. But Karen Bass doesn't just have the vision. At the forum, she proved she has the decades of experience needed as a community organizer and history-making elected official to make our vision for L.A. a reality. Don't just take our word for it. After the event, the Stonewall Dems unequivocally endorsed Karen. Karen showed up big time for the first forum of the election, but there is a long way to go before Election Day. We're gathering support from every corner of L.A. to power this campaign, and we need your support now more than ever. The end-of-year fundraising deadline is almost here and any donation you give will help us get closer to our goal. Thanks, Team Bass Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of L.A. Thanks to L.A.'s matching funds program, individual donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. # **Friend — I promised Kansans and Americans I would fight back against Joe Biden’s tyrannical vaccine mandates, and that’s exactly what I've done. **

---
Last week, my amendment to stop Joe Biden from dishonorably discharging service members who choose not to get the vaccine passed the U.S. Senate!
I’ve recorded a video for my top supporters about this, and about why I need you to keep fueling our fight for medical freedom. [**Will you watch it here, then chip in what you can?**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/2092f84413f0f5ba/fb48c41fc31588b4c3d6b838967d376c/37973)

I served as an Army doctor, and I couldn’t be prouder this amendment cleared the Senate. But our work to stop Biden’s un-American mandates and lockdowns is far from over. That’s why I need YOU to keep fighting with us. [**Hope you’ll do so now.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/2092f84413f0f5ba/ce851a3236a71967c3d6b838967d376c/37973)

body:
---
| | I can’t believe what I just learned: **Nate Silver just reported that Republicans’ Senate chances are COLLAPSING:** \-- They’re** _LOSING_** by 1 in Ohio \-- They’re _**LOSING**_ by 4 in Wisconsin \-- They’re **_LOSING_** by 5 in New Hampshire \-- They’re _**LOSING**_ by 9 in Arizona \-- They’re even **_LOSING_** by 9 in the ultimate swing state of Pennsylvania I need you to know this: [_**This is our once-in-a-lifetime chance to build the biggest Democratic Majorities in history, prove the pundits wrong, and ensure Mitch McConnell NEVER holds power again. name: =?utf-8?Q?Tina=20Ramirez?=
subject: I challenge Abigail Spanberger to a debate
body:
Think she will accept? |

https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/townhall-debate-survey?utm_source=mc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20211223_tinaramirez_townhall-debate
Friend,

Did you see this online or in Townhall?

I CHALLENGED REP. ABIGAIL SPANBERGER TO DEBATE THE SO-CALLED “BUILD BACK BETTER” BILL
After Senator Joe Manchin did the right thing by voting no on Biden’s disastrous bill, Spanberger felt it was appropriate to attack Sen. Manchin.

In her statement she called out Manchin for “walking away” and said that it was “unacceptable.” However, she failed to mention how another 50 senators voted against it as well!

Spanberger cannot claim to care about her constituents and about fiscal responsibility while simultaneously carrying water for Biden and the Squad by pushing for a radical spending bill that will make life harder for working Americans.

As a working mom in the suburbs and as a businesswoman, I understand the terrible economics of this bill. It is obvious that this will be just another in the long line of economic failures we've seen from Spanberger and her allies.

That is why I have challenged her to a debate. But before we take the stage I want to know: who do you think would win?

TEAM RAMIREZ POLLING (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/your-support-is-critical?amount=20&utm_medium=email&utmn_source=mc&utm_campaign=20210910_teamramirez_vaccine-survey)

WHO WOULD WIN THE DEBATE ?

Republican Tina Ramirez (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/thank-you-for-your-response-tr?amount=100&utm_source=mc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20211223_tinaramirez_townhall-debate)

Socialist Abigail Spanberger (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/thank-you-for-your-response-tr?amount=100&utm_source=mc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20211223_tinaramirez_townhall-debate)

I am challenging her to stand up in front of her constituents and debate me on this terrible legislation. If she believes the nonsense she is pushing about this bill, she should have no problem standing up and defending it. If she ignores any challenge, she will be admitting to her constituents that she is just pushing the lies of her party and special interests.

Let me know what you think.

Thanks,

https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/townhall-debate-survey?utm_source=mc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20211223_tinaramirez_townhall-debate
Tina Ramirez
Republican Candidate

TEAM RAMIREZ POLLING (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/your-support-is-critical?amount=20&utm_medium=email&utmn_source=mc&utm_campaign=20210910_teamramirez_vaccine-survey)

WHO WOULD WIN THE DEBATE ?

Republican Tina Ramirez (https://secure.winred.com/tina-ramirez-for-congress-inc/thank-you-for-your-response-tr?amount=100&utm_source=mc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20211223_tinaramirez_townhall-debate)

clean_body: | = Hey friend, I’ll keep this quick. Before you log off for the holidays, can you make a contribution of any amount to my reelection campaign? We need to finish this year as strong as possible so we can hit the ground running when this campaign ramps up to warp speed in January. If we don’t hit our goals this month, we won’t be able to invest and grow so we can win next year. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= Folks like you helped flip the Senate last year. With your feedback and support, I secured tax cuts for working families, repairs to our roads and bridges that will create good-paying jobs for Coloradans, and investments to modernize our infrastructure for the 21st century. My team tells me we’re $8,914 short of our goal for this quarter and your support right now will go a long way. So if you can, please pitch in a gift of any amount to help us keep Colorado blue, protect our slim Senate majority, and secure more victories for working families. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= Thank you for your continued support. I wish you, your family, and your friends a safe and healthy holiday season. Take care and talk soon, Michael Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

body:

Don Jr. here. I’m humbly requesting just 30 seconds of your time.

Fellow Conservative, Democrats have done everything they can to DESTROY the America First legacy and the results are clear: **shortages, inflation, division, crime, chaos,** and**failure.**

Fortunately, next fall, we have the opportunity to stem the damage before it’s too late! Kevin McCarthy is leading the charge to take back Congress and put America First again.

---

But, Fellow Conservative, 2022 will be here in just a few short days, and it’s absolutely CRITICAL that we hit the ground running. **[Will you step up to defend America from the radical left?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-34wd9-1qkmr-4qqlpo6/ "Will you step up to defend America from the radical left?")**

As Leader of the House Republicans, I’m committed to flipping the House of Representatives in 2022 to restore the Republican Majority and steer America back on the right track. body:
I confronted Marco Rubio at a town hall on gun safety. He couldn't even look at me.
| | |
---
Friend, I am all too familiar with the cowardice of Marco Rubio.
Just one week after my daughter Jaime was murdered at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland, Florida, I confronted Marco Rubio at a town hall on gun safety. He couldn't even look at me. He refused to work with Parkland survivors to make it more difficult for people to access assault rifles – weapons of war – like the one that killed my Jaime. He has continued since the Parkland shooting to politicize any efforts to reduce gun violence.
I will do anything I can to ensure Marco Rubio is no longer in the Senate. We need an advocate with strength and integrity like Val Demings to replace him. **[Will you join me in supporting Val Demings by rushing a contribution of $5 or more right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39975640/322274334/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1910-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmNmYTU5Yy0yYjY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jx6i8mX7GHBVUL5lJMSBrlQqSiQM-dTL741pwhcAjcM=) **
Each and every day during her service in Congress – especially after the mass shootings in Parkland and the Pulse nightclub in her Orlando-based district – Val Demings has been one of the strongest fighters for gun safety reform.
I'm reaching out asking you for dollars to meet this goal, but it's about the people we can save. It's about creating a gun safety majority in the Senate that will enact the urgent change our country needs – change to prevent families like mine from going through any more senseless tragedy. But incompetent Marco Rubio is backed by the nearly $30 million campaign war chest of the Senate Republicans. In fact, NRA-loving Republicans have already funneled tens of millions of dollars into Florida to defend Rubio.
Val Demings can only win with the grassroots support of people like you and me, which is why I'm personally reaching out today. I told the congresswoman I'd help raise $20,000 today for her Senate race – a race that experts are saying could decide Senate control. **[So please, can I count on you to donate $5 or more to help Val Demings win in Florida and make real progress on gun safety? Every dollar you give will build up grassroots resources that Congresswoman Demings needs to compete against massive amounts of GOP money.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39975641/322274335/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1910-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmNmYTU5Yy0yYjY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jx6i8mX7GHBVUL5lJMSBrlQqSiQM-dTL741pwhcAjcM=)**
I can never get my Jaime back, but helping changemakers like Val Demings – a leader who has passed lifesaving gun safety legislation – gives me the purpose I've needed since her murder. Thank you for doing your part to help.
Fred Guttenberg
Gun Violence Survivor
Jaime and Jesse's Dad

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39975786/322275442/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_TAN_GEN_AC_20211223_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTljMjBjZC0yZDY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cnZF0TSue3OerWnvNrW3zlzRXBYdsazXIqzzYqzPMH0=&emci=ff9b20cd-2d64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=019c20cd-2d64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=252045)
---
Folks, With Julie and the boys in New Mexico and my work in the Senate in DC, I enjoy the opportunities I get to cook for my family. One of my new favorites is an elk pot pie — a recipe I modified from an issue of ‘Hunt to Eat.’ My New Mexico colleagues, Senator Ben Ray Luján and Representative Teresa Leger Fernandez, have holiday, go-to recipes of their own. **Like a good New Mexico family, we are all pretty sure our own recipe is the best, so we’re turning to you to help us decide. What do you think?** | [VOTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39975787/322275443/-1056732061?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_TAN_GEN_AC_20211223_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTljMjBjZC0yZDY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cnZF0TSue3OerWnvNrW3zlzRXBYdsazXIqzzYqzPMH0=&emci=ff9b20cd-2d64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=019c20cd-2d64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=252045)
---
| _Ben Ray’s New Mexico Green Chile Enchiladas_ Ingredients:
* 2 Chicken Breasts or one shredded rotisserie chicken
* 1 can of Cream of Mushroom Soup
* 1 can of Cream of Chicken Soup
* 2 cups diced green chile
* 9 -12 Corn Tortillas
* Olive oil
* Shredded Cheddar Jack Cheese

Directions:
1. Boil the chicken breasts, let cool slightly and shred.
2. Set aside the water, the chicken was boiled in, for the next step.
3. Add garlic salt to green chile.
4. Heat small amount of olive oil in sauce pan. Lightly brown corn tortillas in the pan. Place on plate with paper towel to dry.
5. Combine both cream soups into a saucepan and add 2 cans of the chicken water and whisk until smooth.
6. Add green chile and chicken and heat thoroughly.
7. In a baking dish, layer corn tortillas, pour the cream soup mixture with chicken and green Chile.
8. Repeat layers until top layer is covered with soup chicken chile mixture and covered with cheese.
9. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 30 minutes or until heated throughout and cheese has melted.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39975788/322275444/-1056732061?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_TAN_GEN_AC_20211223_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTljMjBjZC0yZDY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cnZF0TSue3OerWnvNrW3zlzRXBYdsazXIqzzYqzPMH0=&emci=ff9b20cd-2d64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=019c20cd-2d64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=252045)
---
[VOTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39975789/322275445/-1056732061?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_TAN_GEN_AC_20211223_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTljMjBjZC0yZDY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cnZF0TSue3OerWnvNrW3zlzRXBYdsazXIqzzYqzPMH0=&emci=ff9b20cd-2d64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=019c20cd-2d64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=252045)
---
| _Martin’s Elk Pot Pie with Wild Mushrooms_ Ingredients:
* 11⁄2 lbs elk cut into 1/2 inch cubes
* 1 lb sliced mushrooms (lobster mushrooms are best, but porcini (King Boletos) also do the trick)
* 1 shallot diced
* 2 carrots diced
* 2 cloves garlic minced
* 1/2 cup red wine
* 3 tbsp all-purpose flour
* 3 cups beef, venison, or elk stock
* 1/4 cup red wine vinegar
* 1 bay leaf
* 3 sprigs fresh thyme
* 2 tbsp fresh rosemary chopped
* Salt and pepper to taste
* 2-3 tbsp avocado oil or other high temp oil
* 1 frozen puff pastry sheet
* 1 egg beaten for an egg wash

Directions:
1. Cube elk and season with a coarse salt.
2. Place in a Dutch oven (the Dutch oven is key!) on the stove at medium high heat.
3. Using the avocado oil, brown the elk on all sides. This can be done in batches for best results. Remove the browned elk and set aside. Note: The elk may not be cooked all the way, which is fine.
4. Reduce heat to medium, add shallots to the pot and cook until soft.
5. Add the mushrooms and carrots to the pot and cook for 5 minutes.
6. Add the red wine and cook for 2 minutes.
7. Add flour to the pot and mix well.
8. Add stock, bay leaf, thyme, rosemary and the browned elk to the pot. Cover and simmer on low until elk and vegetables are tender, about 1 1⁄2 to 2 hours depending on the cut of meat. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. About 45 minutes before the elk is finished, remove puff pastry from the freezer to thaw.
10. Set the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
11. Remove the bay leaf from the elk mixture and then pour it into a 10” cast iron pan. Top with puff pastry.
12. Brush the top of the puff pastry with the egg mixture.
13. Bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39975790/322275446/-1056732061?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_TAN_GEN_AC_20211223_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTljMjBjZC0yZDY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cnZF0TSue3OerWnvNrW3zlzRXBYdsazXIqzzYqzPMH0=&emci=ff9b20cd-2d64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=019c20cd-2d64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=252045) _*recipe and photo from[Hunt to Eat](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39975791/322275447/-1426275989?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_TAN_GEN_AC_20211223_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTljMjBjZC0yZDY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cnZF0TSue3OerWnvNrW3zlzRXBYdsazXIqzzYqzPMH0=&emci=ff9b20cd-2d64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=019c20cd-2d64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=252045)_
---
[VOTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39975792/322275448/-1056732061?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_TAN_GEN_AC_20211223_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTljMjBjZC0yZDY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cnZF0TSue3OerWnvNrW3zlzRXBYdsazXIqzzYqzPMH0=&emci=ff9b20cd-2d64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=019c20cd-2d64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=252045)
---
| _Leger Family Tamales_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39975793/322275449/-1056732061?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_TAN_GEN_AC_20211223_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTljMjBjZC0yZDY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cnZF0TSue3OerWnvNrW3zlzRXBYdsazXIqzzYqzPMH0=&emci=ff9b20cd-2d64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=019c20cd-2d64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=252045) Directions:
1. Cook pork roasts in a covered roasting pan on a pressure cooker with 2-3 inches of water at the bottom of the pan, until meat can be pulled apart easily with a fork.
2. Reserve the broth and fat, which will be used in the masa.
3. Refrigerate until fat separates.
4. Shred the cooked meat.
5. Boil the chile pods for 5 minutes, or roast them for a smokier flavor.
6. Roast chile at 300 degrees for about 6 minutes. When you smell roasting chile, they’re done.
7. After the chile pods cool, place in a blender with chicken broth or water and remaining ingredients. Blend until smooth. Should be the consistency of gravy. If too thick, add more broth or water.
8. Combine blended chile with the shredded meat and simmer for 1⁄2 hour. The meat should be coated with chile but not swimming in it.
9. Cool the meat/chile before assembling the tamales.
10. Rinse and soak the hojas in warm water for at least an hour before using. Tear strips out of some of the hojas for tying the tamales.
11. Mix the masa thoroughly with both hands — first with lard and broth rendered from the cooked meat. Then add extra lard to equal 2 1⁄2 required cups. It should taste slightly too salty.
12. Add more salt to taste.
13. Add more lard or broth if the masa appears too dry.

To assemble the tamales:
1. Take an hoja and lay it flat. With a butter knife, spread about two tablespoons of masa on one side of the hoja to a 1⁄4 inch thickness.
2. Place two tablespoons of chile in the middle and fold the hoja over, tucking in the sides.
3. Tie each end of the tamale with strips of hoja.

Cooking tamales:
1. Place a steam basket or leftover hojas on the bottom of a large pot with three inches of water.
2. Steam the tamales for one hour. If frozen, add an extra fifteen minutes.
3. Let them stand for 10 minutes after cooking so the masa can set.
4. If cooking more than two dozen at a time, more water will be needed during steaming.

---

clean_body: Folks, With Julie and the boys in New Mexico and my work in the Senate in DC, I enjoy the opportunities I get to cook for my family. One of my new favorites is an elk pot pie — a recipe I modified from an issue of ‘Hunt to Eat.’ My New Mexico colleagues, Senator Ben Ray Luján and Representative Teresa Leger Fernandez, have holiday, go-to recipes of their own. Like a good New Mexico family, we are all pretty sure our own recipe is the best, so we’re turning to you to help us decide. What do you think? | | Ben Ray’s New Mexico Green Chile Enchiladas Ingredients: 2 Chicken Breasts or one shredded rotisserie chicken 1 can of Cream of Mushroom Soup 1 can of Cream of Chicken Soup 2 cups diced green chile 9 -12 Corn Tortillas Olive oil Shredded Cheddar Jack Cheese Directions: 1. Boil the chicken breasts, let cool slightly and shred. 2. Set aside the water, the chicken was boiled in, for the next step. 3. Add garlic salt to green chile. 4. Heat small amount of olive oil in sauce pan. Lightly brown corn tortillas in the pan. Place on plate with paper towel to dry. 5. Combine both cream soups into a saucepan and add 2 cans of the chicken water and whisk until smooth. 6. Add green chile and chicken and heat thoroughly. 7. In a baking dish, layer corn tortillas, pour the cream soup mixture with chicken and green Chile. 8. Repeat layers until top layer is covered with soup chicken chile mixture and covered with cheese. 9. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 30 minutes or until heated throughout and cheese has melted. | Martin’s Elk Pot Pie with Wild Mushrooms Ingredients: 11⁄2 lbs elk cut into 1/2 inch cubes 1 lb sliced mushrooms (lobster mushrooms are best, but porcini (King Boletos) also do the trick) 1 shallot diced 2 carrots diced 2 cloves garlic minced 1/2 cup red wine 3 tbsp all-purpose flour 3 cups beef, venison, or elk stock 1/4 cup red wine vinegar 1 bay leaf 3 sprigs fresh thyme 2 tbsp fresh rosemary chopped Salt and pepper to taste 2-3 tbsp avocado oil or other high temp oil 1 frozen puff pastry sheet 1 egg beaten for an egg wash Directions: 1. Cube elk and season with a coarse salt. 2. Place in a Dutch oven (the Dutch oven is key!) on the stove at medium high heat. 3. Using the avocado oil, brown the elk on all sides. This can be done in batches for best results. Remove the browned elk and set aside. Note: The elk may not be cooked all the way, which is fine. 4. Reduce heat to medium, add shallots to the pot and cook until soft. 5. Add the mushrooms and carrots to the pot and cook for 5 minutes. 6. Add the red wine and cook for 2 minutes. 7. Add flour to the pot and mix well. 8. Add stock, bay leaf, thyme, rosemary and the browned elk to the pot. Cover and simmer on low until elk and vegetables are tender, about 1 1⁄2 to 2 hours depending on the cut of meat. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 9. About 45 minutes before the elk is finished, remove puff pastry from the freezer to thaw. 10. Set the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit. 11. Remove the bay leaf from the elk mixture and then pour it into a 10” cast iron pan. Top with puff pastry. 12. Brush the top of the puff pastry with the egg mixture. 13. Bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown. recipe and photo from | Leger Family Tamales Directions: 1. Cook pork roasts in a covered roasting pan on a pressure cooker with 2-3 inches of water at the bottom of the pan, until meat can be pulled apart easily with a fork. 2. Reserve the broth and fat, which will be used in the masa. 3. Refrigerate until fat separates. 4. Shred the cooked meat. 5. Boil the chile pods for 5 minutes, or roast them for a smokier flavor. 6. Roast chile at 300 degrees for about 6 minutes. When you smell roasting chile, they’re done. 7. After the chile pods cool, place in a blender with chicken broth or water and remaining ingredients. Blend until smooth. Should be the consistency of gravy. If too thick, add more broth or water. 8. Combine blended chile with the shredded meat and simmer for 1⁄2 hour. The meat should be coated with chile but not swimming in it. 9. Cool the meat/chile before assembling the tamales. 10. Rinse and soak the hojas in warm water for at least an hour before using. Tear strips out of some of the hojas for tying the tamales. 11. Mix the masa thoroughly with both hands — first with lard and broth rendered from the cooked meat. Then add extra lard to equal 2 1⁄2 required cups. It should taste slightly too salty. 12. Add more salt to taste. 13. Add more lard or broth if the masa appears too dry. To assemble the tamales: 1. Take an hoja and lay it flat. With a butter knife, spread about two tablespoons of masa on one side of the hoja to a 1⁄4 inch thickness. 2. Place two tablespoons of chile in the middle and fold the hoja over, tucking in the sides. 3. Tie each end of the tamale with strips of hoja. Cooking tamales: 1. Place a steam basket or leftover hojas on the bottom of a large pot with three inches of water. 2. Steam the tamales for one hour. If frozen, add an extra fifteen minutes. 3. Let them stand for 10 minutes after cooking so the masa can set. 4. If cooking more than two dozen at a time, more water will be needed during steaming. Thanks for voting. Whatever you cook this holiday season, I hope you enjoy it with the ones you love. — Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. subject: 8 days until 2022 — the year that we’ll put an end to Bill Lee’s recklessness
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee

| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39966644/322225592/1701703762?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211223lookingback_JM_openers_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTE2OGM2Zi0wNjY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=89HI5OtU6WEwkYzEunNhyf9gew-M9plTfId7Xxum-Pc=)
---
Can you believe it, Peter?
**In just 8 days, it’ll be 2022 — the year that we’ll finally put an end to Bill Lee’s reckless, irresponsible lack of leadership, and bring honesty and compassion back to the governorship.**
**** [Donate ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39966645/322225593/1701703762?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211223lookingback_JM_openers_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTE2OGM2Zi0wNjY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=89HI5OtU6WEwkYzEunNhyf9gew-M9plTfId7Xxum-Pc=)
---
Before we get too much further into the holidays, I wanted to take a minute to step back and look at how far we’ve come in _just 4 months_.
When we launched this campaign, I said in my announcement speech that this would be a campaign for ALL Tennesseans. No matter what you look like, where you were raised, or who you’ve voted for in the past, this campaign is for anyone who believes in those core Tennessee values of hospitality, volunteerism, and caring for our neighbors — the same values that our corrupt leaders have abandoned for lies, conspiracy theories, and divisiveness.
As our movement has taken shape, those foundational values have taken root. Over the last four months, I’ve met with Tennesseans from every part of the state: the rural areas, cities, suburbs, Appalachia, and everywhere in between.
One thing became abundantly clear: **Tennesseans are desperate for change**. People like you and me with families, who want to be able to afford good healthcare, be paid fairly for a hard day’s work, and be able to provide their children with a strong education.
That desire for change, and the shared understanding that we cannot afford another four years with a dangerous extremist in the Governor’s Mansion, is what keeps me going every day. [_**Will you make a donation of any amount now to help my team hit our $16,000 end-of-year goal and start the new year strong?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39966646/322225594/1701703762?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211223lookingback_JM_openers_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTE2OGM2Zi0wNjY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=89HI5OtU6WEwkYzEunNhyf9gew-M9plTfId7Xxum-Pc=)

clean_body: | | = Can you believe it, Peter? In just 8 days, it’ll be 2022 — the year that we’ll finally put an end to Bill Lee’s reckless, irresponsible lack of leadership, and bring honesty and compassion back to the governorship. ** = Before we get too much further into the holidays, I wanted to take a minute to step back and look at how far we’ve come in just 4 months. When we launched this campaign, I said in my announcement speech that this would be a campaign for ALL Tennesseans. No matter what you look like, where you were raised, or who you’ve voted for in the past, this campaign is for anyone who believes in those core Tennessee values of hospitality, volunteerism, and caring for our neighbors — the same values that our corrupt leaders have abandoned for lies, conspiracy theories, and divisiveness. As our movement has taken shape, those foundational values have taken root. Over the last four months, I’ve met with Tennesseans from every part of the state: the rural areas, cities, suburbs, Appalachia, and everywhere in between. One thing became abundantly clear: Tennesseans are desperate for change. People like you and me with families, who want to be able to afford good healthcare, be paid fairly for a hard day’s work, and be able to provide their children with a strong education. That desire for change, and the shared understanding that we cannot afford another four years with a dangerous extremist in the Governor’s Mansion, is what keeps me going every day. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you for joining us as we work to restore real leadership for the people of our great state. — Dr. Martin | Dr. Jason Martin is running for Governor because now more than ever Tennessee needs a leader who will start working to meet all of our needs. As an ICU physician, Dr. Martin has seen firsthand the devastating consequences of lies, corruption, and divisiveness in Nashville. This campaign — by and for ALL Tennesseans — is the antidote. =** | = | Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee 1831 12th Avenue S #175 Nashville, TN 37203 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Folks,

I know we’ve sent a lot of emails asking for your donation lately, but
there’s a good reason:

Our FEC end-of-quarter deadline hits in 8 days and we need 200 donors to
chip in by midnight to stay on track to win this battleground race.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6312?t=1007&akid=1774%2E3611125%2Eb5x3En ]This is our final deadline of the entire year. We get no do-overs. No
second chances. So if you could chip in $25 or any amount, I’d really
appreciate it.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6312?t=1014&amount=25&akid=1774%2E3611125%2Eb5x3En ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6312?t=1015&amount=50&akid=1774%2E3611125%2Eb5x3En ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6312?t=1016&amount=100&akid=1774%2E3611125%2Eb5x3En ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6312?t=1017&amount=200&akid=1774%2E3611125%2Eb5x3En ]Donate $200

It’s no secret that I’m a top target for Mitch McConnell and his dark
money buddies. The GOP can’t afford to lose a single seat if they want to
retake the Senate majority, and they thought Ohio was in the bag.

Now McConnnell and his cronies are pissed because polls have me
neck-and-neck with every self-funding, Republican extremist they could put
up against me.

We have a real shot at flipping this seat blue, but we need to build the
biggest grassroots effort Ohio has ever seen to compete with the millions
of dollars Republicans are pouring into this race. Seriously, you can’t
sit this one out.

So far, only about 38% of the people who gave to our campaign last quarter
have given this quarter. We can’t let our grassroots momentum come to a
standstill right before our end-of-year FEC report, especially when our
numbers will go public for everyone to see.

We have to pick up the pace, and that’s why I’m asking: [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6312?t=1008&akid=1774%2E3611125%2Eb5x3En ]will you please
make a contribution of $25 or any amount before midnight tonight? I
wouldn’t keep asking if it wasn’t so important.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6312?t=1013&amount=25&akid=1774%2E3611125%2Eb5x3En ]Other Amount

Thank you,

Tim Ryan

The Arizona Independent Redistricting Commission just finalized our map.
**We are (as expected) in the most competitve distcrict in Arizona and one of the most competitive in the country.**
That's why it's so important that we have the resources to be prepared for whatever the GOP is gearing up to throw our way.
**Electing Kirsten is a must. **She is the most qualified and experienced candidate, who will go to work and fight every day for the Southern Arizona values we all hold dear.

name: Ras Smith
subject: My reflections.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39967065/322227727/692104027?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzYyMGM3Ny0wODY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xmk6bCiGHMSuLUz6CtdWbQqc2jyG9vcvhPP6vCsSrEw=)
Friend,

I hope you have the chance to spend time with friends and family this holiday season -- whether it's by sharing a good meal, giving gifts, or giving back to your community through service.

The end of the year is always an important time for us to reflect on where we've been and where we're headed. Since we launched this campaign, I've been able to travel across Iowa meeting lots of different folks. I'm so proud of the vibrant communities we have to offer.

This year we saw workers rise up at John Deere to demand dignity and respect on the job. They did what it took, despite leaders at the very top refusing to stand with them. My opponent Kim Reynolds stood with Trump instead.

I have a feeling that more Iowans will be in a similar place at the ballot box in November. We're saying enough is enough, and we're ready to elect new leadership for Iowa. We're not waiting for anyone's permission to lead, or do what we feel is right for this great state.

[**If you're ready for a fresh start, please chip in $50, $25, or even just $5 to help us get ahead on our end-of-year fundraising goal. clean_body: | = Friend, I hope you have the chance to spend time with friends and family this holiday season -- whether it's by sharing a good meal, giving gifts, or giving back to your community through service. The end of the year is always an important time for us to reflect on where we've been and where we're headed. Since we launched this campaign, I've been able to travel across Iowa meeting lots of different folks. I'm so proud of the vibrant communities we have to offer. This year we saw workers rise up at John Deere to demand dignity and respect on the job. They did what it took, despite leaders at the very top refusing to stand with them. My opponent Kim Reynolds stood with Trump instead. I have a feeling that more Iowans will be in a similar place at the ballot box in November. We're saying enough is enough, and we're ready to elect new leadership for Iowa. We're not waiting for anyone's permission to lead, or do what we feel is right for this great state. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks in advance, Ras Smith Democrat for Governor = | | Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor Ras Smith for Governor P. name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Bad timing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Our fundraising is about to slow waaay down.
#
Derek, we’re running up against some bad timing.
You see, next week will be a race against the clock to meet our critical end-of-year fundraising goal _before the last major FEC deadline of the year on December 31._
This deadline is a BIG ONE. Everyone — from the news media to our primary opponents to Dr. Oz himself — will look at this next FEC report to judge our campaign’s full strength.
**But it’s also the holidays, which means we anticipate online fundraising slowing waaay down during the final days of 2021.**
Look, it’s good our campaign is powered by real people. People like you in Cresco who are focused on their families and friends right now, not FEC reporting deadlines. 😂
But the flip side is, ultra-rich GOP self-funders like Dr. Oz don’t even have to worry about raising money for their campaigns. They’re already doing that themselves.
If we’re going to finish the year strong enough to compete with our multi-millionaire opponent and GOP super PACs, then we need to ask if you can do something to support John Fetterman before you log off for the holiday weekend...
**[Please help us get a critical head start on our end-of-year goal by chipping in $5 right now. Meeting this goal is critical if we’re going to beat Dr. Oz, elect John, and flip Pennsylvania’s U.S. Senate seat blue.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38884?refcode=em20211223-3936&t=1&akid=3936%2E434096%2ELzfIMF)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38884?refcode=em20211223-3936&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=3936%2E434096%2ELzfIMF)**
What we raise today will make a really big difference to whether or not we can reach our end-of-year fundraising goal before midnight on December 31, and we really can’t afford to fall short right before we head into election year. Anything you can chip in today, even a few bucks, means a lot to John and our whole team.
Thank you for everything,
Team Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211223-3936-footer&t=21&refcode2=3936_434096_LzfIMF&akid=3936%2E434096%2ELzfIMF)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=22&akid=3936%2E434096%2ELzfIMF)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=3936%2E434096%2ELzfIMF)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Folks, I urgently need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Folks, **a new poll came out showing me tied with a far-right Trump Republican.** With the Senate majority hanging in the balance, we cannot afford to fall behind in this campaign.
If we're going to protect our Democratic majority in the Senate, we have to win here in New Hampshire. But the GOP has endless resources, and they're pulling out all the stops.
So far, National Republicans like Betsy DeVos and Mike Pence have visited the Granite State to rally their far-right base. And just this month, a Republican super PAC placed a **_$1.2 MILLION_** ad buy in New Hampshire, bringing the total spent against me to almost **_$7 MILLION**_.
If this recent poll indicates anything, it's that these attacks are starting to break through. **It's clear that this race will be an uphill battle, but I'm no stranger to tough fights.** In 2016, I won by only 1,017 votes, beating the incumbent Republican in one of the closest races in history.
I know we can turn these polls around and pull ahead, but we urgently need your help.
If we're going to win, it will take an army of grassroots supporters. [**We don't need megadonors like Republicans, but we do need people like you, friend, to chip in and split a donation between my campaign and Mark Kelly’s.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-hassan-dec21?refcode=em211223-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1836_6688874_pglpFZ&akid=1836%2E6688874%2EpglpFZ)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will automatically be evenly split between Maggie Hassan and Mark Kelly:_

New Hampshire is a real swing state, and news outlets across the country are calling me one of the most vulnerable Democratic Senators up for reelection. This is a critical moment in the campaign, and it's vital that we have the resources to hold this seat.
Your support is so important to my campaign and me, and we're counting on you. [**So please, if you can, split $3 today between my campaign and Mark Kelly’s to help protect our vulnerable Senate majority.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-hassan-dec21?refcode=em211223-1-15&t=26&refcode2=1836_6688874_pglpFZ&akid=1836%2E6688874%2EpglpFZ)

Happy holidays and warm wishes from my family to yours,

Delina

| Hi there, Peter!

I wanted to take a moment to wish you and your loved ones a happy holiday season.

This has been a challenging year for all of us, and I hope you are taking time to rest and spend time with loved ones. I am so grateful for the frontline workers and healthcare professionals who have made it possible for so many of us to safely reunite with our families in this holiday season.

However you celebrate this time of year, we all have different traditions we follow with our families and loved ones. My family always gets together for brunch on Christmas Day, and it is one of my favorite meals of the year. We also play board games that become highly competitive. If you’d like to share, I would love to hear about your family’s holiday traditions.

I hope that this season brings you joy, health, and happiness. From my family to yours, happy holidays!

clean_body: Friend, We need to talk. I told my team that I wanted to offer you an invitation to RENEW your Official Trump Founding Membership for 2022. I don't usually offer Patriots the chance to RENEW their Trump Founding Memberships early, but YOU are one of my TOP supporters, so I've decided to make an exception just for you. For a short time, when you make your next contribution, you will automatically RENEW your Official Trump Founding Membership for 2022. This offer is only available for the NEXT HOUR, Friend. After that, the invitation will PERMANENTLY EXPIRE and you won't get to RENEW your membership early. SUPPORTER: EARLY RENEWAL STATUS:PENDING DEADLINE: 1 HOUR 2022 Trump Founding Members will go down in HISTORY as the Patriots who SAVED AMERICA from Joe Biden and the radical Left. Friend, for the sake of our country - and the future of our children and grandchildren - we must do everything we can to TAKE BACK our Republican Majority in 2022, and then the White House in 2024. Thank you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee on behalf of Save America and the Make America Great Again PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Donaldjtrump.com Save America, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219 |

name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: I have a personal favor to ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I didn’t want to be the one to tell you this but we’re out of option and Conservatives are dangerously behind our LAST AND MOST CRUCIAL deadline of the year.
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?34wzf--fgxr-4qqlpo5&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

This is Sarah Huckabee Sanders. I have a personal favor to ask of you:
[**I’m hoping you’ll pitch in $17 right now. Why? Because Democrats just CRUSHED their “must-hit” fundraising goal AND outraised us by $115,000,000+ from texts and emails like this one.**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-34wzf-1ql1q-4qqlpo3/)
Conservatives are so close to winning back the House but if we give up now, all our hard work will be for NOTHING.
**This is urgent.** I’m partnering with my friend Steve Scalise to build an unstoppable surge of support to help our Conservative allies and defeat the Democrats NATIONWIDE.
[**We are both counting on you to be a part of it.**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-34wzf-1ql1r-4qqlpo4/)
Look, we don’t have scores of Trump-hating billionaires forking over tons of cash to our campaigns, and we don’t have the Liberal Media on our side _**(trust me, I know that better than anyone)**... _
**But what we DO have is something to be much more proud of:**
We have a movement of strong Conservative Patriots who love our Country and believe we should ALWAYS PUT AMERICA FIRST.
[**We cannot win back the House alone. Please do your part and join us by chipping in $17 or more straight away.**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-34wzf-1ql1s-4qqlpo5/)
Thanks for all you do.

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-34wzf-1ql1t-4qqlpo6/)
Sarah Huckabee Sanders

name: SIGN PRESIDENT BIDEN'S CARD (via DCCC)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Will you sign our holiday card for Joe and Jill Biden?
| | | [SIGN THE CARD: Wish the Bidens a Happy Holiday season >>](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

We're feeling the holiday spirit here at Democratic Headquarters.

We've lit our menorahs. We've trimmed our trees. And we've even set our New Year's Resolutions.

But there's one thing left to do to make this the BEST holiday season EVER: _**Send out our holiday cards!**_

So we're putting together a card from our DCCC team _(signed by our AMAZING grassroots supporters like you)_ to our favorite First Family: The Bidens!

**Will you sign our holiday card for Joe and Jill to help make this the best and brightest year yet?**

[](https://links.e.dccc.)
After a year of working tirelessly on behalf of the American people, President Biden and his family deserve an AMAZING holiday.

**That 's why we're calling on 12,250 of our best supporters to sign the Bidens' card before midnight tonight and help make this their best holiday season yet. Can we count on you?**

---
[QUICKLY: Sign the Bidens' holiday card before midnight tonight! >>](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

Thanks,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46152702&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE0MjY1MTI4MwS2&l=14283550&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46152702&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE0MjY1MTI4MwS2&l=14283550&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

name: Gary Black
subject: Merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/45f28384cf05ff51/c1747ce12f111147c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
# **Friend — With Christmas Eve tomorrow and Christmas Day to follow, I hope each of you enjoy happy and peaceful times with your family and loved ones. **

---
That’s what we’ll be doing — and we’ll be reflecting on the true meaning of Christmas. This is a season of hope. Every year in our home we read the Christmas story in Luke 2. This year, we wanted to share a few verses to fill you with hope, as this does for our family.
---
[| | |
---|---|---](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/45f28384cf05ff51/4bdb40020104fa5cc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
Merry Christmas to you, your family, friends, and loved ones!
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/45f28384cf05ff51/f29a7e68ed5e62fdc3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
Gary Black

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: WSJ: Democrats Shouldn’t Build Back Bitter
body:
[](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=da80b798b9744905bb9c7852e727e8ca&_e=wzPJZy0SjipAp7dgTSg5Y9GGH_x2njRw7tr81qkrmSHc9NUN-lFMuEhuTQzzR_z7d2DKGF9I6F-6SuoN7j2ch48H41zXZx1N0IYCii8R5BWJajs_E7VR7pT1o8kui1O6cL1iOLZbZUmwgcadU34oj2ydIZ8M_14_C5cIOtGpQEfvh4Y6ASJUfC0oF2jK5EZgeYj3gHA1NfT_-rCljDjvjpGIYogTB71VP6zgGQpMGn4OyPNCFXNJkSRAmmLsyuhBFPnPIfOsmsIYS3wSXsEqoQ%3D%3D) Democrats Shouldn’t Build Back Bitter By Bobby Jindal Manchin’s ‘no’ is a chance for Biden to return to his campaign promise of bipartisan reconciliation. | |
---
Democrats blame Sen. Joe Manchin for sinking their ship by announcing he’ll oppose the Build Back Better bill. They should give him credit for saving them, and the nation, from themselves. Now that they’ve failed to bully him, they should take his concerns seriously and do the hard work of holding hearings, convincing the public, and enacting reforms one step at a time through regular order.

President Biden is to blame for their predicament. Mr. Biden won the Democratic nomination by not being Bernie Sanders, won the White House by not being Donald Trump, and promptly tried to govern as if he had a mandate for Sanders-style policies. “Nobody elected him to be FDR,” Rep. Abigail Spanberger, a moderate Virginia Democrat elected in 2018, said of Mr. Biden after her state’s voters trounced their party in November. “They elected him to be normal and stop the chaos.”
_Read more_**[HERE](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=da80b798b9744905bb9c7852e727e8ca&_e=wzPJZy0SjipAp7dgTSg5YzMovXO2sXC1Zom80uOvfhNByUI4jLDku0LaRSXoDogToBj-f1m896twrxjJi59O0_4l9ltlC4urw4o01G7QNUuW6xX926BcW0h62IKUYsIHVQt4uyrE-X7t_uMb7KUVE-ibOZezqmxxOXPCBbk_wdiOpZ5515MQdQ81N-zre0BSYSREkIMRt2EVjLCSDvssfHLeFOhRvV5iNYBOS83tu43XC0wXMNx2QhKc5nbljXWM6gsOJ5gZedTqTjGYkZ5gQL9w9QdkMI787tZdUzmYhVTyIEJ7ttwgb18wKvzdXvdJSHWpuhCF8rXHbb2PZbbyCtnYSzai1AQjo1HjXj2P3DM_o2MM1AvNhNRbhFAdvH8qwtetsy1RuGFxnfgRN1c_H1WG-WM9RdmUmiCijwF9El0%3D)**.

| Peter,

I wanted to take a moment to wish you and your family a happy holiday season.

This has been a difficult year for all of us, but we also have a lot to be grateful for. We should be deeply grateful to the frontline workers who have kept our economy moving forward during the pandemic, and also for the scientists who worked hard to develop a vaccine that allows us to safely celebrate this holiday with our families and loved ones.

Speaking personally, I am so grateful to have your support.

However you celebrate this season, I hope you are able to find moments of peace and joy with your loved ones. I look forward to continuing our work together through the new year.

With gratitude, [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39977142/322282761/-1089111386?refcode=blu-swc-20211223-1-em&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2ZiNjY2Yi0zYTY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wX5bTTnPwe6C1WJz5xp69nARrvk5mGWS47FiCUYbU3A=)
