| Dear Friends, This time of year I find myself reflecting on the importance of seeking out the unseen among us, and I think of my parents. They are my best examples of identifying the needs of others, valuing all people, and thinking big to create a more inclusive world. My parents Alvin and Barbara Price served in Romania as Humanitarian missionaries for The Church of Jesus-Christ of Latter-day Saints from 1990-1991. Romania had been under communist rule just a year prior. Under communism, disabled children were not recognized by the state, and parents could not receive food stamps for their children with disabilities, leaving many families unable to afford care and forced to place their children in orphanages. Once placed in an orphanage, many children never left the building. My parents began working with these children, and quickly decided they needed to shine a light on the dire situation in which many of these children lived. They decided they could do this by starting a Romanian Special Olympics. Barbara became the president of the Romanian Special Olympic Committee with the blessing of the International Special Olympic Committee. Then she and my dad decided to start with 500 athletes, a major undertaking considering many of these athletes had never been outside their buildings. But they managed to transport the 500 children outdoors to their Olympic trials, time their races, and separate them into heats. My mom asked the head of the Foreign Ambassadors Wives’ Club if she could recruit some members to officiate. She and her club members were delighted by the request and excited to help. My mom was then able to call the Romanian government officials and convince them to send officials. She also received donations from Germany, France, and the United States. But even with the help of those donations, the Romanian officials, the wives of the ambassadors, most of the US Marine Guards stationed at the U.S. Embassy, and missionaries young and old from the Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints, they still needed more help and were starting to panic. Then, two nights before the event, someone knocked on the door. Barbara and Al opened it to find four young men who announced they were from the local Athletic University and had heard there would be a track meet. They wanted to know how they could help. Al asked them to meet him the next day so he could train them in officiating. They met him and the specified time and location and brought many additional athletes from the university with them. These student-athletes were shocked to learn how underserved the Special Olympians were and petitioned the dean of their college to institute classes instructing students on working with disabled children. When the dean said he would think about it, the students staged a sit-in until he agreed to start the class the following week. At last, the time arrived for the start of Romania’s first Special Olympics. At the start of the event, it began to rain. But then, miraculously, the rain lifted and every athlete had the chance to compete in perfect weather and receive a medal and a receive a hug from the "official huggers"— the Marines. Once the event ended, the rain started again. The Romanian Government initially declined to send the official state television station to cover the event, so my parents had reached out to the BBC, a public station from Boston, and Reuters out of Germany. My dad told the government these other stations would be covering the event, so they agreed, again reluctantly, to rebroadcast the event in half-hour segments every week for the rest of the summer. Because of those broadcasts, many Romanians saw and recognized for the first time the existence of its disabled population. That visibility led to drastic improvements. Parents were allowed to receive food stamps for their disabled children. Disabled children could be treated in hospitals and attend public schools. Parents learned there were other parents with disabled children, and they were able to find each other and help each other. My dad once said that this Special Olympics was the single most important thing he’s ever done. And I think about it often when I think of public service. I believe that the top priority of any elected official should be bettering the lives of every citizen they serve. This often requires being proactive, productive, and inclusive. It often requires thinking beyond a party line, and it often requires meeting people where they are to build coalitions and collaborate with a variety of people with a variety of thoughts and perspectives. The problems facing our country are not easy problems to solve. But I am fortunate to have had examples of thinking innovatively to solve problems. My goal is to better the life of every Utahn I serve, and I look forward to doing this work in the U.S. Senate.
---
| I wish you and yours a very happy holiday!
---
|
---
|
---
|

| Peter, I sent this email back in April when President Trump endorsed my campaign for the U.S. Senate. But I wanted to reach out again in case you missed it. [He believes I am the best candidate to represent the great state of Alabama through my proven conservative record and I am confident that with his support and yours we will Take America Back!](https://mobrooksforsen.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYl5kI5FGvvVrRHG_uYbe7RlxQVoDhm5dicBZtQGy2o_AVdpptyvRuyk5JpCthB_Wkw&e=2bb0250de6a743cf472d1821e5b3b009&utm_source=mobrooksforsen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=trump_endorsement_12_23&n=3)

body:

| | **Friend, ** **_As deadlines become real for service members across the various branches of the military, the Pentagon confirms it does not yet know the full effect on readiness of discharging thousands – or more._** **I wrote to the DOD in October, asking for detailed answers about the impact the mandate would have on our armed forces.Yet I’m still waiting on a response -- and even last week the Pentagon press secretary confirms[ _they don't know the impact of discharging service members._](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/19dGbJ3NAeyNn7L5jjyJXNFM)** **The DOD did NOT look at the impact of the vaccine mandate and still don't know the impact as they began discharging service members last week.**

[ ](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/19dGydbnPD3NbJMabg8x8WLV)
| **Why on earth would our military discharge thousands of brave men and women for not complying with an egregious vaccine mandate ___without even studying the impact it will have on our military’s readiness? _I do not support weakening our armed forces at a time like this, and neither should YOU!**
---
[ ](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/19dGUHiY51yN0lNf3cIkk5S4)
| **Thank you for your continued support,** **Jim Inhofe**

From my family to yours, happy holidays! Talk soon, Jasmine

name: Anna Kelly - Communications Director
subject: A Biden Carol
body:
The ghosts of three crises are arriving this Christmas.

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden_carol_e_solicit_v3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Friend -- Joe Biden is looking a lot more like Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas season. [**Friend, will you chip in just $12.25 for our Christmas Challenge?**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVr7WCy52dBqjGjMD4e0jzsiOJkaO_pdKRNonJNUP1r_Q&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden_carol_e_solicit_v3&n=2) The ghosts of three crises are looming over Wisconsin. As families grapple with higher prices, rising crime, and economic destruction, the abysmal failure of Democrat policies has become more clear than ever. **Republicans need to take back the House and Senate so that we can most effectively fight back – so we are hoping to find 100 supporters to contribute just $12.25 before Christmas.** It may not seem like a lot, but the cumulative $1,225 will make a huge difference as we work to close out 2021 strong. [**A strong showing in our Christmas Challenge will help us fuel our efforts when the election season goes into high gear.**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVr7WCy52dBqjGjMD4e0jzsiOJkaO_pdKRNonJNUP1r_Q&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden_carol_e_solicit_v3&n=3) Unlike the Democrats, we don’t have coastal liberals funding our efforts – instead, we count on grassroots supporters like you to make sure we can compete with Democrats and their California and New York donors. This election cycle will once again be a game of inches – and even $12.25 could mean the difference between winning and losing. [**Can you help?**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVr7WCy52dBqjGjMD4e0jzsiOJkaO_pdKRNonJNUP1r_Q&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden_carol_e_solicit_v3&n=4) Thanks, Anna Kelly
Communications Director
Republican Party of Wisconsin | [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVr7WCy52dBqjGjMD4e0jzsiOJkaO_pdKRNonJNUP1r_Q&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden_carol_e_solicit_v3&n=5 "DONATE $12.25") [DONATE $12.25](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVr7WCy52dBqjGjMD4e0jzsiOJkaO_pdKRNonJNUP1r_Q&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=biden_carol_e_solicit_v3&n=5)

Under federal law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $2900 for the primary election, $2,900 for the primary run-off election, and $2,900 for the general election. Couples may make contributions from a joint account, but each contributor must sign the check (or other written instrument) or a statement that accompanies the contribution. Qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $5,000 for the primary election and $5,000 for the general election. Non-qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $2,900 for the primary election and $2,900 for the general election. Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle.

name: Mike Collier
subject: Happy Holidays! (And thank you)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89772/images/Logo%20%282%29.png]
Hi y’all, it’s Mike here. Before you log off this week to spend time with your loved ones, I really didn’t want to miss the chance to say happy holidays, and to wish you a season filled with peace and happiness, whether you celebrate Christmas, Hanukkah, or other faith traditions.

Most importantly, I wanted to say thank you. To me, this time of year is about rejoicing in the blessings we have. And I sure am grateful for you — for your partnership, your friendship, and your support. Whether you’ve attended an event, pitched in to help our campaign, or taken time to read messages like this one, I want to express how thankful I am for you.

After we fell just short of our mid-month fundraising goal last week, grassroots donors like you stepped up and chipped in to my campaign. As I travel around Texas, it means a lot to know that this team has my back. It’s how I can spend more time actually talking to voters — and less time fundraising.

Plus, I’m not taking a single penny from corporate PACs or wealthy special interests like my opponent Dan Patrick, so a grassroots-funded campaign is the only way we’ll win.

I’ll admit: Sometimes, the days are long. I find myself climbing into my F-150, exhausted, hours away from home, mentally and physically gearing myself up for the drive back.

But then I think about the conversations I’ve had with folks like you who just want to do the right thing for our beloved state. And I remember how proud I am of this movement that’s fueled by everyday Texans — powered by parents worried about health care, students who deserve better, more affordable education, and by women who need the constitutional right to control over their bodies protected.

And it inspires me all over again to keep fighting for what’s right. That’s a gift I know I’m lucky to have.

So, thanks again. Sometimes I feel like I don’t say it enough, but I am eternally grateful for y’all and the important part you play in the people-powered movement we’re building together.

We’ll talk soon, but for now, I hope you’re getting some much-needed rest and relaxation as we gear up for a big year ahead.

Yours,

Mike
The Collier Committee
P.O. Box 14648
Humble, TX 77347
United States
[https://collierfortexas.com/] |
Paid for by the Collier Committee
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We believe that emails are the best way to connect with our supporters and keep you up-to-date. However, if you’d still like to receive fewer emails, fill out this form here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/2abP63YYcUqXP5eHRkxWIQ2]. If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please unsubscribe. [https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/803c68df-0262-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/68f5e45f-3c64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGY1ZTQ1Zi0zYzY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KqrqX012ml_wwLiluJJbJP57WpA8iGakt-1OZB1BeDQ=&id=109059170]

This simple action, according to the Roosevelt Institute, would increase the wealth of Black Americans by 40%. name: Herschel Walker
subject: Time to play up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I have the mentality that in the 4th quarter of every game, you PLAY UP. The best players give the remaining minutes, even seconds, their absolute all I have the mentality that in the 4th quarter of every game, you PLAY UP. The best players give the remaining minutes, even seconds, their absolute all. |
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1b5f0d5027174809bc475db099fd18bc&_e=GSnn7VEJc3xKg7JRp5SO9vsIxxuwLJgOubRZM_aQHVuoZMp7swBCMlXoIMnrHC9sL2JLlr1O6A41MgMCTdWwDwgyj41K83lJmYzZzteCBTXwAH9TT5_2UbdPubv1tQPrurIGz4joiZj4G3zeLuzkEV-Y8Afs9WIk8hOkExp3z1v5XHHDT97CIQG_ajwlz86Hl3qN1iRkVjGd2J-xP67tK4m_gybHmn9QQOB04ZfiUIMWLCa6fXwGnlgoiqK1tHkHCFvjbWcLKcVD46use5bgzslOiFwgiIc-oRXpNSvdRVS48-J1UUps-ANczwd9wKRDB8HY6w9udxoIV8BtIp4tJ2n5DlSK_nJOBubm2lRHkNZDpKSYmAux0jUuNquC6f3gc6vBSS0FHN0Xw6qScNK72d3Eg7wT3T_7BK1eMQMOKqdDcK9LT49u7xjP5ADLuRR023JgePfyWH65AY41Zh2yHA%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American,

We are all preparing for the holidays with our families, but before you turn off your emails and shut down your notifications to spend some important, quality time with your loved ones, we have one final request before Christmas.

**It's incredibly important that we finish strong in the 4th Quarter so we launch full-speed-ahead into the new year - _the election year!_**

To do that, Team Herschel needs to put up strong fundraising numbers on the year-end report to the Federal Election Commission (FEC), **[and we need your help to make that possible.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1b5f0d5027174809bc475db099fd18bc&_e=GSnn7VEJc3xKg7JRp5SO9vsIxxuwLJgOubRZM_aQHVuoZMp7swBCMlXoIMnrHC9sL2JLlr1O6A41MgMCTdWwDwgyj41K83lJmYzZzteCBTXwAH9TT5_2UbdPubv1tQPrurIGz4joiZj4G3zeLuzkEV-Y8Afs9WIk8hOkExp3z1v5XHHDT97CIQG_ajwlz86Hl3qN1iRkVjGd2J-xP67tK4m_gybHmn9QQOB04ZfiUIMWLCa6fXwGnlgoiqK1tHkHiK677Cuqn9rACA6IwLflGslXqtSa1jZM9L4N2ZFvkB-Gn4sYTl2kJG3eoOs4Gm6ni0IWqfeaqohzpRPJ-1ejW-vbgOPuE3R5rfhDbGsrUVaOYoxN_7xQcFJWhnc8iOAEubtZCQdD37bP1UNzqzMj7PtC8kXvHuHYtzsx--8yHiPf48R6s_ORLryDB4IEa9iUfLxAJXe0Y95iT8DolQTV1A%3D%3D)**

**Throughout my football career, I have embraced the idea that in the 4th Quarter of every game, you PLAY UP.** When the clock runs out, nothing can be changed. The best players give the final minutes, even seconds, their absolute all.

Check it out — > A recent poll shows Liz Cheney's challenger beating her among registered Republicans in Wyoming Harriet is right! The Great People of Wyoming are furious at Liz Cheney. She is pursuing her own agenda and the agenda of radical democrats in D.C. The people of Wyoming are worried about inflation, our supply chain, and gas prices; not this sham of an investigation that is the Jan. 6 commission. That is why Harriet is leading in the polls by 20%!_ Thank you, Team Hageman | | | |

Donald J. Trump December 23rd, 2021
Has it been at all noticed that I offered to debate anybody, on television or otherwise, about the RIGGED Presidential Election of 2020. This was a publicly stated challenge—I have been called a “ratings machine,” and therefore would be good for television economics—which have not been doing so well lately. With all the bravado out there, I have not had one credible person willing to stand up and debate me in order to defend the CROOKED election. All involved, like those on the Unselect Committee of January 6th, know that it is a losing proposition for them. The election numbers are not defensible. Arizona, Michigan, Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, Georgia, Nevada, and probably New Hampshire, Minnesota, New Mexico, and others were all won, and in some cases big, by a certain Republican Presidential Candidate, me. So, after one month, a very public offer to debate, I have no takers—not even the sleazebags you see on the January 6th Commission who speak with such fake reverence about the day. This is Cancel Culture. They think they got away with the Crime of the Century, and they don’t want it to be talked about or discussed. Look at what has happened to our Country, and what a shame it is!

Trump December 23rd, 2021 Has it been at all noticed that I offered to debate anybody, on television or otherwise, about the RIGGED Presidential Election of 2020. This was a publicly stated challenge—I have been called a “ratings machine,” and therefore would be good for television economics—which have not been doing so well lately. With all the bravado out there, I have not had one credible person willing to stand up and debate me in order to defend the CROOKED election. All involved, like those on the Unselect Committee of January 6th, know that it is a losing proposition for them. The election numbers are not defensible. Arizona, Michigan, Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, Georgia, Nevada, and probably New Hampshire, Minnesota, New Mexico, and others were all won, and in some cases big, by a certain Republican Presidential Candidate, me. So, after one month, a very public offer to debate, I have no takers—not even the sleazebags you see on the January 6th Commission who speak with such fake reverence about the day. This is Cancel Culture. They think they got away with the Crime of the Century, and they don’t want it to be talked about or discussed. Look at what has happened to our Country, and what a shame it is! | ---|--- Donald J. clean_body: Sorry to bother you on a holiday weekend, but we wanted to reach out because our final and most important fundraising deadline of the year is ineight days. Before the clock strikes midnight on January 1, 2022 , our team has to make every day count to ensure we hit our critically important $25,000 fundraising goal. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = | = = | = | = The GOP has billion-dollar donors bankrolling their campaigns, and they believe that we can’t keep up — but with your unwavering support, we have what it takes to give them a run for their money. = As always, we’re grateful to have you on our team. We hope you’re having a happy and healthy holiday season. — Team Mondaire = * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. Fellow Conservative - here's some polling that came out earlier this year:

**GEORGIA SENATE RACE
Warnock 48% - Walker 46%**
**On one hand, this is amazing news!** We're virtually tied with the Democrat incumbent even though I've never run for political office before. It's incredible that this race would be so close out of the starting gate!

**On the other hand, this is also alarming news** because national Democrats see how tight the race is and are desperately re-doubling their efforts to attack our campaign and prevent us from pulling ahead.

**[We need your help, Fellow Conservative, so we can pick up the momentum, win this race, and help Republicans win back the Senate majority.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=dbedd25f8e6d41ceb459adaea2adfce6&_e=vKDLA6FrL6-TCBWEw15n4D0iG1Ar62xvBal1URzV6v7-mPVBp8zff13NgTsQMhf_VoPHl6xDdnpmB8Al6QICf9jEWSI4-vR6xmZjftPd1517iK7Qk6rAYuCaoJwLku_5eJGntnzSmkyVhXpQA-ZqGEZvq5mQqYsfwbYtBegJmw3DLOx8bBAhzt3iAmjXRewhYVfIUY615xp7n17U3iiwFsRED8tiRaGjM2spg4172cwMOso7BAxznYhIvH_rNCInGrTc3ATE5GVSBOfqrF_7J6PKIHU-xc-KZm1R4_UTdQaslxFehta78J4bqB039Odvxx8FFWRzmtmC62i5qCtijoFn0znxw5HH5fkJ6miYxagVgc8VoaZ6_xUeXCHzDYxZAHR6d-gg4lbPTuXjHuZrgfUXkbSM8uFkYLGSU15ZykfyV-ttgbCKL8Z1_mAcLudHIxKmE4UeKsL58ikzf5Go2g%3D%3D)**

I need your help if we want any chance at winning this race and helping Republicans WIN BACK the Senate majority in 2022. | Fellow Conservative - here's some polling that came out earlier this year: GEORGIA SENATE RACE Warnock 48% - Walker 46% On one hand, this is amazing news! We're virtually tied with the Democrat incumbent even though I've never run for political office before. It's incredible that this race would be so close out of the starting gate! On the other hand, this is also alarming news because national Democrats see how tight the race is and are desperately re-doubling their efforts to attack our campaign and prevent us from pulling ahead. The 4th quarter is the first full fundraising quarter we've had since entering this race, so we need to show strength on our year-end fundraising report. Our finance team has told me we need 338 more donors to give to our campaign BEFORE MIDNIGHT to give us the boost we need on our critical Federal Election Commission report. Republicans MUST WIN BACK the Senate majority this election. Everything is on the line: our military, our economy, the security of our streets and border, and the very fabric of our nation. I got off the sidelines and jumped into this senate race because we cannot afford to fall short. This race is neck and neck, but we can gain critical momentum Please stand with me. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican for U.S. Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

body:
| | | **Only 5% of Congress are moms.** Working families will never see the policies we need until there are more moms with a seat at the table driving our priorities forward.
As a mom of three young children, I know what it’s like to balance work while making sure my children stay safe, happy and healthy. I speak for all of the other parents out there when I say that we would do anything to protect our kids— which makes what happened this week in Congress so infuriating.
Earlier this week, Sen. Manchin blocked critical funding for childcare when he went on Fox News to say he would be a “no” vote on Build Back Better. His opposition to these critical policies are a direct attack on parents like me and working families across the country.
[**In Congress, I’ll fight for working families and defend against the Republicans and corporate Democrats who are putting lobbyists ahead of us. Stand with me and chip in before our December 31 deadline!**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtR7WNj0Vvrg4HKrNk9USOunoX-04ND2SQFX-pBY04xC8dfY5lAS6ZkL9QgxZQ8xwmI5hp1HLFGCTUb7c-On9mveJT9MO9qjHNfflO5FMrK2C7sr_O5wplNL14QHXvgyJB8zzIEIj7dPEl4Qo7OvsDh4Mue73jFYZlR6n4Wp1yO5W6taDW8kUAw6zoFkS7jGiFvVCqMfLDExb8SK8dfnPf3gkkDhY5yTOSGlSJkZYG0l6e02DzPcKRil4iR9bdYkTig9FrPIAIwyd2OJ6h35HYzZDiWJcH-UJQZ9llTNKiO6U5a7brUZ433Y8KYYIbs8XOSD3WOgIez159qB5lyxod1zztmxTxn5cGfCb_VxoT9I-tiXAGOc8BDWrx8tL1kQO4/3i3/ydx01GmqRYGZubYRu4kj_A/h0/GDTFwaqO5cAThRIv_xbQF699EK_F7s5_wi3E1Wi0Uas)
[****](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtR7WNj0Vvrg4HKrNk9USOunoX-04ND2SQFX-pBY04xC8dfY5lAS6ZkL9QgxZQ8xwmkT7D0p3TBKelRTwjQ_jceFo1hrqhxmvmQ8w1FMJ1ml6OymCn-9Y6e5e9Q0TJAeglunUG74ufRT9-LDqoKeDXSe6zJGn3n3l_xpSgnDkqpI8lDAROTseGMUcZ3W9NOsYk084RZgiDM2MCb0Pp-dgOe1WR3yhmkdC46bT7jIaflFfMDiF_bEzeZtO_tbsJ06ApaFPu85JcaIQHA811793yPZhIotw8eaFJM2PHTSr0SqHCq7LOWllm1dzWyH-Zm6XMADdP44-o-eC5qODJ7yt6Nw3lGa8JXyCxFyImCcC07q8WzsFAA3N44m5sPlfmZ5sP/3i3/ydx01GmqRYGZubYRu4kj_A/h1/AI4M257SYnsaFaFO0MgWMd8WgOEhcx6BfKG8zBupvNQ)Electing just any Democrat will not bring us the solutions we need if those Democrats, like Senators Manchin and Sinema, are willing to sell out our needs to whichever lobbyist will cut the biggest check. This is why I am refusing all corporate lobbyist donations. **
** **When I get to Congress, I will fight for universal childcare, guaranteed paid family leave and extended public education from pre-K through public college because I know what it’s like to be a working parent in this country today.**
****If we want a more equitable America that puts the safety and future of our families first, then we need to elect more moms.
[**Can you donate to my campaign for Congress before our end of quarter deadline to help me start the new year strong in the fight for working families?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtR7WNj0Vvrg4HKrNk9USOunoX-04ND2SQFX-pBY04xC8dfY5lAS6ZkL9QgxZQ8xwmGS97umTOZ4869mcHSH5XIrLoNk5K_xeaAin-QSNYb4GMcV_GWO-Ect1shLtJIHPVZrdNDchzCMfCzd6bv4v8GciHv4thUV3LTqQCi70yn3eQ4vCxMq69ul712eJbwampKowTompEmQ_L1O1JpoltV_C4ahKsIKkwkGunA9n6DqDTzuYvoTZlWsuSQGKt9u5p9OKWSTW2RMoj8tVnKwuJ48AhhuSPTOZl_vy9QgB6L0o46Jsqo3Wheo72EKQZSZXyP_ppigunbzHTgC7IqUSfMD7rNQStxIF_GCiXMKgPWHQ7QsqyW7EMaJuJRWoyVVq8/3i3/ydx01GmqRYGZubYRu4kj_A/h2/bRzBvhbgqTD6TGp7rnzZar9684EuERTYIHlrJ-uyd7E)
[****](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvsu9hCVaerzAxagfczWNtR7WNj0Vvrg4HKrNk9USOunoX-04ND2SQFX-pBY04xC8dfY5lAS6ZkL9QgxZQ8xwmSCgwdrBAOytMSWUP0z5C13TpjT6XhsXVVFhtA8ZzTsJDHZDWst1pOPMtlcp8mOlCHJtpCEgOSaBILoBE35e2D_3ItImECNl7b40c0xLybb-A8Ty8L9nmaiZsK7honhtleuthGmtpVVZWlJwlc8WT1QemuUc_t8S0AUqai2oDMXnWwmPTAiX7vG1pLvfnU6ybIGTvP4SXMwwTYIvzsHy9EaXRyYATg4UlpcCNCAn9JCs6V1U_LozVGdc4YYUI4uYZ6gUVYmlgNXmfKlsGn7VoPmcnaEL8lg0m97mI3UG1ob9FVsXE5DjRulGIpI7YVeZG/3i3/ydx01GmqRYGZubYRu4kj_A/h3/iwrF8uVn_3lOlhGqHZTdBzzDvMP4_WcMFYKEcUihbro)Thanks for your support.

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Future generations are counting on your response
body:
Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zfp9squrtaougeh5616a2hjmp0aqnrt7pnorotag_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9ie1or4clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s [**RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z6h2mps0vg688mpo0lsv58rn9qtr6aonu0u1b360_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9ie1or4clh2bs) My name is Bill Gray, and I’m the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It’s my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. **I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt.** It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation—a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. _The New York Times’_ recent “1619 Project” is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” **“Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.”** Outrageous! _The New York Times’_ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery—not freedom—is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the “1619 Project” into a feature film. **Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans—and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas.** Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our** _most urgent priority._** Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. **We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective.** Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism—our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work—especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the **RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey**. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. **As _The New York Times’_ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. ** _Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible._ And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs—which I will outline fo**r you shortly—it has been determined that to fully implement this[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z7ne8mfgr881v81e6p0cd6temhfu50jmnfu3ja4o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9ie1or4clh2bs)** for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding—even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again—Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! **In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission.** Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty—as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can—gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people—including our nation’s youth—with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2za9v68lalnmnhtk8j9fps0j898sjj2d4igso6k50_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9ie1or4clh2bs)** And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: **BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans** I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong—such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. **Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people.** You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! **BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools** In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles—AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake—Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus—they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses _free of charge_ , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous—over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” This free course is called **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called _Imprimis_ , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. _Imprimis_ is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the _Wall Street Journal_ or the “fake news” _New York Times_. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set _Imprimis_ apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an _Imprimis_ subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) **BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to K-12 Schools** In this section we explore how Hillsdale College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching thousands of K-12 students. These schools all have a strong civics curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid grounding in our nation’s history, our limited constitutional government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve students and the country. **Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12 schools are opening each year.** Do you support this effort to set a new standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper education? Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket Constitutions as their schools need. **The response has been astounding.** We’ve now sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a good idea to you? As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education—education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. The first step is getting your thoughts on our **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z5k7r083r7ulghc2v9kabtfg3puegnpc5028ig08_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9ie1or4clh2bs)**
With your response you will represent your state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and concerns of mainstream Americans—views that we can make available to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left’s agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU—your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. **So please complete the[Battle Plan Survey](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zfs4ojhiq97e6m6k5ktkso37ahfkpfg36jadu57o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9ie1or4clh2bs) today.**
When you give to Hillsdale and share your opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to defend America against the progressives’ attack on American history and liberty. Thank you for your commitment to liberty in America. Warm regards,
Bill Gray
Assoc. Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S**. We are in a battle for the future of America, because the Left is determined to transform our country ... by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the Constitution. Please complete **[RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z8m2t2kvsv3mion6884us52oen3obadec5nifug8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c9ie1or4clh2bs)** to shape Hillsdale College’s defense of America against the progressive assault on history. Your response is needed within five days so we can finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of liberty.

clean_body: Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Can you do me a favor? Please take time right now to review and complete Hillsdale College’s My name is Bill Gray, and I’m the associate vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It’s my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to support Hillsdale. I don’t use the word “battle” lightly, but with the stakes so high one must be blunt. It’s clear to me that we are in a fight for the future of our nation—a fight against progressives who are targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called “progressives” seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform American government and society. The New York Times’ recent “1619 Project” is the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation’s history. If you haven’t heard, the “1619 Project” places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of Independence proclaimed that “all men are created equal” and endowed by God with “unalienable rights.” “Our democracy’s founding ideals,” the “1619 Project” proclaims, “were false when they were written.” Outrageous! The New York Times’ stated goal with the “1619 Project” is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools nationwide. They teach young people that slavery—not freedom—is and always will be the central and defining idea of the American experience, making our country irredeemable. This project has garnered universal acclaim from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the “1619 Project” into a feature film. Given popular and widespread efforts like these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing sense of patriotism among younger Americans—and an increasing tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas. Education has become a battleground, and reviving a proper understanding of American history and government, especially among younger citizens, must be our most urgent priority. Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this effort. We are actively engaging the Left on the battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this effort even more effective. Hillsdale is America’s most powerful advocate for intelligent and informed patriotism—our best defense against the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of liberty. And in response to new efforts such as the media-driven “1619 Project” that seek to turn the next generation of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand this critical work—especially in 2020. As I said before, to fight and win this battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away. The FIRST step I need you to take right now is to complete the RECLAIM AMERICA’S HISTORY! Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey. This national project seeks to make it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be corrupted by those who hold America in contempt. As The New York Times’ efforts make clear, powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very eyes. Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be escalated as quickly as possible. And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you feel a strong connection to Hillsdale’s work, then I urge you to please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty. Based on the costs of Hillsdale’s multiple educational programs—which I will outline for you shortly—it has been determined that to fully implement this for maximum impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within the next month. And unlike most colleges and universities that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of funding for Hillsdale’s educational outreach comes from the voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you. This is because Hillsdale College refuses EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding—even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. That’s so important, I need to say it again—Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding! In this way, Hillsdale remains truly independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would violate the College’s educational mission. Hillsdale has built national support from hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are determined to preserve our liberty—as I believe you are. These supporters give what they can, when they can—gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more ... because they understand that every dollar given goes to reaching and teaching millions of people—including our nation’s youth—with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution. The gift you choose to give today will determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale’s proven programs and publications that are educating millions of Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale’s plan for your review and feedback: BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical Concerns of Everyday Americans I mentioned that our network of supporters that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong—such a broad base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours) that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible. Your participation today will allow Hillsdale to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them where they’re needed most, on the areas of concern that matter most to the American people. You were selected to be part of this effort based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen America, AND because of Hillsdale’s confidence that you will respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts to restore the Constitution. I’m counting on and very much looking forward to your survey response! BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive Teaching in America’s Schools In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale’s proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead important conversations surrounding America’s history and founding principles—AND ask what YOU think about these efforts. And make no mistake—Hillsdale is uniquely qualified to drive this effort. Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a few American colleges and universities that requires each student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course on the Constitution? This fact has earned the support of so many Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even set foot on our campus—they understand that what we teach in our classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you? In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online courses free of charge , because we see it as an effective way promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the courses on social media and online to reach large audiences, especially younger Americans. The response has been tremendous—over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of our online courses. Do you think this is an effective means of reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty? We even have an online course that directly counters The New York Times’ “1619 Project.” This free course is called “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” and presents an unbiased and complete account of America’s past. To me this is a great example of why these free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left. And what do you think about sending a free monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people? This newsletter is called Imprimis , and it features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political, economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional viewpoint. Imprimis is America’s most widely-circulated publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and businesses than either the Wall Street Journal or the “fake news” New York Times. Issues covering topics such as “Rediscovering the Wisdom of American History” and “Shall We Defend our Common History?” set Imprimis apart. The publication is as a powerful counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow, ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you’re not yet an Imprimis subscriber, we’ll be happy to sign you up as soon as we hear from you.) As you select your answers, I believe you will find that Hillsdale’s educational outreach is a powerful way to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America stands for slavery, not freedom. I know you love this country, and I hope you will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through education—education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide. What Hillsdale needs now is YOU—your thoughtful input on the work we’re doing, and your generous support to expand our work. So please complete the today. So this year, I’m asking every single grassroots supporter to chip in for his big day. | | | One of my favorite things about Steve is that he’s always willing to go the extra mile for his family and his community. When I first ran for Congress in 2018, my campaign staff emphasized how important it was that we reached our end-of-quarter goal before the election year. Being a new candidate, I agreed but didn’t fully appreciate just how crucial it was until we hit the ground running in the new year.
**Our end-of-quarter goal before the election year is the most consequential.**
Your support will determine how aggressive our campaign strategy will be in 2022. Given that my district has been called the most competitive in the country, **we cannot afford to miss this goal.**
Everything is on the line this election. name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: this is what they’ve done
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Crenshaw for Congress
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019VEvMDxC6B_MUv4GKTzVP09a7AZ-YiA31xSD_2pPNOJkXEEigiSFWNCCtrUaiujWTaIZTaIua7DCr_PBU908kEAGo_gvqQ1nc3EdY4xKdIjUKQtNXm8uuhGg8ioFXznjV9fHxN6yCN1IklKoPEwaan5y_Y9QpI-sY8yDnTGPxx1SBcjgMDzh9BYz9gtffKpWCdi0RmQBpJu2MtT9JPBxLrc7UMyqt9qb-lK-gHdu3KXU4I3hQfEur4glSBNIXJocws2EjjkFhsuSz9GhHTUxuFkPBQjAX5yuSilh6b6_7su9zcoL8hSPZe6BKr5qCGliuBgSRJ9FsqisrRfRZdScOQ==&c=WDY4J686u-oidsm24P95UglUuh9t7kTFVq_nL1MQh6ObPj49VuDZzA==&ch=PSXteVBqqg5mnHNeqkIrkq4EMB7ISrDBVYFZ82nS7MQpv9LTXr7JbQ==)
---
| |
---
| Peter -
It's been nearly a year since Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer have held total control of Washington. If you ever wanted a glimpse at what happens when the radical left holds all the levers of our government, this year gives you exactly that.
This is the Year-in-Review for Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi. And this is what I've done to fight back.
---
| | |
---
|
BIDEN'S BORDER CRISIS
Joe Biden repealed every single policy President Trump implemented to combat illegal immigration and the results speak for themselves.
* During Biden's first year in office, we saw the highest number of encounters with illegal immigrants in a fiscal year (1,734,686), surpassing the previous record set in 2000.

* Under Biden, the monthly numbers rapidly increased: in January 2021 there were 78,414 encounters, the next month there were 101,099 and they only continued to climb, staying above 160,000 per month since March 2021 - in July they peaked at 213,593 encounters with illegal immigrants... in one month.

* After just nine months since President Biden took office, there were more encounters with illegal immigrants at the border (>1,602,539) than in Trump's last 25 months in office (1,548,003).

* This illegal immigration crisis has overwhelmed our border patrol, wreaked havoc in communities in my home state of Texas, enriched the cartels, and flooded our country with deadly fentanyl.

That's why I'm fighting back. I called for Biden's Homeland Security Secretary to be impeached for deliberately failing to do his job of securing the homeland. I've also called on Biden to reimplement the successful Trump policies that finally got illegal immigration under control.
---
| | |
---
|
ATTACKING AMERICA'S OIL AND GAS INDUSTRY
Joe Biden began his administration with an assault on our oil and gas industry. Biden cancelled the Keystone pipeline, outlawed new oil and gas projects on federal lands and waters, made it difficult to invest in new oil and gas projects, and much more. Meanwhile, as Biden was canceling American pipelines, he approved a pipeline for RUSSIA into Europe.
As a result, we've seen the highest gas prices in years and Americans are facing rising energy prices just as we're entering winter. This is what happens when radical environmentalists run the government.
I've fought back by introducing legislation to overturn these regulations, including the ban on oil and gas drilling on federal lands and waters. I've also exposed the truth about the left's radical climate agenda, which is causing your energy prices to rise and destroying American energy independence.
---
| | |
---
|
UNCONSTITUTIONAL VACCINE MANDATES
After politicizing the COVID vaccines President Trump got across the finish line under Operation Warp Speed, Joe Biden has sought to demonize unvaccinated Americans. Biden even went as far as implementing an unconstitutional vaccine mandate that would punish businesses for not forcing their employees to get vaccinated.
Biden's vaccine mandates have exacerbated a labor shortage, made it harder for businesses to keep their doors open, and forced our hospitals to operate under-staffed because health care workers are getting fired because they choose not to get the vaccine.
Since Joe Biden implemented his unconstitutional vaccine mandate, I've fought back. I introduced the Prevent Unconstitutional Vaccine Mandates for Interstate Commerce Act, which would prohibit the federal government from requiring proof of vaccination or the use of a vaccine passport to engage in interstate commerce. I also pushed back on Department of Defense leadership punishing our service members who choose not to receive a COVID-19 vaccine. And I supported legislation that passed the Senate that would stop this vaccine mandate in its tracks, which Nancy Pelosi refuses to bring to the floor of the House of Representatives.
This vaccine mandate is unconstitutional and must be stopped.
---
| | |
---
|
RISING CRIME
There has been a frightening rise in crime across the country, just as liberal local leaders have implemented soft-on-crime policies like defund the police and radical bail reform policies. Remember, Nancy Pelosi excused the riots last summer by saying "people will do what they do" while radical members of Pelosi's caucus called for the defunding of police.
These actions have consequences. In Houston, Texas, our city recorded more than 540 murders as of November, which marks a 21% increase over 2020's rate. According to the Houston Chronicle, the number of defendants who have committed new crimes while out on bail has tripled since 2015.
That's why I've pushed back against the left's defund the police movement and have called for the left to take crime seriously by repealing pro-crime policies like bail reform. I've also highlighted how people like George Soros are pushing millions of dollars into the campaigns of liberal prosecutors who implement policies that put communities at risk.
---
| | |
---
|
This is what we've seen during Joe Biden's first year in office. These policies are bad for our economy, American families, and the safety of our country and our communities.
We will never hold the Biden Administration accountable while Nancy Pelosi is Speaker. That's why we need to redouble our efforts to fire Nancy Pelosi and take back the House in 2022. Once we do that, Republicans will hold Joe Biden accountable and push for policies that will unwind some of the damage done during his first year in office.
But it's not just about Congress. You need to get involved at the local level to defeat the politicians who have let crime run rampant across the country.
We can't do any of this without your support. That's why I'm asking for you to join this fight.
With your donation, I will be able to expand my platform and expose the truth about Biden and Pelosi's radical agenda in Congress and help quality Republican candidates defeat Democrats across the country so we have a strong majority in the House in 2022.
We have the momentum. We are seeing more House Democrats retire every single day because they know their days in the majority are numbered. Now is the time to ramp up our efforts so House Democrats have two options: retire or get fired.
Let's keep up that momentum until we win in 2022.
---

name: Morgan Harper
subject: Before the holiday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
Something I’m really thankful for around the holidays
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20211223-475-footer-ak&t=2&akid=475%2E90090%2ESMav4f)
I wanted to reach out before the holiday and talk about **community.**
Community is something I’m really thankful for around the holidays. I grew up in foster care. After I was adopted by my mom, a public school teacher, we faced housing insecurity and hard times. From Stanford to the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) to running to be the first woman (and first Black woman) to represent Ohio in the U.S. Senate, _I am where I am because of my community._
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18669?t=3&akid=475%2E90090%2ESMav4f)
I know what a strong community looked like growing up in Ohio, and I have a vision for what we need to do to get back to that.
We need leaders who will do everything they can to put power back in the hands of everyday working people, not leaders who are bought and sold by corporate interests or worse, the extremist far-right.
I’m running because everyone deserves the sort of community I have had, and because everyone deserves those opportunities. **Ohio has been left behind for far too long, and I’ll fight for every Ohioan when I get to the U.S. Senate.**
**[If you can, please support our campaign as we face our crucial end-of-year fundraising deadline. Your help will go a long way toward building this movement.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18669?t=4&akid=475%2E90090%2ESMav4f)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18675?refcode=em20211223-475&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=475%2E90090%2ESMav4f)**
Thank you! I hope you have a good, restful holiday.
Morgan Harper
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18669?t=24&akid=475%2E90090%2ESMav4f)
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate in Ohio

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20211223-475-footer&t=25&refcode2=475_90090_SMav4f&akid=475%2E90090%2ESMav4f)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=475%2E90090%2ESMav4f)

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio

name: Josh Riley
subject: Happy Holidays, from my family to yours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress
body:
I wanted to take a moment to reach out and wish you a safe and happy holiday season.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39977890/322286946/459115770?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTQ0MzZlYi00MzY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZkWGW4ZfILTIQDjt1zaiD02KNpI0lt7DEeA4MJ7XttU=&emci=897227e8-4e63-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=d94436eb-4364-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=4588596)
---
| Peter,

**I wanted to take a moment to reach out and wish you a healthy and happy holiday season.**

As this year draws to a close, I remain thankful for your incredible grassroots support, and I remain optimistic about our shared future. Together, we’re building a powerful movement to revitalize the economy in Upstate New York and restore opportunity for working class communities like the one I grew up in.

Our politics today are too divisive and dysfunctional, bringing out the worst in too many. But I’ve already experienced so many moments on the campaign trail that have reminded me that we’re better than that–little moments of joy and laughter showing that we’re all in this together. Here’s one:

I went to the annual Christmas tree lighting in Homer. It’s a wonderful event where folks can sponsor bulbs to honor loved ones. The “tree” is made of strings of lights tied to a huge pole. It’s beautiful.

After the tree was lit, the Grinch rolled through in a big truck, looking to steal Christmas, of course. The local police apprehended him in the act, and they took him to the gazebo for sentencing.

The police asked the many kids in attendance what they should do with the Grinch. And the kids, instead of saying “throw him in jail,” yelled out together:

“TICKLE HIM!” And the police did.

**And Peter, if there was any question whether the holiday spirit is alive and well in Homer, that answered it. And I hope it’s alive and well in your home this holiday season, too.**

From my family to yours – Happy Holidays!

Sincerely,

Josh Riley
---

clean_body: I wanted to take a moment to reach out and wish you a safe and happy holiday season. | | Peter, I wanted to take a moment to reach out and wish you a healthy and happy holiday season. As this year draws to a close, I remain thankful for your incredible grassroots support, and I remain optimistic about our shared future. Together, we’re building a powerful movement to revitalize the economy in Upstate New York and restore opportunity for working class communities like the one I grew up in. Our politics today are too divisive and dysfunctional, bringing out the worst in too many. But I’ve already experienced so many moments on the campaign trail that have reminded me that we’re better than that–little moments of joy and laughter showing that we’re all in this together. Here’s one: I went to the annual Christmas tree lighting in Homer. It’s a wonderful event where folks can sponsor bulbs to honor loved ones. The “tree” is made of strings of lights tied to a huge pole. It’s beautiful. After the tree was lit, the Grinch rolled through in a big truck, looking to steal Christmas, of course. The local police apprehended him in the act, and they took him to the gazebo for sentencing. The police asked the many kids in attendance what they should do with the Grinch. And the kids, instead of saying “throw him in jail,” yelled out together: “TICKLE HIM!” And the police did. And Peter, if there was any question whether the holiday spirit is alive and well in Homer, that answered it. And I hope it’s alive and well in your home this holiday season, too. From my family to yours – Happy Holidays! Sincerely, Josh Riley * | | Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress Josh Riley for Congress PO Box 7160 200 Washington Ave Endicott, NY 13760 United States | | ---|--- = = If you wish to donate by check, you can make checks payable to Josh Riley for Congress and send to PO Box 7160, 200 Washington Ave Endicott, NY 13760. **But with just 7 hours until our most critical deadline yet, it’s looking like we might fall short of our goal and what we need to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue.**

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC**
body:
It’s hard to say which one is worse. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpEnMq3REs_6qpHFEbObeQSeVtQfDWNLS6IBFr9NtQcwPNoXuUGzRLY6sIDarWA-gPFYOtchmspHGfD4F7LWTVYo-Zjj27dxeyDYmMQZos1oBiuQIkW1kXYOZpO9pL6svARV4Zr4YjEid14RwH0hz9T1pix_TPfEs69sGK2jtGy295f5WBhMagA8P3O1agD15_AY2Iuv8BgNDtIWcP0HNKUFjNm6Sck86emiIWo7JSYK8SAB9p6_hb6tFSI5-l0mtJEynBu05L507iYU-gAp9s8-6lb1LXj6UXczQsCdD1NuyHr_6Z9Ygv74-XqTwM_b09yD8Duvl9DuP015xtp0DVPI/3i3/yfzE7zB5QieWyqVR6BaE8g/h0/mSmg2_oiL8yUaaD7LcfySVCD3tEvD2a36ZmXvQB_Ek0)
Want to know 5 reasons Arizonans should fire Kyrsten Sinema, Peter?
1. She voted down a $15/hour minimum wage.
2. She ignores her constituents and even the White House.
3. She flip-flopped on drug pricing reform...after Big Pharma bank-rolled her campaign.
4. She (and Joe Manchin) torpedoed Biden’s Build Back Better agenda.
5. She continues to defend the filibuster, dooming Democrats’ chances of passing voting rights legislation, defending abortion rights, and so much more.

name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: They won't see it coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Country First
body:
| [ ](http://www.country1st.com/?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4q1_nd_nvol&n=1)
---
Friend -- What a year it's been.

First, I watched an American President incite a deadly insurrection that came within an inch of overthrowing our government and destroying American democracy.

Then, just hours later, I watched 147 Republicans shamefully vote against certifying a free and fair election.

And now, those same leaders, most in safe Republican districts, think they can coast to re-election without consequence.

What happened to the Grand Old Party of Lincoln? What happened to our country having two healthy, sane political parties? The current situation has become so dangerous, and none of us can afford to bury our heads in the sand and just hope it goes away!

I, for one, have refused to be silent, and was even willing to sacrifice my own re-election to put everything we've got into defeating those who betrayed our country.

[Country First has a bold cutting-edge plan to take on and take out the most toxic partisans in Congress -- before they are even on the November ballot: In the primaries.](https://www.country1st.com/plan?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4q1_nd_nvol&n=2)

We'll be launching this first-of-its-kind operation in January, and when you hear the details, I know you'll be as pumped as me for what we can do together to punish those who betrayed their oaths and ALL of us.

My promise to you: They're NOT going to like what we have planned.
[](https://www.country1st.com/plan?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4q1_nd_nvol&n=3)
Now I already know what's going to come next -- because it's what's already come before. They'll call me names; they'll try to kick me out of the party (in fact, there's a big campaign underway to kick Liz Cheney and me out right now); they'll threaten me and my family.

But I am not afraid. I'm not scared of leaving my seat, because my seat doesn't define me. I'll be proud to have made that sacrifice for my country. But what we must do is ensure that a tyrant like Donald Trump and the bullies who enable him can't ever win again.

That's why I need your support right now, at this critical year-end fundraising deadline. Our numbers must be so strong that there is zero doubt that the good people of this country will prevail over Trumpism in 2022 and 2024. Country First plans to play a major role in that.

I hate sending emails like this, but with a mission like ours, funds are needed to keep the momentum going and to put our audacious plan into action. We are so close to reaching our big fundraising goal. **I know you've been supportive of our mission** , and I hope you'll be open to this:

[Would it be crazy to ask you to make an investment of time or money in our movement to help us reach our big year-end goal? We need both donors AND volunteers to fuel Country First.](https://www.country1st.com/plan?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4q1_nd_nvol&n=4) Every contribution -- whether of time or treasure, and no matter how big or small -- adds up to making a real difference.

The funds donated today will go toward our MASSIVE effort to unseat those in Congress who put Q Anon, Lies, Conspiracies, and the Trump Family before our Country. The money also helps build our community, marshal an army of thousands of volunteers, create space for reasonable people of goodwill to solve our greatest problems, and provide a fresh, optimistic vision for our country. | [](https://www.country1st.com/plan?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4q1_nd_nvol&n=5 "Make an Impact with a Year-End Gift") [Make an Impact with a Year-End Gift](https://www.country1st.com/plan?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4q1_nd_nvol&n=5)
---
[](https://www.country1st.com/get_involved?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4q1_nd_nvol&n=6 "Get Involved with our Volunteer Team") [Get Involved with our Volunteer Team](https://www.country1st.com/get_involved?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4q1_nd_nvol&n=6)
---
I do not take for granted the trust you've placed in me to usher our movement through this storm, and I'm humbled by your continued support. Donating is an investment in our democracy and a down payment for a better, brighter America for our kids and grandkids. I have faith the good we do today will be compounded over time, and I'm excited by what we can do together.

With great appreciation, I remain yours in service.

Country First,

Adam

[](https://www.country1st.com/plan?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4q1_nd_nvol&n=7 "Chip in whatever you can today") [Chip in whatever you can today](https://www.country1st.com/plan?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4q1_nd_nvol&n=7)
---
[](https://www.country1st.com/shop?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4q1_nd_nvol&n=8 "Shop your values. Wear the Cause.") [Shop your values. Wear the Cause.](https://www.country1st.com/shop?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=4q1_nd_nvol&n=8)

He’s taking President Biden to court over the administration’s newest mandate that would threaten Friend, Did you have a chance to respond to Derek’s update? He’s taking President Biden to court over the administration’s newest mandate that would threaten Kansas families’ access to early childhood education - particularly low-income children. It’s also why he’s running for governor, to put an end to Laura Kelly’s failed lockdown and mandate agenda in Kansas. Thanks, Team Schmidt —--Forwarded Message Below—-- Friend, I know you’re busy preparing for the Christmas holiday, so I won’t take too much of your time. I just wanted to provide a quick update on my ongoing fight against President Biden’s vaccine mandate agenda: Yesterday we filed a new lawsuit against the Biden administration. This one involves a new vaccine mandate that’s gotten much less attention than the other higher profile mandates. The Biden administration recently quietly announced vaccine and masking requirements for Head Start early childhood education programs. Staff, volunteers, and others who come in contact with Head Start students must get the vaccine by January 31 and children aged two and up will be forced to wear a mask. Kansas families are already facing challenges finding child care and this one-size-fits-all mandate will make the problem worse. This mandate is likely to result in the loss of staff, closure of facilities or at least reduced capacity for low-income children. It is another example of the administration taking shortcuts and failing to consider consequences as it rushes forward, and the courts should strike this mandate down as they have others. We’ve already had some great victories in court against the Biden administration’s dangerous mandates, but they keep pushing. I’m going to keep fighting back as your attorney general. As governor, I promise to never repeat the damaging mistakes of Governor Kelly’s COVID response. Nothing is more important to me than ensuring the safety of our children and protecting Kansas parents’ right to make their own decisions for themselves and their families. There is no pandemic exception to the Constitution. I’m so grateful to have you with me in this fight, friend. I know that together, we can stop this federal overreach in its tracks. Thanks, Derek Schmidt | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER. | | | ---|---|---

name: Laura Loomer
subject: This is why they attack me . . .
body:
The truth has never stopped a Democrat from telling a lie.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/93ZuMG8oJOOQaGsqbQbQHg/W1T892kjQp763DrZXWxe1GUQhw)
Patriot,

The truth has never stopped a Democrat from telling a lie.

Last year, the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) put out a press release calling me a “well-known racist, conspiracy theorist with ties to the Klu Klux Klan.”

Not that I’ve ever checked, but I’m pretty sure the KKK doesn’t allow Jewish women into their ranks.

Regardless, this is the narrative they’re working so hard to establish against me, and now, because I’m running against a Do-Nothing RINO incumbent, **I’m also fighting against the establishment of my own party!**

This is why I have to RUSH to counter all of these attacks with the voter base in my District and have produced an ad to tell them EXACTLY WHO I AM!

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/93ZuMG8oJOOQaGsqbQbQHg/W1T892kjQp763DrZXWxe1GUQhw)
We’ll be serving this ad to voters in the district, and let me tell you, they are good people, but most of them don’t even know that I’m running for Congress due to extreme censorship and Big Tech election interference.

In case you didn’t know, the Laura Loomer for Congress campaign is the only deplatformed campaign in the nation.

[**Help me reach my voters**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/93ZuMG8oJOOQaGsqbQbQHg/W1T892kjQp763DrZXWxe1GUQhw) and show them I am the fighter they need in Congress.

[**If you can donate $100 today**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/zyOrmcFVvuJRNWZo74q14g/W1T892kjQp763DrZXWxe1GUQhw), I’ll send our next ad to you so you can be among the first to see it!

It costs us just $25 to reach 1,000 voters, so whatever amount you can give will be put to good use.

[**Donate any amount you can today.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/93ZuMG8oJOOQaGsqbQbQHg/W1T892kjQp763DrZXWxe1GUQhw)

Thanks so much for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

720 Lucerne Ave, #1465

Friends,

When I entered this race, I did so because I believe I can help make western Wisconsin a better place and represent the interests of all my constituents, whether they voted for me or not.

My opponent, Derrick Van Orden, on the other hand, does not share our values. He was at the January 6th insurrection, attempting to violently overturn our election results.

And if he wins this election, it will alter the very fabric of our democracy. It’s as simple as that.

But one thing I do know is that Van Orden has a lot of money. He raised over $1,000,000 so far.

I know that’s a lot. But I also know that if we hit our end-of-quarter goal, we’ll have enough to compete with him.

# Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America
Donald J. Trump December 23rd, 2021 Has it been at all noticed that I offered to debate anybody, on television or otherwise, about the RIGGED Presidential Election of 2020. This was a publicly stated challenge—I have been called a “ratings machine,” and therefore would be good for television economics—which have not been doing so well lately. With all the bravado out there, I have not had one credible person willing to stand up and debate me in order to defend the CROOKED election. All involved, like those on the Unselect Committee of January 6th, know that it is a losing proposition for them. The election numbers are not defensible. Arizona, Michigan, Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, Georgia, Nevada, and probably New Hampshire, Minnesota, New Mexico, and others were all won, and in some cases big, by a certain Republican Presidential Candidate, me. So, after one month, a very public offer to debate, I have no takers—not even the sleazebags you see on the January 6th Commission who speak with such fake reverence about the day. This is Cancel Culture. They think they got away with the Crime of the Century, and they don’t want it to be talked about or discussed.
