clean_body: Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | ---|---|--- | Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America Donald J. Trump December 23rd, 2021 Has it been at all noticed that I offered to debate anybody, on television or otherwise, about the RIGGED Presidential Election of 2020. This was a publicly stated challenge—I have been called a “ratings machine,” and therefore would be good for television economics—which have not been doing so well lately. With all the bravado out there, I have not had one credible person willing to stand up and debate me in order to defend the CROOKED election. All involved, like those on the Unselect Committee of January 6th, know that it is a losing proposition for them. The election numbers are not defensible. Arizona, Michigan, Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, Georgia, Nevada, and probably New Hampshire, Minnesota, New Mexico, and others were all won, and in some cases big, by a certain Republican Presidential Candidate, me. So, after one month, a very public offer to debate, I have no takers—not even the sleazebags you see on the January 6th Commission who speak with such fake reverence about the day. This is Cancel Culture. They think they got away with the Crime of the Century, and they don’t want it to be talked about or discussed. Look at what has happened to our Country, and what a shame it is! | Donald J. Trump December 23rd, 2021 The people being persecuted by the January 6th Unselect Committee should simply tell the truth, that they are angry about the RIGGED Presidential Election of 2020. People are entitled to Freedom of Speech, and perhaps there has been no time in our Country’s history where Freedom of Speech has been so totally violated. They don’t want to talk about election results because they know they can’t win. - Donald J. Trump December 23rd, 2021 Wacko Bette Midler said horrible things about the great people of West Virginia and Joe Manchin, but when I say much less offensive things about her, everybody goes wild. Don’t worry, I’ll tell the real facts about her in my book. I love you, West Virginia! Donald J. I ran to represent the Central Valley and beat Devin Nunes in 2020 — _and we came up just a few percentage points short of victory._

**But this time, we must win: With Devin Nunes gone, this race is WIDE-OPEN,** and I know this grassroots team has what it takes to make it happen!

It all starts with your $1 donation today, Peter!

**_Your $1 is the catalyst for what makes this campaign a success._**

And here’s how we put your $1 to work:
* Funding our on-the-ground operations to meet voters where they’re at.
* Contributing to our proven-effective ads and digital programs.
* _And getting every last California voter on our team!_

Season’s Greetings, Peter! Whether you celebrate Christmas or not, I wanted to take a moment before Christmas Eve tomorrow, to send you and your loved ones my warmest well wishes.

As a local member of our community, you are a critical part of this grassroots movement and my congressional campaign. And since the holidays are a time to be grateful, I had to let you know how much your support truly means to me.

Growing up, my mom always told me that Santa didn’t bring physical gifts- he brought gifts of love, happiness, and cheer for families to enjoy together. Regardless of what traditions you participate in, I hope that your season is filled with many gifts of joy and cheer.

Thank you again for your continued support.

_**Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays from Team Victoria and Le Touche Beauty Salon!**_

clean_body: Season's Greetings & Warmest Wishes, Peter! | | | = Season’s Greetings, Peter! Whether you celebrate Christmas or not, I wanted to take a moment before Christmas Eve tomorrow, to send you and your loved ones my warmest well wishes. As a local member of our community, you are a critical part of this grassroots movement and my congressional campaign. And since the holidays are a time to be grateful, I had to let you know how much your support truly means to me. Growing up, my mom always told me that Santa didn’t bring physical gifts- he brought gifts of love, happiness, and cheer for families to enjoy together. Regardless of what traditions you participate in, I hope that your season is filled with many gifts of joy and cheer. Thank you again for your continued support. name: Cora Neumann
subject: Wishing you a safe and happy holiday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cora for Montana
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39974480/322266144/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGJkMjc5ZC0yMzY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=28OD91zZlxUtwQjb4v7DJvfN4dVw1nBRaXdG4Jo00YY=) Friend,

It's beginning to look a lot like Christmas!

As we head into the holiday season, my wish for you is time to rest, have some fun, connect with loved ones, and take time for the things that make your holidays special. One of my favorite holiday activities is my mom’s annual wreath making party with her art group.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39974481/322266145/102973118?refcode=em-12.23.21-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGJkMjc5ZC0yMzY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=28OD91zZlxUtwQjb4v7DJvfN4dVw1nBRaXdG4Jo00YY=)
_Showing off our finished wreaths_
These Bozeman women have been meeting weekly for over 42 years! Together, they’ve raised families (most of these women are like aunts to me!), gone through life transitions, and supported each other through the ups and downs of life. Around the holidays, we celebrate, laugh and make some beautiful wreaths. I love going home with a wreath that’s made with love and better than anything we can buy.

Regardless of how or what you celebrate, I hope some holiday joy finds its way into your life this weekend. Thank you again for your support and partnership, I’m so grateful for all you’ve done to support me on this journey.

Merry Christmas and happy holidays!

Cora

clean_body: | = Friend, It's beginning to look a lot like Christmas! As we head into the holiday season, my wish for you is time to rest, have some fun, connect with loved ones, and take time for the things that make your holidays special. One of my favorite holiday activities is my mom’s annual wreath making party with her art group. = Showing off our finished wreaths These Bozeman women have been meeting weekly for over 42 years! Together, they’ve raised families (most of these women are like aunts to me!), gone through life transitions, and supported each other through the ups and downs of life. Around the holidays, we celebrate, laugh and make some beautiful wreaths. I love going home with a wreath that’s made with love and better than anything we can buy. Regardless of how or what you celebrate, I hope some holiday joy finds its way into your life this weekend. Thank you again for your support and partnership, I’m so grateful for all you’ve done to support me on this journey. Merry Christmas and happy holidays! Cora | = Paid for by Cora for Montana Cora Neumann is a public health and economic development expert running for Congress in Montana's new 1st Congressional District. To learn more about Cora, visit her website Consider supporting Cora's campaign = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Some cute photos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
As you may know, I have been out on the road a lot over the past few months traveling all over Wisconsin. We are taking this campaign everywhere, talking to everyone, and having important conversations about the issues facing workers and families in our state. There’s still a long way to go in this election, but we are putting in the work (and the miles) to win — and I’ll tell you why. Hello everyone —

As you may know, I have been out on the road a lot over the past few months traveling all over Wisconsin. We are taking this campaign everywhere, listening to everyone, and having important conversations about the issues facing workers and families in our state. There’s still a long way to go in this election, but we are putting in the work (and the miles) to win — and I’ll tell you why:

The people of Wisconsin deserve nothing less than someone who will show up in their communities, listen to their concerns, ask how they can help, and put in a little western Wisconsin elbow grease to get the job done. That’s what I have done as State Treasurer, and it’s exactly what I will do as Wisconsin’s next U.S. Senator.

Now, I'm about to log off to be with my family for a few days (keep scrolling for some cute photos of Hartley) — and I hope you get to spend some quality time with your loved ones, too. But before I go, I wanted to send you one last request.

**This is our final FEC deadline of the year, and once it expires, we are legally required to report our fundraising totals. The amount of money we raise and the number of people who chip in will be made public for everyone to see — including our opponents.**

Everyone from Ron Johnson to Mitch McConnell and their right-wing donor network will be paying attention to our public FEC report. They won’t just be looking at our fundraising numbers... they’re going to look at how many people have joined our campaign.

Right now, we have significant momentum in this race. The latest poll shows I’m the only Democrat beating Ron Johnson, and political experts are calling Wisconsin the tipping point for Senate control. Normally, that would be good news for a scrappy campaign like ours, but the truth is, these poll numbers put a target on our back.

That’s why we’re pushing so hard ahead of this critical deadline. Every dollar counts, and your contribution today will make an incredible difference. Unlike Ron Johnson, I'm not relying on corporate PAC money — I'm relying on supporters like you to prove we have the people and the resources to withstand their attacks in the months ahead.

[**We need to stay focused on hitting our most important goal of the year to expand our lead in the polls and keep our momentum going strong. clean_body: As you may know, I have been out on the road a lot over the past few months traveling all over Wisconsin. We are taking this campaign everywhere, talking to everyone, and having important conversations about the issues facing workers and families in our state. There’s still a long way to go in this election, but we are putting in the work (and the miles) to win — and I’ll tell you why. Hello everyone — As you may know, I have been out on the road a lot over the past few months traveling all over Wisconsin. We are taking this campaign everywhere, listening to everyone, and having important conversations about the issues facing workers and families in our state. There’s still a long way to go in this election, but we are putting in the work (and the miles) to win — and I’ll tell you why: The people of Wisconsin deserve nothing less than someone who will show up in their communities, listen to their concerns, ask how they can help, and put in a little western Wisconsin elbow grease to get the job done. That’s what I have done as State Treasurer, and it’s exactly what I will do as Wisconsin’s next U.S. Senator. Now, I'm about to log off to be with my family for a few days (keep scrolling for some cute photos of Hartley) — and I hope you get to spend some quality time with your loved ones, too. But before I go, I wanted to send you one last request. This is our final FEC deadline of the year, and once it expires, we are legally required to report our fundraising totals. The amount of money we raise and the number of people who chip in will be made public for everyone to see — including our opponents. Everyone from Ron Johnson to Mitch McConnell and their right-wing donor network will be paying attention to our public FEC report. They won’t just be looking at our fundraising numbers... they’re going to look at how many people have joined our campaign. Right now, we have significant momentum in this race. The latest poll shows I’m the only Democrat beating Ron Johnson, and political experts are calling Wisconsin the tipping point for Senate control. Normally, that would be good news for a scrappy campaign like ours, but the truth is, these poll numbers put a target on our back. That’s why we’re pushing so hard ahead of this critical deadline. Every dollar counts, and your contribution today will make an incredible difference. Unlike Ron Johnson, I'm not relying on corporate PAC money — I'm relying on supporters like you to prove we have the people and the resources to withstand their attacks in the months ahead. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = The response to these emails is always really great, and it’s something I rely on each time I reach out. Your support proves that if we’re willing to put in the tough work that we know has to be done to defeat Ron Johnson, we will return this U.S. Senate seat to the people of Wisconsin. Hello –
Last week, I joined Rachel Maddow on MSNBC, and she said that **I have a very tough reelection fight ahead in New Hampshire.**
I’ve been called the most vulnerable Democrat in the U.S. Senate, and Mitch McConnell has made me his number one target for 2022. **Far-right groups have spent more money attacking me than any other Democratic Senator.**
With over $7 million already spent on attack ads against me, and much more on the way, this race is going to shatter New Hampshire spending records. But right now, we aren’t raising as much as other vulnerable Democrats.
Our final – and most important – fundraising deadline of the year is just days away, and I need your help right now. **[Please contribute $5 or whatever you can afford to my campaign. New Hampshire could be the tipping point for our Senate majority, and we need all the help we can get.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39979021/322298029/-913685435?refcode=e20211223_mwh-maddow&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTE0ZGExYi00ZjY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pd7-cUqXNu4ZgRxFB3mcf9ArpnKMsR0ei-_z5IqTw2Q=)**
Thank you for your support.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: CharlesBooker.org
subject: Before the holidays
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

As of tomorrow, we only have 1 week left until our big end-of-year
fundraising deadline. This is a critical time for us to reach our goal and
show the strength of our grassroots movement leading up to this
competitive election year.

But we also know that this is a busy time for lots of people preparing to
celebrate the holidays.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14123?refcode=em20211223-1363&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=1363%2E346206%2E_nsqfp ]So today we’re setting a goal to raise $4,500 to make up for the
slowdown in fundraising we’re expecting later this week. Will you chip in
$4.50 or anything you can today to help out?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14123?refcode=em20211223-1363&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1363%2E346206%2E_nsqfp ]Contribute $4.50

Here’s why this upcoming fundraising goal is so important to
us, Peter.

For the past year, Rand Paul has consistently ignored Kentuckians and our
needs — he doesn’t care that our health care workers have been overworked
because of the rise in COVID cases, how much prescription drugs cost us,
or whether we can afford rent next week. He’s a politician who will say or
do anything to get in the news, put the spotlight on himself and his
conspiracy theories, and sell us out to big industries.

But now time is running out for Rand Paul. 2022 is our chance to end this
chapter of failed leadership and our movement is in a strong position to
turn the tides.

We know that our chances are strong because Rand Paul and the GOP have
recently made it clear that they’re intimidated by our grassroots power.
The other day news broke that an infamous billionaire is backing a
superPAC created to attack our campaign and keep Rand in office.

Reaching this goal is our last chance this year to send an unmistakable
and loud message that this movement is ready. We also have to be prepared
to start off 2022 ready to scale our voter outreach efforts and amplify

clean_body: [1]Charles Booker Peter, As of tomorrow, we only have 1 week left until our big end-of-year fundraising deadline. This is a critical time for us to reach our goal and show the strength of our grassroots movement leading up to this competitive election year. But we also know that this is a busy time for lots of people preparing to celebrate the holidays. [ ]So today we’re setting a goal to raise $4,500 to make up for the slowdown in fundraising we’re expecting later this week. Will you chip in $4.50 or anything you can today to help out? [ ]Contribute $4.50 Here’s why this upcoming fundraising goal is so important to us, Peter. For the past year, Rand Paul has consistently ignored Kentuckians and our needs — he doesn’t care that our health care workers have been overworked because of the rise in COVID cases, how much prescription drugs cost us, or whether we can afford rent next week. He’s a politician who will say or do anything to get in the news, put the spotlight on himself and his conspiracy theories, and sell us out to big industries. But now time is running out for Rand Paul. 2022 is our chance to end this chapter of failed leadership and our movement is in a strong position to turn the tides. We know that our chances are strong because Rand Paul and the GOP have recently made it clear that they’re intimidated by our grassroots power. The other day news broke that an infamous billionaire is backing a superPAC created to attack our campaign and keep Rand in office. Reaching this goal is our last chance this year to send an unmistakable and loud message that this movement is ready. We also have to be prepared to start off 2022 ready to scale our voter outreach efforts and amplify our message for change. [ ]So please Peter: We hope you can make a donation today before the holidays. Every dollar counts for a people-powered campaign like ours. Together, Team Booker Contribute to Charles Booker:

name: Nick Rathod, Beto for Texas
subject: A major moment is coming up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

We have a major test of our strength coming up at the end of the year — in
the form of our first-ever public reporting deadline with the Texas
Election Commission. Soon, our grassroots fundraising numbers will be
public for all to see, and we need to show up strong if we want to keep
our momentum going.

The good news is, our team of grassroots supporters is growing bigger by
the day — but on the flip side, since our campaign is people-powered,
we’re expecting fundraising to slow down over the holiday weekend.

We wouldn’t have it any other way. But if you’re in a place to do so,
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50594?refcode=ema20211223-168268&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=168268%2E444211%2EKaWzhD ]today is a great day to chip in $3 or more to help us
weather the holiday slowdown and prepare for our campaign’s biggest
fundraising deadline to date.

The bottom line is this: the more resources we have, the more Texans we
can reach, listen to and learn from, and authentically inspire to join our
team.

Let me share an example of how we’re doing that work right now. Through
events, digital outreach, local headlines, and more, Beto has been using
his platform to hold Greg Abbott accountable for the fact that if you live
in a rural community in Texas, you may soon have to pay over $100 more on
your phone and internet bills — all because Abbott vetoed rural network
support.

State leaders should be investing in our rural communities, not turning
their backs on them. We’re making sure people understand why their bills
are getting bigger, and how Beto would do things dramatically differently
— by investing in rural broadband, expanding Medicaid and improving rural
health care, and fully funding our schools and paying teachers their true
value.

There is so much on the line in this election, and we’re going to spend
every day between now and next November demonstrating the difference
between Beto’s bold, inclusive vision for Texas and Greg Abbott’s small,
mean-spirited one.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50594?refcode=ema20211223-168268&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=168268%2E444211%2EKaWzhD ]So if you’re proud of how we’re running this campaign and share our
vision for Texas, would you consider chipping in $3 or any
amount today, to make up for this weekend’s slowdown? Otherwise, we may
fall behind our end-of-year goal.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50594?refcode=ema20211223-168268&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=168268%2E444211%2EKaWzhD ]Contribute $3

Thank you so much for being on this team,

Nick Rathod
Campaign Manager, Beto for Texas

If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=168268%2E444211%2EKaWzhD

The 4th quarter is the first full fundraising quarter we've had since entering this race, so we need to show strength on our year-end fundraising report. Republicans MUST WIN BACK the Senate majority this election. Everything is on the line: our military, our economy, the security of our streets and border, and the very fabric of our nation. body:
Did you know that she didn’t even have a Democratic opponent in 2020? The Democratic nominee dropped out months before the election.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39979213/322306935/-825069922?refcode=20211223_MF_realopponentRS2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjUwYWU5NS01MjY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=COS6ecFZ206k55FSS1o3_nVv7OG_EIxKko13jU5X_98=) Friend, we all know about Marjorie Taylor Greene’s dangerous rhetoric and vile beliefs. **But did you know that she didn’t even have a Democratic opponent in 2020? I’ve served this country on multiple continents, and I’m sick of watching Marjorie Taylor Greene fight to undermine our democracy and alienate us from the rest of the world. I’ll be honest: this isn’t going to be an easy mission. But my time in the service taught me that by working together and not giving up - anything is possible. name: Max Steiner
subject: My birthday.
body:
I'm thinking of those in our community who don't have a place to go, a roof over their heads, or food on the table. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39975041/322269164/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjQ2N2FjNC0yOTY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qbN0ShNAqaNCBxnDlGgminfO_BBjW0KWjShNQllGb3E=)
Friend,

A year ago, I would have never expected that on my 36th birthday (this past Sunday), I'd be running for Congress against an incumbent who refused to certify the 2020 election. _Yet here we are._

Things were a little too hectic to celebrate this year. Campaigning is hard work, but I’m doing this because I believe our democracy is worth it. Making sure working families, farmers, and small business owners here in the North State have real representation in Washington DC is worth it.

As many prepare to spend the next few days with family and friends celebrating the holidays, I'm thinking of those in our community who don't have a place to go, a roof over their heads, or food on the table. In many ways, that's a big reason I'm running for office -- I know that we can do so much better for the people of this community.

**[I'm not big on birthday gifts, but I'd be remiss if I didn't ask you to chip in a small donation if you agree the North State can do better than Doug LaMalfa. I'm investing everything I've got into this race, and I need to know you're with me -- especially before my final FEC end-of-quarter deadline of the year hits.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39975042/322269165/-209993060?refcode=em-122321-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjQ2N2FjNC0yOTY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qbN0ShNAqaNCBxnDlGgminfO_BBjW0KWjShNQllGb3E=)**

Friend, I hope you have the opportunity to reflect, and spend time with family and friends this holiday season. In challenging times like these, sometimes that's the most important thing we have.

Happy holidays!

Max Steiner

| **[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39975043/322269166/-209993060?refcode=em-122321-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjQ2N2FjNC0yOTY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qbN0ShNAqaNCBxnDlGgminfO_BBjW0KWjShNQllGb3E=)**
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39975044/322269167/390307162?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjQ2N2FjNC0yOTY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qbN0ShNAqaNCBxnDlGgminfO_BBjW0KWjShNQllGb3E=)

clean_body: I'm thinking of those in our community who don't have a place to go, a roof over their heads, or food on the table. | = Friend, A year ago, I would have never expected that on my 36th birthday (this past Sunday), I'd be running for Congress against an incumbent who refused to certify the 2020 election. Yet here we are. Things were a little too hectic to celebrate this year. Campaigning is hard work, but I’m doing this because I believe our democracy is worth it. Making sure working families, farmers, and small business owners here in the North State have real representation in Washington DC is worth it. As many prepare to spend the next few days with family and friends celebrating the holidays, I'm thinking of those in our community who don't have a place to go, a roof over their heads, or food on the table. In many ways, that's a big reason I'm running for office -- I know that we can do so much better for the people of this community. = Friend, I hope you have the opportunity to reflect, and spend time with family and friends this holiday season. In challenging times like these, sometimes that's the most important thing we have. Happy holidays! Max Steiner | = | = Max Steiner is a combat veteran, foreign service officer, and Democrat running to flip California's 1st District from red to blue. name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: Happy Holidays, Peter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
As the year winds down and families begin to gather for holiday celebrations, I want to take a moment to thank you for all your support over the last year. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39979336/322311600/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2QyNDhkMC01NDY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t21eQVO_BBUg5Qp2Hso7qCJ8jrMBl5ltHopgQ2P71f8=&emci=632da9be-3b64-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=2cd248d0-5464-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=15820338)
---
Happy Holidays, Peter!

As the year winds down and families begin to gather for holiday celebrations, I want to take a moment to thank you for all your support over the last year.

It is my absolute honor to serve as your representative in Congress and be able to fight every day for the issues that matter most to you. I would not be here without your support and I'm so grateful to have you by my side, Peter.

I also want to thank the nurses, doctors, hospital workers, and scientists who have helped keep us safe during this pandemic. Their work, along with vaccinations and at-home COVID tests, have helped protect our communities.

Finally, let me say thank you to the frontline workers who have continued to put their health at risk to meet our needs. They have kept our communities running during this pandemic and I'm so grateful for all they've done for us.

So, from my family to yours -- we hope you all have a safe and happy holiday season.
Thank you,

Kim

| Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
---
Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible.

Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
PO Box 2728
Issaquah, WA 98027
United States

body:
Can you help? | | | Friend, If you’re like me, I’m sure you’re ready to log off from your email, take part in Christmas traditions and holiday celebrations, and spend some much-needed time with loved ones — I know I can’t wait to spend a few uninterrupted days with my boys. But before we slow down for the holiday, my team wanted me to reach out to you one last time. **The truth is, as soon as the clock strikes midnight on December 31st, our campaign is gonna have to pick up the pace to stay competitive and make the investments it’ll take to defeat Henry McMaster and make a difference for South Carolinians.** That’s why we’re making the preparations NOW to put our campaign in a strong position heading into 2022, and that includes picking up the pace of our grassroots fundraising. **[Our final fundraising deadline of the year is just over a week away, and I’m counting on this team to help us post a strong fundraising filing and stay on track to make history. subject: FWD: DeWine is the Grinch Who Stole Ohio!
body:
Make Ohio Great - Donate or Volunteer Today!
| Friend,

DeWine is hoping you missed my last email – so make sure you read it today.

Governor Grinch has been robbing Ohioans of their prosperity for far too long. First he took our reputation. Under his rule, **Ohio became #1 in the nation for corruption.** Then when the pandemic hit, he started taking away your rights one mandate at a time.

DeWine will keep taking more and more of your freedoms until someone stops him. That’s why I’m asking for your support. **Together we can tell DeWine the Grinch that enough is enough.**

FWD: DeWine is the Grinch Who Stole Ohio!
---
| | [ ](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJxVUMtqwzAQ_BrlZiNv_EgOPqRJU2gJLc0HCHm1ilUsyZWdmvx95dQtFMSCZqTZmVF12WxVuTI1cMgygDXwbMuLlPMGCbhWUlc6z7cs5zb9MDaQk4gmRW9XbV2VOZbI9UbzhqqNLIsGVQZSFRmiJFx1dTuO_cDWOwbHeAbCa6B0Mi6QmkUitkgm2ofk4r8oOB8iTP4zUYRkGwpsfbyOVlhS5mrZ-kBWmo5BOYODvwakCDrshLR9Z_RtoTBepbm4SP7GS-Yh9KSEouiChBnE2JK4BOOwFVPrxTD6joRvjRfkrYBfMe9GcuPPogT2-gin8xtGq6VwnVHzkv9ga1RMfnh-UefX6WkVatVPpuvMUFaxzsuc4d7jYrpm1QMDuP8CuFcG-W13em-LW18kUSaRzj7OHOzjHG89_T1cNNKlGWDV4RvteZo0)
---
| | Friend,
Christmas is just around the corner! Pretty soon it will be a new year... and hopefully a new governor.
As the Republican primary approaches, never forget that **DeWine is the Grinch who stole Ohio!** His draconian lockdown was nothing but a power grab. He took away our **jobs**.** **
He took away our **schools**.
He took away our **freedom**.
He took away our **safety**.

The Grinch gave back everything that he took. All DeWine gave us was mask mandates, vaccine lotteries, labor shortages, critical race theory, and high crime rates.
---
| | | [ ](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJxdUNtOhTAQ_JryBoHldnjg4SgejcaY6Ac00C60hrZYigS_3nJEH0yaTTqzO7szvC66iheBrCGGJAFIIU6qOI_iuGMIcc_bvuyzrCJZrKJ3qSzqljEZMaMCUcfsVCFP2zaDCllenFiVQJ_nyKDr06oLxlo4N80kPRO4-DcjWyxGq9QW-S7isUMy7I0NB_OJVhvrYTQfIUeGqkNL0sviFFXI5aJI2qBq5Uig2MHZLJahBzUbaaumUfbbQTH_beWgPflrL9wL7VdOOforkMqZOoF0sFIzQVdh6OzMiNQIaSgaReFXzGiH2v0sCsXMt6Z40MWXp6keJffEP1BI7p03j0_87WW9D2zNp1WOo5yL0sc57B6uOR5H16S8IQDXKYBrZJBt5-dXkW9THnqZsNXqbufg1le3TfjXeGhERzJAyuYbyROatg)
---
| | The Grinch changed his ways and his heart grew bigger. The only thing that grew bigger under **DeWine was corruption**. Thanks to his leadership, we’re number one in the nation!

Ohioans have had enough! It’s time we send this Grinch packing and put Ohio first.

Help us end 2021 in a BIG way and consider donating to my campaign today. Together, we can make this one of the last Christmas’ that **DeWine the Grinch** is governor!
---
| | | [ ](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJxdUMtugzAQ_BpzA5nlFQ4c0qZEalVVatWzBfYaXGGbGCjK39ekpIdK1kqe2Z3dGVHlbSnyQFVAIY4BEqBxSbOI0pYjUCkaWcg0LUlKdfSltEPTcK4ibnXQVzIWKc_LuKVcgOBZkzV5nNMDpCI90BKDoerneZxIciRQ-zchXxxGqzIOxSbisV0ylNaFnf1GZ6zzMNpLKJCjbtGRpF5mzTQKtWiSnFA3aiCQb-BkF8fRg4YPrNHjoOR1p7j_NqoznrzbC7fC5CqYQH8FMjWxuUfWOWV4z9besmm2AzLbK8vQagZ3MWtmNPPvovD8Wcu1RrjknmZmUMIT_8BeCe_89PwiPt7Wc-AqMa5qGNSUFz7ObvNwy3E_uiLFAwG4TQHcIoP0enx977PrmIVeJmyMfto4ePR1vo7417hrRHsyQIrTD7uomZo)

| | I know times have been hard ever since DeWine’s tyrannical lockdowns. So, if now isn’t a good time to donate, would you consider volunteering? Team Renacci is growing, and with patriots like you, we can make Ohio Great Again.
---
| | | [ ](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJxdUF1rhDAQ_DXxTYkbNfXBh2u9K7QchRYKfQqaxEtKPkRziP--8WoLLYSFzOzOzo5oqr4WVaIbwJDnAARwXuMyw7jnEvAguoEORVGjAtvsU9tJuo5znXFvE9UQPmCo6V0BnPYS87InueyLgZacCiBFYhoVwjgjckBwiu-vQgS4d6HjAZHTNVhmpdBXi0grbacNgmoDZ3-duIyg44Z1djR6WHeKx2-nLy6SP_7TrbBhEUzIRTvJ9MyCkuwyaccVW5Rnc_BGMq-0Z9JbBj9i0Yp04XtRenwntO5P54820swZLSLxD1RaxNPap2fx9rI8JlMjxkUbo-eKxrwu2w23oHbTDaL3COA2BXDLBIr1cH5V5TqWaZRJO2ePGwcPsYZ1lL-Nu0a2JwOItl_RIY1P)

| | Dear Friends,

Divisiveness has become the new normal in American politics. That's why I was overjoyed to see a **rare moment of unity** when President Biden acknowledged the Trump administration's role in developing the COVID vaccine -- and the former president's thoughtful response that there "has to be a process of healing in this country."
---
|
---
| As governor, **I'll bring that missing spirit of unity back to Salem**. If you agree that we need to bring unity back to state government, will you consider chipping in to my grassroots campaign for governor? I can't do this alone.

Jessica Gomez

name: Ronna McDaniel
subject: Package delayed? We can help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| Fellow patriot,

Would you support a Senate majority that cuts unwarranted/needless spending and works to end the supply chain issues causing your packages to be delayed this holiday season?

**We’ve got the answers**. What we don’t currently have are the financial resources to beat Democrats in some of the must-win Senate races; **_they’re raising money like there is no tomorrow_**.

Your package may currently be delayed. But to win back the Senate and get to work on your behalf, we’re hoping that your show of support isn’t delayed for too much longer.

**[Would you mind taking a short survey letting us know what it will take for you to join our victory team?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c43f3161819e4635b0d2ef989ed25830&_e=FRQ_frsIIqcp3mVObdytabiyydydcYCd_4B328f8y5JvnPbd5q7FQ-457SoSXNMY-yk6UIbirV47MxhOg4WK91N1rLftvO1m--xJ2dYDROeFZZ7-b1VzjS_V3yro2UFx9gp9_urEsQ9I8arTBHzkusrFGgsbDedLFGGfaiSGBQNHENJlNMfWGsXpKHardFb0aeRbZQzNQicxXbWd9s3ScqwvQH_HHddIEnd_nZkFUvgO6CWB_h_xADCaydChmPrfDFKBB45MNk4lg49piiahwVqOi87dUrduejS0lYxDOQ6OiNcttZpevhIdusW11aD0J4nJJcs8C_e0Df-Nlkmup32ourHTlX4DS6Ed0z7Jex8cOYN4LaETVU5aW6Xgy17ddN7gcSs3fBmMco6sH-ACA-Q5ylBN8-FzCRUZmDvSRicU-eDRROwd5YEt5Be3JlbbZg8MFrWmL1JmItv8ME2Q52F-k_CHv2WYF7ssMW-5Opw%3D)**

We need to be able to communicate with as many conservatives as possible from now through Election Day.

**[While the polls may be in our favor now, we cannot and must not rest. If we don’t keep building on our momentum now, we’ll lose any shot we have of winning back the Senate.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c43f3161819e4635b0d2ef989ed25830&_e=FRQ_frsIIqcp3mVObdytabiyydydcYCd_4B328f8y5JvnPbd5q7FQ-457SoSXNMY-yk6UIbirV47MxhOg4WK91N1rLftvO1m--xJ2dYDROeFZZ7-b1VzjS_V3yro2UFx9gp9_urEsQ9I8arTBHzkusrFGgsbDedLFGGfaiSGBQNHENJlNMfWGsXpKHardFb0aeRbZQzNQicxXbWd9s3ScqwvQH_HHddIEnd_nZkFUvgO6CWB_h_xADCaydChmPrfDFKBB45MNk4lg49piiahwRKrFtDrbxsyhKicT16dBdkBFjznn45L4h2V4MnlNfsjQhs7YH5o_4Y2RSHcxiomV5T_H6Z88Zf-XceXW29TW5u9-waaVKtTIZGs5f26xQhd13Xi58VuJbE8NmdrRyFs7aZBlYu63Ldl7QTDi9SWDqdn1yLvAYBDGuNIrJQ5yPdEdj58rXyEWNbGaHEbu4MJ0tZxKBG3JYfIeBN92SbUNoM%3D)**

Thank you,
Ronna McDaniel

name: Ballard for Montana Finance Team
subject: We don’t have time to waste
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACK BALLARD FOR MONTANA

body:
As the year is winding down, here’s a look ahead for 2022. | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDIxeDWqAtfj4Fn87VuYfG4Xt4DQgNWFgDCOefFWaI9Dp_O6IxexNATE7cITP5W1rXb8BlbLHOFxWdi6Nh2hNxFp1kZwC200z8OdsT3_3o5NCUX_UgJ7tq-zWgZkU3HypWHIO4R679Im8Zr7yTJNmYr8wdHFrR2L4BbA60Oe63pc3bi39idBw2qEfcYq5WtiSh6TH23m0LePt0QD2Y40t31nkqWqwb6tqzXD3Vr47_dVXmD8eDwBCpq8Z2fBY6ESEIA/3i3/Gmg6dVZUSCqAGwGoQY1ZAQ/h0/zWvCMjziN9j5cTUiJN4tTJa5b0SPYT4hvCbH43YlyVc)

Peter -- We are writing to say we hope you have a peaceful and joyful holiday season with friends and loved ones. This time of year a lot of people wind down and sneak in some well-deserved quiet time. But here at Future Generations, we can't afford to slow down. We have to hit the ground running right away in January. **[We are less than 2 months from the start of early voting in our first elections of 2022. Can you pitch in with a gift of $22 today so we will be ready to win?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5-3DAMMcuBelWAChxwjvOKdrn31ztUqXS7qpyqZqmvAt7G5ewH8qcLZiT_snStcYshwRnpgmgvd2Agk3uTinNo2v7m7ln-rq2pqJz3Iwew73rVy1PySEruf9uYK4kp-o_0IjZ2laiNpSTRbEToxvUtAuVIUaz81o1nX0nArHTgxTTsvxmAaKspK5wglOhD1X9RtlHAVatiQxIjY_2ZB10yuEAo_RAov1BqTvLKdnKiSW2Bnr8o1BTGuAyxQvQY7RDoQzHr9iz4zEFjb_XzK_oT7LXAlGO0opDgc9PqiNKW5bR9T97hkPQY-xFm2_JF-OXvE8IZcd25iyM7agSACMIbUMHKc9F0lZhXkKzWQkEjQ/3i3/Gmg6dVZUSCqAGwGoQY1ZAQ/h1/_Zv9v6B13PFvs3m8nMDjhEAslB-HKsgsfvgLZSaLmQQ)** Once we ring in the new year, it's going to be a mad dash. Our first primaries are in Texas, where several big deadlines come up quickly:

* Jan 31: Voter registration deadline
* Feb 14: Early voting starts
* Mar 01: Primary day!

With your help, our team has worked hard all year to build on our successes from 2020. After securing historic victories for Sen. Ed Markey, Rep. Cori Bush, and others, for 2022 we have nearly two dozen candidates on our slate - including multiple incumbents who are fighting for the Green New Deal. We are up against the entrenched corporate interests buying into both major parties. They want to stonewall any action on the climate crisis and eliminate the social safety net so they can keep people dependent on jobs with long hours and low wages. [**That 's why we can't stop fighting, Peter. We must move beyond surviving, and strive for thriving.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5-3DAMMcuBelWAChxwjvOKdrn31ztUqXS7qpyqZqmvAt7G5ewH8qcLZiT_snStcY3ZxNlWo56GJYvz1O5CFP15Zll6JWcfc8uHqsmnWFWrXyljVk6pP1JcNigsjsk8Kk3EGmqXrOhQBhegXPLTT9TnYfdZywyYaLQi0FATjShDYB3aSoLZC8ZeHh2WBQcrt5V4LYahY-fF0_eFt4NzOMmjzMB5F91ZmovvDYCxP0AhIAtWd5DmfpJrtnL4eYdzHLBBZ5HLKSHmlbfcWDVYrA2xCdxAuOhV3aiasBbeWP4Nk4iTHUvwZIhoki7FYfXlFTU3YCKJLNYhTjWNlc1QLHW/3i3/Gmg6dVZUSCqAGwGoQY1ZAQ/h2/M0eWdka347mEQJuFUtLNweKdUSV0kuJvIQbmW9T9SEA) Our grassroots candidates are depending on Future Generations to double their volunteer base like we did for Sen. Markey in 2020. Your contributions today help us pay for organizing tools and growing our team so we can recruit and train more volunteers. ** ** **Can you chip in $22, $50, or even $100 today to help us fight for the future?**

clean_body: As the year is winding down, here’s a look ahead for 2022. | | Peter -- We are writing to say we hope you have a peaceful and joyful holiday season with friends and loved ones. This time of year a lot of people wind down and sneak in some well-deserved quiet time. But here at Future Generations, we can't afford to slow down. We have to hit the ground running right away in January. Once we ring in the new year, it's going to be a mad dash. Our first primaries are in Texas, where several big deadlines come up quickly: Jan 31: Voter registration deadline Feb 14: Early voting starts Mar 01: Primary day! With your help, our team has worked hard all year to build on our successes from 2020. After securing historic victories for Sen. Ed Markey, Rep. Cori Bush, and others, for 2022 we have nearly two dozen candidates on our slate - including multiple incumbents who are fighting for the Green New Deal. We are up against the entrenched corporate interests buying into both major parties. They want to stonewall any action on the climate crisis and eliminate the social safety net so they can keep people dependent on jobs with long hours and low wages. Our grassroots candidates are depending on Future Generations to double their volunteer base like we did for Sen. Markey in 2020. Your contributions today help us pay for organizing tools and growing our team so we can recruit and train more volunteers. Can you chip in $22, $50, or even $100 today to help us fight for the future? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: We shocked the world with some major wins in 2020, and we're ready to do it again with your support. Looking at the candidates on our slate fills us both with so much hope. We have to feel optimistic when we have fighters like Attica Scott, Jason Call, Mckayla Wilkes, and Maxwell Alejandro Frost on our side. Thank you so much for being a supporter of Future Generations. We are truly grateful to have you on the team, and look forward to a bold new year together. Roza and Erica | | Future Generations is a youth-founded, youth-led movement guided by the Seventh Generations philosophy, building a sustainable world for the next seven generations. We partner with progressives up and down the ballot to stop the climate crisis, fighting for universal healthcare, racial and economic justice. We don't take money from corporate PACs or lobbyists. In 2020 we helped re-elect GND champion Sen. Ed Markey and flipped crucial down-ballot seats. We're building a powerful slate for 2022, and we need your help. subject: Was your donation delayed?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| Fellow patriot,

Would you support a Senate majority that cuts unwarranted/needless spending and works to end the supply chain issues causing your packages to be delayed this holiday season?

**We’ve got the answers**. What we don’t currently have are the financial resources to beat Democrats in some of the must-win Senate races; **_they’re raising money like there is no tomorrow_**.

Your package may currently be delayed. But to win back the Senate and get to work on your behalf, we’re hoping that your show of support isn’t delayed for too much longer.

**[Would you mind taking a short survey letting us know what it will take for you to join our victory team?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3586266d6f9548bf8a8459e217e6766c&_e=Cna5bHVPpHu_fIv6eVOOLq4TcxOQC4JYpeK2UhOpjHn8JoRs-fgsMOxbQ2-xLaZxI_EtrFJZMV1QnxPBGk6RLkNvkIIM22felTGcKkvNYv1gWZbfHiKA2t5jciNjZw5Ay4yYSXh32_eTr43pGZyLGvuSy7fSLQ3Y2KSybj5LkZ63Fj0mDJMMnh10sKdhe-e_TZLV_wjRmOE-w2TQT0LQnSzzt7Tehne9guNs3RMOhi9Qm-X5pCSP8pxjabw36oI-oaVyL6HnAy704Wt7nQe-qLRSQGRGnhAx-0gngojkhrRV8Gk_v-5Ci7yGZxlmwdpdRYS2-RHJjWfWNeJeQO3_KOMcKUtlEXHUIHRG6ekOdX-_4jiHLxwri39t4sJF6Po6Jxs_Czj6w3jAy3bhN0NQAkXZyEVjIAfDqJlv43pkail3vVqHg7NymH0Hou59Nq7N8_1ckKZ10GoXPMW1Ae-4o113KhoT_uZVo0C5yFELTEZC9z3zJQQnip5uQM0ie4vS)**

[** TAP/CLICK Here to begin survey today->**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3586266d6f9548bf8a8459e217e6766c&_e=Cna5bHVPpHu_fIv6eVOOLq4TcxOQC4JYpeK2UhOpjHn8JoRs-fgsMOxbQ2-xLaZxI_EtrFJZMV1QnxPBGk6RLkNvkIIM22felTGcKkvNYv1gWZbfHiKA2t5jciNjZw5Ay4yYSXh32_eTr43pGZyLGvuSy7fSLQ3Y2KSybj5LkZ63Fj0mDJMMnh10sKdhe-e_TZLV_wjRmOE-w2TQT0LQnSzzt7Tehne9guNs3RMOhi9Qm-X5pCSP8pxjabw36oI-oaVyL6HnAy704Wt7nQe-qLRSQGRGnhAx-0gngojkhrQ1mEGrZIzkeTjj3jKr_EIrfH4sPWgZcIvZwuJJTDCzOWtbk1hJelvnxWWmKczigkziMyHUzNm1f8EgS8b9aEX-7XVQktYaCYuS2xiteu6G7e08v92BbrYJ6iGdmEQIB5za3_Dr0U5OHTNpddxKnJZZvhpHNdtaE_MyqMf4LbH-con0nEIVqmay_4ASEyuoSxl4RRymJ7cQXd_p2Xy1oB28)
We need to be able to communicate with as many conservatives as possible from now through Election Day.

**[While the polls may be in our favor now, we cannot and must not rest. If we don’t keep building on our momentum now, we’ll lose any shot we have of winning back the Senate.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3586266d6f9548bf8a8459e217e6766c&_e=Cna5bHVPpHu_fIv6eVOOLq4TcxOQC4JYpeK2UhOpjHn8JoRs-fgsMOxbQ2-xLaZxI_EtrFJZMV1QnxPBGk6RLkNvkIIM22felTGcKkvNYv1gWZbfHiKA2t5jciNjZw5Ay4yYSXh32_eTr43pGZyLGvuSy7fSLQ3Y2KSybj5LkZ63Fj0mDJMMnh10sKdhe-e_TZLV_wjRmOE-w2TQT0LQnSzzt7Tehne9guNs3RMOhi9Qm-X5pCSP8pxjabw36oI-oaVyL6HnAy704Wt7nQe-qLRSQGRGnhAx-0gngojkhrSdCh5T53BsPb7zdGQmli24HeqiwZ5PtIPzA0Vs85ka99kJZ_4s9JY95sbnVTGHBm5sJUsMHQZgTK5xoh_QMc5viTZjKxVWyRAISA6lEVMovelgFVYKhqxL8iW3kvI-H64D94y5F3Giai27m6jgEFAvOGpUk72Bdib5bz0u_nOIbPOxG4FPohbegQCkv9sslr4LRoDkL0jguA6Y9oMJrzMU)**

Your package may currently be delayed. But to win back the Senate and get to work on your behalf, we’re hoping that your show of support isn’t delayed for too much longer. They control so much of our society without accountability or regulation. **They’re essentially a 4th branch of government without any checks or balances!**

They’re so large that small businesses don’t even have a chance! Well, we can solve multiple problems at once by finally breaking up the monopoly of Big Tech.

body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]Hi Peter,
Can I take a minute to tell you more about or friend and inspiration Congresswoman Katie Porter , Peter?
Katie is a force to be reckoned with. She’s a fearless advocate for working families, and one of our champions in the fight for paid family leave. You do know about her white board, right?
She’s also at serious risk of losing her House seat.
Here’s why: The GOP listed her as a top target in the midterm elections. They are determined to retake the House majority and in order to do so, they need to flip Katie’s seat.
Can you please rush a donation to support her re-election campaign today? We promised her that Moms for Katie Porter could raise her $10,000 by the end of this month and we are so close. We are counting on you to chip in to help us close the gap. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatieporter?refcode=0920]
In 2018, Katie was the underdog and narrowly flipped her district blue. If she’s going to keep her seat next year, she’ll need supporters like you and organizations like us to power her campaign.
None of this work would be possible without you.
With gratitude,
Simona Grace

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Happy holidays, team!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
Thank you for standing with me and believing in a future we can build together.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39976898/322281270/-1384613475?refcode=BLU-SJC-20211223-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODNkMDYxMS0zNzY0LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=18Yjck6woXc4xjFxahVb1CYZozREd9BsdR4ZH9zccek=) I’m writing to wish you and your loved ones a happy holiday season.

There’s no question that the past year has been difficult for all of us, as we navigated the second year of an unprecedented global pandemic. I hope you are able to take some much-needed time to find peace and joy with loved ones.

I am so grateful to the frontline workers who support us in this season and every day, and to the scientists who developed a vaccine that has made it possible for us to spend this season with family and loved ones. However you celebrate, may it be safe and meaningful.

Thank you for standing with me and believing in a future we can build together. From my family to yours, happy holidays.

All my best,
Sara

name: Cheri Beasley 2022
subject: asking for your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
It’s critical that we show we have the grassroots strength necessary to flip this seat.
#

Friends -
We have a quick but important ask of you today:
**[Will you add your name to personally endorse Cheri Beasley for U.S. Senate? We need to demonstrate that we are all united behind her now that she’s Democrats’ presumptive nominee.](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/em-personal-endorsement/?source=em211223-1-ma&akid=175%2E357359%2E6JJf80)**
**[ENDORSE CHERI BEASLEY](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/em-personal-endorsement/?source=em211223-1-ma&akid=175%2E357359%2E6JJf80)**
As we begin to focus on our general election, it’s critical that we show we have the grassroots strength necessary to flip this seat.
Like Cheri says, winning North Carolina in 2022 is possible, but it will take all of us.
It may seem like a small action, but it's important. We need as many people as possible to raise their hands and say they’re with us in this fight.
That is how we will defeat all the Republican attacks and dark money headed our way and send Cheri to the U.S. Senate.
**[Please add your name to personally endorse Cheri Beasley for U.S. Senate. We must build the largest people-powered campaign North Carolina has ever seen, and your endorsement today is an important part of that.](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/em-personal-endorsement/?source=em211223-1-ma&akid=175%2E357359%2E6JJf80)
We’re grateful to the leaders who’ve endorsed our campaign in just the past week — from State Sen. Jeff Jackson to Attorney General Josh Stein and our entire Democratic Congressional delegation.
Now it would mean so much to Cheri to add your name to our list of general election endorsers today too!
Thank you!
Team Beasley

clean_body: It’s critical that we show we have the grassroots strength necessary to flip this seat. Friends - We have a quick but important ask of you today: As we begin to focus on our general election, it’s critical that we show we have the grassroots strength necessary to flip this seat. Like Cheri says, winning North Carolina in 2022 is possible, but it will take all of us. It may seem like a small action, but it's important. We need as many people as possible to raise their hands and say they’re with us in this fight. That is how we will defeat all the Republican attacks and dark money headed our way and send Cheri to the U.S. Senate. We’re grateful to the leaders who’ve endorsed our campaign in just the past week — from State Sen. Jeff Jackson to Attorney General Josh Stein and our entire Democratic Congressional delegation. Now it would mean so much to Cheri to add your name to our list of general election endorsers today too! Thank you! Team Beasley ** Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina Cheri Beasley for North Carolina PO Box 28778 Raleigh, NC 27611

name: Tiffany
subject: Merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General
body:
Friend,

Our world is often troubled and we are living in a time when those troubles
are magnified by technology, government, and media promoting non-stop fear 24/7.

During this Christmas season let’s pause a moment and remember the good news
that was brought without technology or news channels to simple shepherds out in
the field. News that is as true today, as it was on that night thousands of
years ago.

And the angel said unto them, Fear not: for, behold, I bring you good tidings
ofgreat joy, which shall be to all people. Luke 2:10

I wish you a Merry Christmas, a peaceful heart, and great joy!

God Bless,

Tiffany Shedd

Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General.
Authorized by Shedd for Attorney General.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com <mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com>.

We CAN stop Pelosi with your help! | What are YOU willing to do to protect Democracy, and stop government overreach? I know that Congresswoman Miller-Meeks is willing to work harder than anyone else. God Bless, Team Miller-Meeks Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress Miller-Meeks for Congress P.O. name: Heidi St. John
subject: Christmas Greetings From The St. John Family
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Merry Christmas, everyone!
I heard a rumor... we may have a white Christmas in SW Washington! What a gift--and just in time. As we take a moment to pause and reflect on all we have to be thankful for this Christmas-- our families, our faith and the freedom that we have long enjoyed--I hope you feel a sense of hope. I know I do. After all, Christmas is about hope, isn't it? Christmas reminds us that love is still the greatest force on earth. According to the Bible, those who hope in the Lord will renew their strength (Isaiah 40:31)--and we need a renewal of strength in our nation and in our state right now. The battle is fierce. It's true that things are hard for many Americans right now--but we are a resilient people and I truly believe that as we work together, and as we seek the Lord for guidance, our best days are still ahead of us. This Christmas, I pray we take inventory of our blessings as a nation and commit to returning once more to the foundational principles that made the United States the most free and prosperous nation on earth; starting with a renewed commitment to pursuing freedom as "one nation, under God, indivisible ... with liberty and justice for all." Oh, how I love this beautiful country! I am committed to being part of a renewal of the American spirit in 2022--and to that end, we are building a grassroots movement that will send a message all across America that here in Washington State, the American spirit is alive and well. We do have a battle ahead of us--but for the next few days, I hope we enjoy the blessings of liberty, even as we prepare to rally together in defense of them. My grandchildren and all seven of our children and their spouses will be with us at our home in Battle Ground this year. I can't wait to have everyone under one roof. As the delightful Andy Rooney once said, "One of the most glorious messes in the world is the mess created in the living room on Christmas Day. Don't clean it up too quickly." I wish you the rest, hope and the joy of Christmas this year, my friends.
The best really is yet to come. Merry Christmas.

Barack and Michelle Obama are asking all Democrats to OPPOSE the GOP's "Jim Crow 2.0" laws! **[Add your name right now to join them in this important fight>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/3673?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211223-ActionNeeded-ObamasVBMRef-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211223-ActionNeeded-ObamasVBMRef-Pros-sl1&akid=2248%2E9716520%2EeT6O7G)**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/3673?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211223-ActionNeeded-ObamasVBMRef-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211223-ActionNeeded-ObamasVBMRef-Pros-sl1&akid=2248%2E9716520%2EeT6O7G)

Team -- President Obama was crystal clear: "The future of our country is at stake" if we don't protect voting rights.

The pace of the GOP's vicious scheme has escalated RAPIDLY over the last year.

\-- **FIRST:** Trump spread lies about election fraud and REFUSED to concede to President Biden.
\-- **THEN:** A far-right mob stormed the Capitol on January 6 in an attempted insurrection.
\-- **NOW: GOP officials are ATTACKING voting rights across the country to try and seize power by reducing our ability to vote.**

They've introduced 400 bills to restrict access to the ballot already in 2021 -- _and they are NOT slowing down!_

That's why Barack and Michelle Obama are leading the fight to protect voting rights and why we've launched a MASSIVE petition to join them -- ****_but our records indicate you may not_****** _have stood with the Obamas yet, and we're still 7.8% short of our 100,000 signature goal!_**

Don't let Barack and Michelle down! **[Click here to add your name and join the Obamas in OPPOSING the GOP's voter suppression>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/3673?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211223-ActionNeeded-ObamasVBMRef-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211223-ActionNeeded-ObamasVBMRef-Pros-sl1&akid=2248%2E9716520%2EeT6O7G)**

| [I STAND WITH THE OBAMAS](https://go.dscc.org/go/3673?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211223-ActionNeeded-ObamasVBMRef-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211223-ActionNeeded-ObamasVBMRef-Pros-sl1&akid=2248%2E9716520%2EeT6O7G)

Team DSCC

The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. body:

Folks, this race is a dead heat:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6329?t=1007&akid=1777%2E3611125%2E-YOT_y ]Tim Ryan leads JD Vance 37% to 36%.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6329?t=1008&akid=1777%2E3611125%2E-YOT_y ]Keep the lead!

The most recent poll in our race shows that no matter the matchup, if the
race for Ohio’s Senate seat were held today, the outcome would be within
single digits. In fact, Tim is leading Republican JD Vance by just one
point.

Vance has a $10 million billionaire-funded super PAC behind him and our
other GOP opponents are multi-millionaires able to self-fund their
campaigns. This poll is truly a testament to the power of our grassroots
campaign!

This poll proves we have what it takes to flip this open Senate seat BLUE
and expand our Democratic Senate majority, but in a battleground race like

name: =?utf-8?Q?Becky=20Edwards?=
subject: A holiday message from Ron and Vicky McBride
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becky Edwards for U
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0a435fd5df06/join-me-saturday-in-provo-5337058?e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=a6c21e99bc&e=10c1db3257)
---
| Dear friend, Like so many Utahns, we’re thrilled to see the University of Utah headed to the Rose Bowl and hoping for a win. Go Utes! We’re also hoping for another victory for Utah—the election of Becky Edwards as the Republican nominee—in the June primary. **We’ve known Becky since she married John, the son of our close friend and long-time BYU coach LaVell Edwards, and have always known her to be a wise, compassionate, and courageous leader.**
---
|
---
| Becky started her career as a social worker which made her uniquely qualified to work with her constituents when she served in the Utah legislature for ten years. She gained a reputation for building coalitions and passing legislation that served her constituents, making her one of Utah’s most effective legislators. **[We know Becky is the best candidate for the U.S. Senate. But she needs your support to get there. Will you donate today to support her campaign?](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=e0f8adcab2&e=10c1db3257)**
---
| [Donate](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=0a9255b737&e=10c1db3257 "Donate")
---
| It’s time for Utah to elect a senator who truly represents Utah values and will lead with the same wisdom, compassion, and courage we’ve seen in her for so many years. **[We’ve donated to Becky and now we’re asking you to join us. Donate today, before Christmas, to help Becky finish the quarter strong and continue her lead as the top Republican contender against Mike Lee in the Republican primary.](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=b977c52cc0&e=10c1db3257)** Thank you, Happy Holidays, Go Utes, and Go Becky!

-Ron and Vicky McBride
---
| | | | | | | [](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=bd310e5545&e=10c1db3257)
---

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear friend, Like so many Utahns, we’re thrilled to see the University of Utah headed to the Rose Bowl and hoping for a win. Go Utes! We’re also hoping for another victory for Utah—the election of Becky Edwards as the Republican nominee—in the June primary. We’ve known Becky since she married John, the son of our close friend and long-time BYU coach LaVell Edwards, and have always known her to be a wise, compassionate, and courageous leader. | | Becky started her career as a social worker which made her uniquely qualified to work with her constituents when she served in the Utah legislature for ten years. She gained a reputation for building coalitions and passing legislation that served her constituents, making her one of Utah’s most effective legislators. | "Donate" | It’s time for Utah to elect a senator who truly represents Utah values and will lead with the same wisdom, compassion, and courage we’ve seen in her for so many years. Thank you, Happy Holidays, Go Utes, and Go Becky! -Ron and Vicky McBride | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Becky Edwards for U.S. Senate P.O. body:
| Fellow patriot,

Would you support a Senate majority that cuts unwarranted/needless spending and works to end the supply chain issues causing your packages to be delayed this holiday season?

**We’ve got the answers**. What we don’t currently have are the financial resources to beat Democrats in some of the must-win Senate races; **_they’re raising money like there is no tomorrow_**.

Your package may currently be delayed. But to win back the Senate and get to work on your behalf, we’re hoping that your show of support isn’t delayed for too much longer.

**[Would you mind taking a short survey letting us know what it will take for you to join our victory team?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=05dc10a96ebf4471b49cffdc0ccb7083&_e=PuX7XsmcgNl3wgn2qHsFTN2Sd3dUzHlVyapwUtEkcxismkydpFgmh2C2adyfhQHoiVtE6okU2chTj3hjR4GY42Sb2IGC64x2mnemGVZMjQHGOHQmEVVtmjTlTPUsTkTPR7eZ3ucoOWMz_AO8bGOsMM4s2D8xLHjigRrpnTt6r937MFlzPS8ghjxuo2pjq3JA17TRDgWB4IbbX8kF_q3doXuMePwd_nOGggJTOTn8eJowDBf6psKuvgPn_swDwNu5cpCkKmMiYWFDG228PzBrmbKLUMVGivHmpA3mHIeMjFR9Cs7f02R7gcGDD_al_vXXQctFFwuFdr4-scxVF8iB1GVwCYyOymVhRzk0zdB_BsGjZchCWYQ-IqeGKCPAHuQaSsRFAAaZWsS5jJCfzvN2VXng4SF9O5bkOb41hs9TurU_QqOpLdm8QpZ_blk9_LA6RGnLVNtwweqRO7XnfhPPB3ribItGtBzfgLAFqanc74Y%3D)**

We need to be able to communicate with as many conservatives as possible from now through Election Day.

**[While the polls may be in our favor now, we cannot and must not rest. If we don’t keep building on our momentum now, we’ll lose any shot we have of winning back the Senate.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=05dc10a96ebf4471b49cffdc0ccb7083&_e=PuX7XsmcgNl3wgn2qHsFTN2Sd3dUzHlVyapwUtEkcxismkydpFgmh2C2adyfhQHoiVtE6okU2chTj3hjR4GY42Sb2IGC64x2mnemGVZMjQHGOHQmEVVtmjTlTPUsTkTPR7eZ3ucoOWMz_AO8bGOsMM4s2D8xLHjigRrpnTt6r937MFlzPS8ghjxuo2pjq3JA17TRDgWB4IbbX8kF_q3doXuMePwd_nOGggJTOTn8eJowDBf6psKuvgPn_swDwNu5cpCkKmMiYWFDG228PzBrmTkETH97-RjM1p6G5SChlRpjcDywH06yrGs3hPwvdm7rpuFpCMYbloHnrX2ePTI19BICYxnKqjbSP4hU6mFMH24I89aabQowTbjlnziMf_xYsxlC3pLgOCeBd08eM4FyoTNw4kjy5-EEKOwfvtLbTPFSNISOTzrD98Wy0jdxM6pCc9pgPiHObWHy8FhkBDtkj1U8jtDlEGx6UjfxKMKMsug%3D)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeanine=20Lawson?=
subject: Even the WaPo is reporting what we've known from the beginning: it's a BABY!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for by Lawson for Congress")
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us8.campaign-archive.com/?e=fc83fb200d&u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=74995b18c8)
---
| |
---
| **Friend,**

**Almost 50 years later, 60+ million babies were killed, and FINALLY, [even the Washington Post is reporting what we've known from the beginning: it's not a blob of cells or a "choice", it's a BABY! ](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=0241053902&e=fc83fb200d)

Earlier this month the Supreme Court heard a very strong case challenging Roe's viability threshold. Now we pray and wait for the high court to rule.

But if Democrats had it their way, babies at all stages of development could be legally aborted. And let's never forget the pediatric neurologist Governor Ralph Northam's defense and explanation of abortion after birth.

It's barbaric and I need your help. **
---
| [Let's Fire Nancy Pelosi & Defeat Planned Parenthood Darling Jennifer Wexton](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=6b046e1260&e=fc83fb200d "Let's Fire Nancy Pelosi & Defeat Planned Parenthood Darling Jennifer Wexton")
---
| **As a Christian, mother of an adopted son, and aunt to a Down Syndrome niece, you can count on me to defend babies.

Jennifer Wexton has failed to stand up for the unborn, but I will. **
---
|
---
| [Let's Fire Nancy Pelosi & Defeat Planned Parenthood Darling Jennifer Wexton](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=f6eaef2a52&e=fc83fb200d "Let's Fire Nancy Pelosi & Defeat Planned Parenthood Darling Jennifer Wexton")
---
| **In Congress, I will stand for life and fight the Democrat's death agenda at every turn. We deserve better than politicians who push for so-called ‘choice’ even when they know full well it’s a child. I will work tirelessly to promote a culture of life, oppose taxpayer-funded abortions, and work to repeal Roe.

But I need your help to stop Jennifer Wexton and the abortion agenda.**

name: Rabine for Governor
subject: Holiday Newsletter
body:
This year has been a difficult one.

| [ ](http://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_newsletter&n=1) | |
---|---|---
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoACmWpbFVl5yir_lA0uM2Gq9g9n79yo2HHshKvg7nExCdQZseeTdqQcxnA0-13oGA&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_newsletter&n=2) Dear Peter -- This year has been a difficult one. Inflation, the rise of violent crime in our cities and authoritarian policies such as mask and vaccine mandates are impacting us all in our daily lives. It seems as though we are more divided than ever as a nation. But there is one thing that should unite us all and that is the celebration of the Christmas season. The birth of Christ changed the world, and it is certainly a momentous event worth celebrating. When we think about God’s love for us in the sending of His Son, all of the problems we see in the world seem petty by comparison. _“The Word became flesh and made His dwelling among us. We have seen His glory, the glory of the one and only Son, who came from the Father, full of grace and truth.”_ John 1:14 Our hope is not in politics or political leaders. Our hope is in Christ. Now more than ever we need to reflect on this truth. Let’s use this time to get re-energized for the battles ahead in 2022. I hope you are able to slow down and spend time with your family and spend time reflecting on what is truly important in life. From my family to yours, have a very Merry Christmas! Best Regards, Gary Rabine **Will you join our growing movement to defeat JB Pritzker?****** Join Team Rabine to learn how you can be a part of the winning team to defeat JB Pritzker and help turn our state around! | [](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_newsletter&n=3 "Join Team Rabine") [Join Team Rabine](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_newsletter&n=3)
---
* * *
### **Governor signs ban on parental notification **
As expected, Governor Pritzker moved to make Illinois the abortion capital of the Midwest by signing into law a bill banning parental notification for abortion.
Here is the statement I released to the press:
“In yet another blow to parental rights, JB Pritzker repealed the parental notification law requiring parents be informed when their child seeks an abortion. Your underage kid can't get an aspirin at school without parental consent, but thanks to JB they can now get an abortion without you knowing. Under Pritzker's rule, Illinois is now the most pro-abortion state in the country.
This is yet another way JB Pritzker is continuing to limit Illinois parents' ability to make decisions on how they raise their children. Like losing Democratic Governor candidate Terry McAuliffe of Virginia, who said parents should not be involved in their kids' educations, JB Pritzker believes parents should be removed from decisions regarding their children’s' physical and mental health.”
### Lower courts lift moratorium on vaccine mandates for employers and employees
While most families are preparing to celebrate the Holidays with their loved ones, the Biden Administration is looking to take their jobs as team Biden's lawyers convinced the 6th circuit late on Friday to lift a stop on the Biden Administration’s job-killing employer vaccine mandate.
I issued the following statement on the court’s decision:
“Merry Christmas from the Biden Administration. FYI – you will lose your job unless you comply with Biden’s vaccine mandates.
I and the Job Creators Network wholeheartedly disagree with the Court’s ruling. We are prepared to continue the fight and within 45 minutes of the Order we appealed to the United States Supreme Court. This unconstitutional mandate adds an incredible burden on small business owners who are still suffering negative effects of the pandemic. This mandate will make it even harder for small business owners to find and keep employees and cause tens of thousands of hardworking Americans to lose their jobs. The 6th Circuit irresponsibly upheld an illegal rule and expects employers to somehow comply with a complicated regulation in a period of two weeks, including the holidays. The Supreme Court must act to save businesses and employees from this government overreach."
### **IEA videos target parents **
A recently released video from the Illinois Education Association takes shots at parents for filing lawsuits against school districts over mask mandates.
The video claims so-called “dark money” is fueling these lawsuits when nothing could be further from the truth. The resistance to the overreach of government bodies is coming from parents – not any so-called “dark money” groups. Parents are simply acting in the interests of their children.
It is shameful for the IEA to target parents with this propaganda video. I find it interesting that the same group that spent $7 million in the last election cycle would be so bold as to accuse every-day Americans of using “dark money” to advance their cause.
Parents have every right to express their frustration with the onerous mandates being enforced at schools. They should not be targeted for simply exercising their rights as parents. I stand with parents.
* * *
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_newsletter&n=4)
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoACmWpbFVl5yir_lA0uM2Gq9g9n79yo2HHshKvg7nExCdQZseeTdqQcxnA0-13oGA&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_newsletter&n=5)
---
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_newsletter&n=6)
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/join?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_newsletter&n=7)

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_newsletter&n=8).
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6t84VcLDAztZ7gNMCtVnC4HtpWQk6Xt7pTvj7avz1DYf&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_newsletter&n=9) [](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y3owDXItF8Fxepzm0P3FcLQliFyUmYOOEoz3DQt6cVpu&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_newsletter&n=10) [](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TpvcEbp0GzIdVh11H7oShmM&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_newsletter&n=11)
Thank you and God bless.

Inflation, the rise of violent crime in our cities and authoritarian policies such as mask and vaccine mandates are impacting us all in our daily lives. It seems as though we are more divided than ever as a nation. But there is one thing that should unite us all and that is the celebration of the Christmas season. The birth of Christ changed the world, and it is certainly a momentous event worth celebrating. When we think about God’s love for us in the sending of His Son, all of the problems we see in the world seem petty by comparison. “The Word became flesh and made His dwelling among us. We have seen His glory, the glory of the one and only Son, who came from the Father, full of grace and truth.” John 1:14 Our hope is not in politics or political leaders. Our hope is in Christ. Now more than ever we need to reflect on this truth. Let’s use this time to get re-energized for the battles ahead in 2022. I hope you are able to slow down and spend time with your family and spend time reflecting on what is truly important in life. From my family to yours, have a very Merry Christmas! Best Regards, Gary Rabine Will you join our growing movement to defeat JB Pritzker?** Join Team Rabine to learn how you can be a part of the winning team to defeat JB Pritzker and help turn our state around! | "Join Team Rabine" Governor signs ban on parental notification As expected, Governor Pritzker moved to make Illinois the abortion capital of the Midwest by signing into law a bill banning parental notification for abortion. Here is the statement I released to the press: “In yet another blow to parental rights, JB Pritzker repealed the parental notification law requiring parents be informed when their child seeks an abortion. Your underage kid can't get an aspirin at school without parental consent, but thanks to JB they can now get an abortion without you knowing. Under Pritzker's rule, Illinois is now the most pro-abortion state in the country. This is yet another way JB Pritzker is continuing to limit Illinois parents' ability to make decisions on how they raise their children. Like losing Democratic Governor candidate Terry McAuliffe of Virginia, who said parents should not be involved in their kids' educations, JB Pritzker believes parents should be removed from decisions regarding their children’s' physical and mental health.” Lower courts lift moratorium on vaccine mandates for employers and employees While most families are preparing to celebrate the Holidays with their loved ones, the Biden Administration is looking to take their jobs as team Biden's lawyers convinced the 6th circuit late on Friday to lift a stop on the Biden Administration’s job-killing employer vaccine mandate. I issued the following statement on the court’s decision: “Merry Christmas from the Biden Administration. FYI – you will lose your job unless you comply with Biden’s vaccine mandates. I and the Job Creators Network wholeheartedly disagree with the Court’s ruling. We are prepared to continue the fight and within 45 minutes of the Order we appealed to the United States Supreme Court. This unconstitutional mandate adds an incredible burden on small business owners who are still suffering negative effects of the pandemic. This mandate will make it even harder for small business owners to find and keep employees and cause tens of thousands of hardworking Americans to lose their jobs. The 6th Circuit irresponsibly upheld an illegal rule and expects employers to somehow comply with a complicated regulation in a period of two weeks, including the holidays. The Supreme Court must act to save businesses and employees from this government overreach." IEA videos target parents A recently released video from the Illinois Education Association takes shots at parents for filing lawsuits against school districts over mask mandates. The video claims so-called “dark money” is fueling these lawsuits when nothing could be further from the truth. The resistance to the overreach of government bodies is coming from parents – not any so-called “dark money” groups. Parents are simply acting in the interests of their children. It is shameful for the IEA to target parents with this propaganda video. I find it interesting that the same group that spent $7 million in the last election cycle would be so bold as to accuse every-day Americans of using “dark money” to advance their cause. Parents have every right to express their frustration with the onerous mandates being enforced at schools. They should not be targeted for simply exercising their rights as parents. I stand with parents. | Paid for by Rabine for Governor | PO Box 59183, Schaumburg, IL 60159 A copy of our report filed with the State Board of Elections is (or will be) available on the Board’s official website (www.elections.il.gov) or for purchase from the State Board of Elections, Springfield, Illinois.
